body:
| | If you want to see Stacey Abrams win in Georgia, if you want to see Val Demings win in Florida, if you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8c9RuVDuFEOSfs9EL9gPKJf62rR2TMQJokFEVMys1w9w3D6TAWdX0lJn398WpGygKoj2ZgLPH8otcx-QinW6jysMShQmg4JSqNA6oeNuusLjB8YV7fHdrhAIGRsUwENv-T7jRGl6kdCzKvxnt0mtLwcHM_gZUeG3fGb0Akj56AogIl5pv6n7u3ckpsOKr_q6-cxmguzscYQ05k2gHDJXEkIKM8bf9VQR1A35pFxki5_BFrrCroyl_EmyvdhSdU_6va0sEc3v89DXAir4mld5QZ7qAbDJ5QUw7B2mq4QeznXw8bPVNdoA3FQI5P4hwI7xzOX2eRDZe9X6-AOjo6oipfEKIL6qNMxnrjsOsnPvCWpFRtO8gqttpjrLl0W1JKlEXQ/3pd/SDp8u4ptRvuubox7BCdfPg/h0/PXf1YWLE6IkZyhyTTl-M_sg9dhDugdg3kS0aUxi9RfE)

| | Peter, it’s Stefanie.

Right now, there are **no** Black women serving in the Senate.

This year, we have the opportunity to double the amount of Black women elected to the Senate in history.

As I said in my recent conversation with Politico:
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd08Cnt8yETzp0d4OIwup9bnSy7tq169h4R3LXPHgZBSape01ghjcpVDEedGEYdNRJVs-JlBeuCiItSAeHAj3PxLXKUiPBcb6hIH_iwkHvJhtXX7hmLqdpwQfNOWyZS96vZr9uxC1mAP-gt9pYw7x_TKPWK2COlL6g2rMKaQLTHJ3h0sPEIlMR4zaEKWGUbtod3mmzpSnLnrzpvasvM0zjcGMtoGeDK_feTJeBgrxwxfFfrXAXumm9q9qm0NGDLMJ1rZghiAQanomUGE8beORxS40KbhlbJ9E3uhoVqc3llEAFlcSyc0nDEzNPtj0ez2_Wggz_LG8O5_S6vNGqFZHiJ-SQUyhXHYoxS4cKH27Q2lUfSqPP0sU0kqraV0wp57Zvu1QwDsXWbCd4xQ7duO9lRzJ_sOTcyTNs0Pn_dr5xkA/3pd/SDp8u4ptRvuubox7BCdfPg/h1/Ks_XvxnWaKCOLuKR4BNq1_HP2lH8fynbKW_3Lh0p1xs) Val Demings and Cheri Beasley are running to not only make history, but save the Senate from GOP control. They can **_make history_** and **_double_** the amount of Black women that have **ever** been in the U.S. Senate, **but they can’t do it without your support.**

[There’s less than 8 weeks until Election Day. That’s just 8 weeks to give Val and Cheri the resources they _need_ to defeat their MAGA opponents and maintain our Democratic majority. Can you chip in $10 or even $25 to make history and save the Senate →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zd08Cnt8yETzp0d4OIwup9bnSy7tq169h4R3LXPHgZBSape01ghjcpVDEedGEYdNRJVs-JlBeuCiItSAeHAj3PxLXKUiPBcb6hIH_iwkHvJteu9-x0MTH8IMLV8TbNYKGyfeLvyZl2Jtz69nwnKgPrq4xi04sq4Um6acu49ebCSBJ4c1R7-ecx2bY9McFDqaNpFwbVhSR3wkMl3PZm0KbsM7_b6eDVxmQfYPQXMFUgVhpT_FHdtQAtjrL96bF56-UjM6n_cz5phiHzYLp8gg2TroXUGTbBriMEYrRbebIXVe8T3okOcH9Q9v2sAIPqncydq9CiT3PW9oFIE401a3PRbu2pdBs7Kc3XY8gQ0nKx5soptwjQkyrTLu2r2CpZ8PsZJhgu0spnYUjSzh8EC-Hab6l7XMr_qhCh7P2IAp9H-A/3pd/SDp8u4ptRvuubox7BCdfPg/h2/nHdKsk3JaaOG4l2guInmG7iMb9K3mezTwATHkyxde-Q) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

In the critical 2021 runoffs, The Collective PAC provided over 70,000 (!!!) rides to the polls for Georgia voters, helping elect Rev. Warnock and flipping the Senate.

WE. MADE. HISTORY. And Peter, we can do it again.

Our important work is powered by grassroots donors like you who understand what is at stake in this election. Your support helps us register, mobilize, and educate voters in Black communities because we know **_if we vote, we win._**

[If we’re going to elect Val Demings and Cheri Beasley to the Senate, we need to turn out voters in RECORD NUMBERS. clean_body: | | If you want to see Stacey Abrams win in Georgia, if you want to see Val Demings win in Florida, if you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, it’s Stefanie. Right now, there are no Black women serving in the Senate. This year, we have the opportunity to double the amount of Black women elected to the Senate in history. As I said in my recent conversation with Politico: Val Demings and Cheri Beasley are running to not only make history, but save the Senate from GOP control. They can make history and double the amount of Black women that have ever been in the U.S. Senate, but they can’t do it without your support. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | In the critical 2021 runoffs, The Collective PAC provided over 70,000 (!!!) rides to the polls for Georgia voters, helping elect Rev. Warnock and flipping the Senate. WE. MADE. HISTORY. And Peter, we can do it again. Our important work is powered by grassroots donors like you who understand what is at stake in this election. Your support helps us register, mobilize, and educate voters in Black communities because we know if we vote, we win. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Stefanie Brown James Co-Founder and Senior Advisor of The Collective PAC | Thank you for your continued support of The Collective PAC, Peter. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re building Black political power across the country at all levels of government. Were you forwarded this email? Friends—you can see my uncle’s fingerprints all over the list of
GOP nominees up and down the ballot in key races across the country.

Perhaps nowhere is that more evident than in Ohio, where Silicon Valley
millionaire JD Vance emerged from a pack of other MAGA extremists to grab
Donald Trump’s endorsement and ultimately the nomination for U.S. Senate.

Make no mistake, friends—JD Vance is dangerous. He’s anti-choice,
anti-democracy, and willing to adopt whatever extremist ideology he thinks
will help him win.

Tim Ryan is neck-and-neck with Vance in the polls, but if his campaign
falls short of its fundraising goal, they’ll lose major ground in the
fight to maintain Senate control. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21387?t=1015&amount=25&akid=5453%2E3611125%2EZurN38 ]Can you pitch in $25 to ensure that
Tim is the next Senator from Ohio?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21387?t=1016&amount=25&akid=5453%2E3611125%2EZurN38 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21387?t=1017&amount=50&akid=5453%2E3611125%2EZurN38 ]Donate $50

MAGA extremists are pulling out all of the stops to try to buy their way
back into power. If they manage to take back the Senate, our chance to
pass meaningful legislation will go out the window.

Folks, it’s been a tough year. But we have an opportunity
finally to make good on our promise to the American people by delivering
legislation that expands voting rights and protects access to safe and
legal abortion.

That will only happen if we expand our Democratic Senate majority. Whether
or not we do that hinges entirely on what happens in Ohio.

body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, we’ll get
straight to the point: Georgia’s democracy is under attack this election
by a voter-suppressing governor with an extremist agenda.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220910_B4_KempVoterSuppression_S1_T1_AFG_30click&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=6744%2E1862389%2EnfTPKw ]We need a surge of support right now if we’re going to overcome Brian
Kemp’s voter suppression and defeat him in November. Can you chip in
$5 right now to help us mobilize millions of voters and
elect Stacey Abrams? Every cent of your contribution will go towards the
meaningful resources that will get us across the finish line on Election
Day.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220910_B4_KempVoterSuppression_S1_T1_AFG_30click&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=6744%2E1862389%2EnfTPKw ]DONATE

The stakes are high this election,
Derek. Far-right extremists in
Georgia are trying to disenfranchise as many Democratic voters as they
can. They are trying to rig the system to work in their favor — and
especially against Black and brown voters in Georgia.

In 2021, Brian Kemp signed off on a law that allows a single private
citizen to challenge the eligibility of an unlimited number of voters.

He’s made it illegal for volunteers to hand out water to voters waiting in
hours-long voting lines.

During his tenure as Secretary of State, he purged more than 1.4 million
names from Georgia’s voter registration rolls.

Brian Kemp’s voter suppression agenda is as transparent as it is
dangerous. We want to be clear,
Derek: he’s taking every
measure in the book to make it hard for voters so he can stay in power.
But we won’t let him.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220910_B4_KempVoterSuppression_S1_T1_AFG_30click&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=6744%2E1862389%2EnfTPKw ]With less than 60 days until Election Day, we need as many of our
supporters to chip
in $5 or whatever they can today to help us stop Brian
Kemp’s voter suppression. Please, make a contribution today:

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220910_B4_KempVoterSuppression_S1_T1_AFG_30click&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1005&akid=6744%2E1862389%2EnfTPKw ]DONATE

Thank you for all you do,

Abrams for Governor

Can you chip in $5 right now to help us mobilize millions of voters and elect Stacey Abrams? Every cent of your contribution will go towards the meaningful resources that will get us across the finish line on Election Day. [ ]DONATE The stakes are high this election, Derek. Far-right extremists in Georgia are trying to disenfranchise as many Democratic voters as they can. They are trying to rig the system to work in their favor — and especially against Black and brown voters in Georgia. In 2021, Brian Kemp signed off on a law that allows a single private citizen to challenge the eligibility of an unlimited number of voters. He’s made it illegal for volunteers to hand out water to voters waiting in hours-long voting lines. During his tenure as Secretary of State, he purged more than 1.4 million names from Georgia’s voter registration rolls. Brian Kemp’s voter suppression agenda is as transparent as it is dangerous. We want to be clear, Derek: he’s taking every measure in the book to make it hard for voters so he can stay in power. But we won’t let him. [ ]With less than 60 days until Election Day, we need as many of our supporters to chip in $5 or whatever they can today to help us stop Brian Kemp’s voter suppression. Please, make a contribution today: [ ]DONATE Thank you for all you do, Abrams for Governor +---------------------------------+ | PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR | +---------------------------------+ Abrams for Governor 931 Monroe Dr NE Ste A102 #363 Atlanta, GA 30308 United States Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh=20=28R=2DCA=29?=
subject: Early Voting Starts In 1 Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Scott Baugh is running against Katie Porter in a must-win race for Republicans. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=b98d1960c1&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, **Early voting in one of the nation’s most competitive U.S. House races begins in just 1 month!**

I’m Scott Baugh, the Republican nominee in California’s 47th Congressional District. Republicans have huge momentum in this race to defeat Progressive Caucus leader Katie Porter and bring sane representation back to Orange County!
---
| [DONATE NOW TO GET OUT THE VOTE](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=c03396c33f&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO GET OUT THE VOTE")
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=b81025c68f&e=8a657725d1)
---
| **Please, before you delete this email, I simply want to introduce myself and let you know why this mission is so important...**

I’m a local business owner who had the privilege to serve Orange County in our State Assembly, where I led Republicans fighting back against California’s pro-lockdown, anti-freedom left-wing politicians.

I’ve chaired both Orange County’s Republican Party and Orange County’s Gang Reduction Intervention Program, as well as helped found the Institute for Fair Elections.

I love our community, and I want to see it represented in the U.S. House by somebody who will work to bring jobs and industry to Southern California!

Unfortunately, Orange County’s current representative – Katie Porter – has been doing the opposite. She’s a cheerleader for Gavin Newsom’s and Nancy Pelosi’s inflationary agenda. _She even suggested more abortion was a good way for families to cut back on spending. _

**Peter****,** here’s the frank truth: the only way we’re going to see success in protecting our freedoms and ensuring our public safety is if Republicans take back Congress in November. California’s 47th Congressional District is one of just 4 seats nationwide that Republicans must flip to be successful!

**But right now Katie Porter is outraising us 10 TO 1!**_We don’t need to go dollar for dollar with her, but we do need to close this gap substantially._

[So, please, will you join me in fighting to take back Orange County’s congressional seat for Orange County’s people? >>>](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=7eb59a4da2&e=8a657725d1)

Peter,

We're less than 9 weeks away from Election Day, and every major political forecaster is calling the Georgia Senate race a "Toss-Up."

Earlier this week, _Politico_ issued updated rankings of the top Senate races in the nation and concluded much the same that _FiveThirtyEight_ , Crystal Ball, and Cook Political Reports have before them: **Georgia is anyone's race.**

Democrats have now spent more than $37 million on misleading attack ads against me, my family, and my business - yet polls remain a dead heat. **[That means we can win this race.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239168:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)**

A victory in Georgia is going to have widespread implications for every single American - not just those of us who live in the Peach State.

So, if you want Kamala Harris to have the tie-breaking vote in the Senate for another two years, then pay no attention to this race. But if you're tired of the political gamesmanship in DC and our country going in the wrong direction, **[then I'm asking you to chip in what you can- $25, $35, $50, or even $100 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239168:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)**

We're on a collision course with Senator Raphael Warnock, and there can only be one winner. Peter, I've never liked losing, and I don't intend to start now.

Please help us move the needle - **[chip in what you can today to move this race from TOSS-UP to LEAN REPUBLICAN...with a huge VICTORY on Election Day!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239168:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239168:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)
With this race consistently rated a TOSS-UP, we've got to make sure we leave no stone left unturned and no vote left unaccounted for. **With more than 7,004,000 active voters in Georgia, the next two months are going to require a lot of resources to identify - and contact - every eligible voter to make our case.**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239168:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)

Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239168:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239169:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239170:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239171:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61239172:635JZ-VN8:m:1:3334294963:BBB02F3F38C52CE1B1FEF84ADA0EEADC:r)

name: Donald J. Trump...Truth Social Update (via NRSC)
subject: Liberals ELIMINATE Truth Social
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump is sending you messages, but they’re being blocked |

**_BREAKING NEWS:_**

**DONALD J. TRUMP PERMANENTLY BANNED
FROM MESSAGING YOU.**
You read that right, Peter. Google officially banned TRUTH SOCIAL FROM THEIR APP STORE.

The Democrats, the Fake News Media, and Big Tech are working overtime to SILENCE President Trump and you FOREVER.

_**_First:_** They **[IMPEACHED](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a2614b8625064988a85cde2137a78490&_e=SAhgwZOxLGctjJpGu9QrcSVyz1t_ZnC5f224tlAj16G1QCat82S6pR2rYfO6bjpvBcB2hkekJMDdJVnxdvJWil17u18xVAhys_Hs5BG8YF5hKolQ5o57n_nV-vlpZbvdBW4J-zu_4OdetFXSt4SzZYNuZiWGknRWbSd4unxkoEvnXeA1wIfh2fjwFmV3RTyT-pBAQ_5AXA7r3hbBXmv1ckVsz3KBERY2WcfwcTQ75xtApkblqWUbQVFmxtvp8cAQYoBk-xi9x6RTa0uU7F8rj3_ruu5zxeH5a2Tm5Drfrfgr8Ykd_17A3-u8j1IsjPlODOyunU3p32oJ0RRi1v905Fe3TY-tccWR-lMWmJc-2LgeHtKbDp-N99pf_FkmHqHUxQmBGszF08gxMZI1ruKFNVDiGE_ydWjQahih6p3OuGU%3D)** President Trump to try and prevent him from communicating with the American people._

_**_Then:_** They **[RAIDED](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a2614b8625064988a85cde2137a78490&_e=SAhgwZOxLGctjJpGu9QrcSVyz1t_ZnC5f224tlAj16G1QCat82S6pR2rYfO6bjpvBcB2hkekJMDdJVnxdvJWil17u18xVAhys_Hs5BG8YF5hKolQ5o57n_nV-vlpZbvdBW4J-zu_4OdetFXSt4SzZYNuZiWGknRWbSd4unxkoEvnXeA1wIfh2fjwFmV3RTyT-pBAQ_5AXA7r3hbBXmv1ckVsz3KBERY2WcfwcTQ75xtApkblqWUbQVFmxtvp8cAQYoBk-xi9x6RTa0uU7F8rj-ZT59litqDYtOFKjE2RXgVE9MXmM0Wxzuw1W83hozm2Jnu4fvpiPMbDAVN_qwZatFRYlTBGO5lXMuOjDGXDdzt4QiLuU9Q2id3vMrz1PkPpZCMMORavg5hP7eTx4TpB3QMOwM4l-S7PX95PgCbzPOI%3D)** his beautiful home in Mar-a-Lago._

Friend,

I just got word from my finance team that I'm still falling $11,136 short of my critical midnight goal. **I'm worried I won't be able to make up the difference in the next few hours, so I'm reaching out with an urgent plea for help.**
Recent polling shows me TIED with Marco Rubio. I know I can surge ahead, but this fundraising goal is critical, **and I don’t have the option of falling short of my important $250,000 midnight goal.**
I know I ask a lot of this grassroots team, but I wanted to shed a bit more light on why: POLITICO reported that this race could attract the MOST outside money this election cycle. The NRSC has raised more than $75 million and is investing to keep Florida permanently red. And they'll continue pouring in as much as it takes to defeat me,**so I have to meet my goal tonight to expand our Senate majority!**
With your help, I know we have what it takes to defeat Marco Rubio. Our movement is so strong that The Cook Political Report increased my odds of winning, and our momentum is making national headlines. Together, we can flip Florida blue, **but only if I hit each fundraising goal every step of the way.**
I have no one else to turn to if I'm going to hit my midnight goal and defeat Marco Rubio, so I'm counting on you to rush a donation right now. Please, if you can spare even a few dollars before midnight tonight, it would make a huge difference in my race.
Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email-september](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50531796/366233131/-1315874399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4348-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzgwNWIzZi03MTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RXWKYVAUowVogmjIJou_hdkCXWaKd55KyZoNWnM7Lh8=)**
I'm so grateful to have you alongside me in my fight to flip Florida blue. Thanks for your support.

Val Demings

body:
Now that we're in these final weeks, we're asking for your opinion one last time before Election Day.
Hello,
We'll be short and to the point:
We're putting the final touches on our midterm messaging as we head into the last phase of the election. Before we lock in our ad campaigns, we need your response ASAP on our final priorities survey of the election cycle.
**[BEGIN YOUR FINAL PRIORITIES SURVEY -> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250080:6aMH9-VfN:m:1:3331421248:4FF73EBCED0906B66D232AB2F87B26E4:r)**
**What do you think should be the central focus of our messaging?** We registered this survey to your email so please use any of these secure links to submit your response.
_*** Note: you do not need to answer every question provided, only what you want!_
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250080:6aMH9-VfN:m:1:3331421248:4FF73EBCED0906B66D232AB2F87B26E4:r)
**[BEGIN YOUR FINAL PRIORITIES SURVEY -> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250080:6aMH9-VfN:m:1:3331421248:4FF73EBCED0906B66D232AB2F87B26E4:r)**
[**We appreciate all the feedback you 've provided this year. Every response has helped guide the Republican Party as we make our plans to save our country. Your clear and honest feedback is extremely valuable to us.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250080:6aMH9-VfN:m:1:3331421248:4FF73EBCED0906B66D232AB2F87B26E4:r)
Now that we're in these final weeks, we're asking for your opinion one last time before Election Day.
_Your answers will be forwarded directly to the team of Republican Whip Steve Scalise._
Thank you,
House Conservatives

name: Adam Frisch
subject: I just got off the debate stage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Tonight I had the opportunity to speak directly with the people of Colorado's 3rd district in a debate with my Republican opponent, Lauren Boebert. | | | Folks,Tonight I had the opportunity to speak directly with the people of Colorado's 3rd district in a debate with my Republican opponent, Lauren Boebert.I think the differences were pretty clear.I proudly took the stage and spoke about how I'll work for the people of this district and not just plan my next appearance on Fox News. I'm going to put Colorado first.Lauren Boebert has brought in nothing for our state and refuses to be held accountable for anything. subject: re: Grassley gaining ground

body:
this doesn’t look good...
| **FIRST:** Democrat Mike Franken SOARED in the polls against MAGA Sen. Chuck Grassley — _the closest any Democrat has come to defeating Grassley _since 1980!__

name: Michael Farris, ADF
subject: BREAKING: ADF sues CVS
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8xaDRkM3FxZHp5P3NyYz0xMDAyNDM3OCJ9/CdeqSKXEklY-wgss0rLLlg)
---
[](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8xaDRkM3FxZHp5P3NyYz0xMDAyNDM3OCJ9/YMxp7AUTBFKJMBDMyF3H7A)
---
Fellow American, This nurse practitioner's story deserves to go viral. It's a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don't draw the line for freedom. [**_That's why we're suing CVS_**** _._**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8xaDRkM3FxZHp5P3NyYz0xMDAyNDM3OCJ9/njbm-s9IptGN-9ynp79N7A) But I'm getting ahead of myself. Paige Casey is a young nurse practitioner. For years, she faithfully served her community, working as a nurse practitioner at a local CVS MinuteClinic in Virginia. When she was hired, she made her employer aware that her Catholic faith prevented her from prescribing or dispensing abortion-inducing drugs._ _ CVS accommodated her religious conviction for three-and-a-half years and didn't require her to administer any life-ending drugs. But then in 2022, they told Paige they would no longer allow her religious freedom. A few months later, **_she was fired-just two days after earning a performance-based raise._** **This is blatant religious discrimination, and according to Virginia law - it's illegal.**
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8xaDRkM3FxZHp5P3NyYz0xMDAyNDM3OCJ9/MgLgcALiGWb8SPHZUMU81g)
---
With the ongoing effects still felt from the pandemic, health care workers are needed now more than ever. Forcing them to choose between violating their faith or being fired **_hurts everyone. _** **_And it's downright un-American. _** Patients are best served by doctors, nurses, and other medical professionals who are free to act ethically and consistent with their beliefs. Despite having a spotless record, Paige is now _unemployed_ , simply because she stood for her faith. This unlawful discrimination cannot be allowed to stand. That's why Alliance Defending Freedom is filing a lawsuit against CVS on behalf of Paige. ADF is the world's largest legal organization committed to protecting religious freedom, free speech, marriage and family, parental rights, and the sanctity of life. We defend your most cherished liberties in Congress, state legislatures, and courtrooms across the country - all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court if necessary. [**But we need your help. Will you help us send a strong message to CVS by signing our petition below?**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8xaDRkM3FxZHp5P3NyYz0xMDAyNDM3OCJ9/q2hVie56x8lx8vAiKxmWEA) **_We the People, CVS customers, will not stand by and watch attacks on the religious rights of all Americans. _**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC8xaDRkM3FxZHp5P3NyYz0xMDAyNDM3OCJ9/C2qFB2_KM-nVj_Y0G47ndg)
---
Thank you in advance.
---
Michael FarrisPresident and CEOAlliance Defending Freedom
---
15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260
All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIyNTQtMmRjZDk2Y2ZkMjQwNDI3ZmI2Nzk2NmVjYTlmNzU0MDciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/oL0rgQbtBN8I1-b5lMXZFA) to unsubscribe.
---

body:
---

---
| Peter,
"$5 million dollars to stop you. WOW! You must be saying the right things."
That's what Tucker Carlson said to me...
...when I went on his show to **call out Kevin McCarthy** , RINO Impeachment defenders, and the GOP Establishment for their **smear campaign against me.** | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61244686:6epWx-VSN:m:1:3334294963:FCB9A02B3DA0CDEF385EC51E70563CC8:r)
---
| They've spent **$5 million attacking me and my family with TV ads.** They know I won't take orders from them because I answer to the people...and that _terrifies_ them.
I'm Karoline Leavitt, the 25-year-old conservative firebrand from New Hampshire who doesn't cower in the face of dirty politics.
Despite McCarthy and the Establishment's best efforts, **I 'm tied in the polls with the Establishment's hand-picked puppet** ahead of my primary on Tuesday.
They've called me a racist because I believe in a secure border and law and order. They've called me transphobic because I want to save girls' sports from radical gender extremists.
But I don't care...because I'm running to represent the people, not the Establishment.
**[But if I'm going to win Tuesday's primary, we need to raise the resources to counter their massive $5 million smear campaign...and do it fast.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61244686:6epWx-VSN:m:1:3334294963:FCB9A02B3DA0CDEF385EC51E70563CC8:r)**
That's why I'm reaching out to you right now.
I'm calling on ALL grassroots conservatives to join Jim Jordan and Ted Cruz in supporting my campaign to **[send a _true_ fighter to Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61244686:6epWx-VSN:m:1:3334294963:FCB9A02B3DA0CDEF385EC51E70563CC8:r)**
**[Rush an emergency gift before my primary on Tuesday>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61244686:6epWx-VSN:m:1:3334294963:FCB9A02B3DA0CDEF385EC51E70563CC8:r)** | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61244686:6epWx-VSN:m:1:3334294963:FCB9A02B3DA0CDEF385EC51E70563CC8:r)

name: Michael Farris, ADF
subject: BREAKING: CVS fires Christian nurse practitioner
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9MTAwMjQzNzkifQ/CvgVrQG3-83e34o1O5N4_Q)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9MTAwMjQzNzkifQ/sfx9YK0kdTdsVgPrJPJG0w)
---
Fellow American, This nurse practitioner's story deserves to go viral. It's a devastating example of what will continue to happen if we don't draw the line for freedom. [**_That's why we're suing CVS_**** _._**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9MTAwMjQzNzkifQ/dBO7cKgixQEC_a46_kYk_Q) But I'm getting ahead of myself. Paige Casey is a young nurse practitioner. For years, she faithfully served her community, working as a nurse practitioner at a local CVS MinuteClinic in Virginia. When she was hired, she made her employer aware that her Catholic faith prevented her from prescribing or dispensing abortion-inducing drugs._ _ CVS accommodated her religious conviction for three-and-a-half years and didn't require her to administer any life-ending drugs. But then in 2022, they told Paige they would no longer allow her religious freedom. A few months later, **_she was fired-just two days after earning a performance-based raise._** **This is blatant religious discrimination, and according to Virginia law - it's illegal.**
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9MTAwMjQzNzkifQ/iAq7kbIfkVSDvShBPqsbpQ)
---
With the ongoing effects still felt from the pandemic, health care workers are needed now more than ever. Forcing them to choose between violating their faith or being fired **_hurts everyone. _** **_And it's downright un-American. _** Patients are best served by doctors, nurses, and other medical professionals who are free to act ethically and consistent with their beliefs. Despite having a spotless record, Paige is now _unemployed_ , simply because she stood for her faith. This unlawful discrimination cannot be allowed to stand. That's why Alliance Defending Freedom is filing a lawsuit against CVS on behalf of Paige. ADF is the world's largest legal organization committed to protecting religious freedom, free speech, marriage and family, parental rights, and the sanctity of life. We defend your most cherished liberties in Congress, state legislatures, and courtrooms across the country - all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court if necessary. [**But we need your help. Will you help us send a strong message to CVS by signing our petition below?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9MTAwMjQzNzkifQ/8h_QlNxl8517E_u2pex2mQ) **_We the People, CVS customers, will not stand by and watch attacks on the religious rights of all Americans. _**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMWg0ZDNxcWR6eT9zcmM9MTAwMjQzNzkifQ/84j2dQh9sn3VrwLKOiBaAg)
---
Thank you in advance.
---
Michael FarrisPresident and CEOAlliance Defending Freedom
---
15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260
All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMjU0LWI0YTA0MmQxZWJmNDRlNjNiMmZlNWI3MjY4MmU3NTkxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/dAobXHdLB7g0UaSsNKJPRw) to unsubscribe.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcbl9unvcl31ld78qcnuh2k19gkkt9gr98251vno_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkmor33cplcarj8s30c2p38ctnmmqmao3468qm1p75emqj1dpk64r79db4ehpr1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdi60tr0coqm5cr66uobapbi4no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoi2ga2psuta3u5rd84ncgpi34l2n36dmb1i4u08_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9a6ib4s3i59qkk4m9e26d15bqlkj45idqc0j0f0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmups5npl6iriq9mon3nca1eentg5g9uqcvndsg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z3nrlhfq29phki09a2ljdpone1idni9pgjev2ttg).

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsvvflqe1do2ppra242pbf4d3t5au4dhia2pk960_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6t9l61ijcsdl6kq70sr4s2omap3j6lij2o5jehhncd72cko67c5ncdrb2olic1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9p6cdj4mko6fchkcor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm4o74s1gm2o724no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8a6slskuts935maoq81l8jdh17kvbahipifh3eg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob1c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8k4u9i6h6p67iig5m6gakknfam2ojcjh4d8l8ag_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob1c3h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs2agpctp1e5tjnrs8gflat90jljisc8ubi46hmg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob1c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: It’s ready to ship to you
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zesmko3cnc0hl54rks9o9v2brtbguh4esl0pd470_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfacj4cph7csbjmtgeec5j62oe1phjeapb7c31eiq32t356jincpb3e3jjat1im1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr4c1rm0phlcapm8dtgmlin49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq79i9ion6gfiiltcu1hn053045rrmt8em38g0do_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvjb2r53ksopp5tmvq2f807tr5rk6ofhj83uouv8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6clh2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zue77vh3673tvftporv5s56b0doij3nnee5cjfjg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z58ci4gqurfjvfaspbeqk3n12m06mus4nnv77dp0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6clh2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zbg138h39cf1m4na7b704rh2blfcne2ga4m2qpc0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5k45tutj0t6e7grn0eh0jdbs8vgjik0lb15dtj0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob6clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk85lfr00ehfab2coer3ntthc260avkfe43uh9d0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij791lmkp79dhk6eojacpl6er7actl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onl69r68crks8om9pdme5hjeolimormbdtk69jb8or4clrbadtmmgrbacjgsdrmfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdi60tr2coqe5cr0cuobapbi4no)
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq6pt1m80acqq8r9au2t9rvbvv8m4t2cqr9m5kig_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs920mb5pl8n5p3r81sqdq199214204ejtudmbm8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c1h2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9j33o90el1t3ck1quh7vrfmdsdkijb56380gu38_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztv1tfqenfb88b03peess34u97gmkte5f5au253o_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: American Action News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg1sf10krva87mv5lju00o2vfrlvp966a51ltvio_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2obj69j3fd5lmlgr0sr1mmpn4pb5mcp36dtm6cq61pdje1gn2cbhm1qbeobnc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr4c1rm4phksapm4ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo91f64ur5v4rg7c8us1sm0fq1b9kes3k1hqsp00_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4inqndr3s1pq1pq75fvmhr2hst42co5f36nif5o_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkhaioa2e89lfmol72h2p4ej7gmg0p5e7lv5q65g_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie4oj6c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Polis Fails to Defend His Record...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
I'm out here on the Western Slope getting ready for the Club 20 Debate. Jared Polis won't be here. But you can still here my plans to unleash Colorado's potential.
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, I'm here in Grand Junction meeting with Colorado residents out on the Western Slope and preparing for what should have been my first debate with Jared Polis. **But, Polis is a no-show.** The Club 20 Debate is an event Polis has known about for months, but will not be attending because he has a "scheduling conflict." Since he will not be making the trip out here to speak to the people of western Colorado, I will present my plan on stage to unleash Colorado's potential. You can watch my speech live tonight at 6:15pm on the Club 20 Facebook (click here): [https://www.facebook.com/club20westslope](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-y/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-j/) **Polis must answer to his failed record & lack of transparency.** One of the **WORST** things Jared Polis has done during his tenure as governor was a $90 million political favor that came during the height of COVID. This favor coincided with Colorado recording the highest rate of nursing home deaths in the nation in the latter part of 2020.You may have NOT heard about it because the media refuses to pay it the attention it deserves - and Polis' friends in the legislature will NOT look into it. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-t/) In September of 2020, the Polis Administration paid a fledgling start-up company, Curative, $90 million for faulty COVID tests. The tests were given out primarily to nursing homes.The deal was a no-bid contract. Curative had virtually no data to support its new COVID testing. Polis heard about the company from a major Democratic campaign donor who had a financial stake in the fledgling company.Curative had no FDA approval for the type of testing the Colorado Department of Public Health and Environment (CDPHE) was recommending. The head of seven nursing homes sounded the alarm that these tests were bringing back "false positives," and on January 4th, 2021, the FDA issued a warning against using Curative tests. It took two weeks for the Polis' CDPHE to finally decide to stop using these tests.Jared Polis has never answered to the corruption of this deal, the millions of taxpayer dollars he wasted, or the lives that were risked.This is only one example of how Polis is wasting our hard earned tax dollars and making it more expensive and less safe. **There are just 59 days until the election. Head to our website[ ThePolisTax.com](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-i/) to learn more.** See you on the trail!Heidi [DONATE HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-d/) [Volunteer](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-h/) PS - I am having a great time talking to voters out on the Western Slope. [$10](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-k/) [$50](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-u/) [$100](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-n/) [Other](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-p/) [Volunteer](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-x/) Never miss a beat, follow me on social media! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-c/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-a/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-f/) | Heidi for Governor
PO Box 754
Fort Lupton, CO 80621 Paid for by Heidi for Governor. Registered agent: Sam Schafer. [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qjyuyid-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-z) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-qjyuyid-ttjjilthht-v/)
---

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6325%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V4n1%2f6AZPBCknevqMtXA2g&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75246%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kvNFwWMkNBTmS6jcp5gacA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75247%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RFNPth16XmykO8Xr7PWddA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75248%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aKmIcKulfyM0uFIxGzaLuw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6325%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V4n1%2f6AZPBCknevqMtXA2g&sysid=1)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: You make a difference
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWdrdvDhZN

Have you ever caught yourself wondering what heaven will be like?
Of course you have.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWdrdvDhZN

Hello
Friend,
Have you
ever caught yourself wondering what heaven will be like? Of
course you have.
As
Christians, we know someday we will leave this world and be
united with God in heaven, yet many of us know very little about
this place.
The
overwhelming responsibilities of this world - and there are many
- often eclipse our thoughts about the next one. Heaven seems
remote and irrelevant to our existence.
Yet we
all yearn for a better world, especially when we experience
disappointments: a bad report from the doctor, the betrayal of a
friend, the breakup of an intimate relationship, financial
hardship, or the death of a loved one. At those times we want to
believe - we have to believe - that there is a better place.
Over and
over in the Bible, God promises you that there is a better place
... that His people will live with Him forever in a place where
perfect righteousness dwells. Heaven is a real place.
Today, I
want to help elevate your thinking from earthbound concerns to
the hope of heaven and give you a tool to help the grieving,
discouraged, and hurting loved ones in your life.

It is my
joy to offer you my brand-new book, Encouragement from a Place
Called Heaven: Words of Hope About Your Eternal Home, as a
thank-you for your support of Pathway to Victory.

It's a
tremendous resource to help you, or a loved one, find joy and
hope in the promise of heaven.
Along
with the book, I will also send you "What 7 World Religions Teach
About Heaven." It's a comparison resource showing what Christians
believe about heaven compared to the beliefs of other major
religions: Judaism, Islam, Buddhism, Hinduism, Mormonism, and
Jehovah's Witness.
Your gift
to the ministry of Pathway to Victory can be made here:
https://ptv.org/donate/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift/
The more
we understand and set our minds on heaven, the more our
perspective of earth will change, impacting our lives and the
lives of those around us.
I pray
these two resources will bless you.

Dr.
Robert Jeffress
Senior
Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z586367pb9i4c100dk9vmoefh3ks5okf7of3i3dg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob4sth2bs)**
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgk30ajp7vcrsecqf54s42ac97f4duj1l0l6bdgo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob4sth2bs)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs0h9a7sfj791e06k9br341vnfn91gmjl4vtrhi8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob4sth2bs)**

I'd also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlehp80nvro93svhtdn3jbe6k9pi898uvf7700v0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob4sth2bs)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
---

name: Charlie Crist
subject: In remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | Friend, Today, we remember and reflect on the horrors of the terrorist attacks on September 11, 2001. Nearly 3,000 people lost their lives, and millions more suffered unimaginable pain, grief, and suffering. We will never forget the immense loss of that solemn day. I also want to take a moment to remember the brave individuals — from the first responders and medical providers, to the members of our armed services — who selflessly served our country at its time of great need. Their heroism exemplifies the virtues upon which our country was built. I hope you will join me in taking a quiet moment to reflect on the loss and sacrifice of this day, and share in my hope for a stronger future for our country. May God continue to bless America. — Charlie
---

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg, FL 33731
United States

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcfb0iir8lc4qve0aeefve18lcqmkktpnm056dp8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaoli65hj2d1gcmr6ctphceq6dcj1c9j67cbhmkq65dhmc3gm4c9kcgp66cjmcsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9p6cdj4mkq3fdr2coo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5qm1i2b3sj26qo52v8mo5u842rvu5ts2u9fv7e0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72cph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu0mhuktrs4g4737r975jbnjjp71ernfnk7f5ugg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72cph2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu2po6qppo9r0agodqadu4pa97j1jk3f4dom28q0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72cph2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0772%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fCs46ctk%2fB5Xk%2fyJVAHt0Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hYyMGdM0%2bfgeRuYJBle2cA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LBQ1gIZHNY9R5RVpkrZAXQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LBQ1gIZHNY9R5RVpkrZAXQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0772%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fCs46ctk%2fB5Xk%2fyJVAHt0Q&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0772%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fCs46ctk%2fB5Xk%2fyJVAHt0Q&sysid=1)

name: Rob Ortt
subject: Remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE
body:
Never forgotten 🇺🇸
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rbQ57jvhzPca9mzAFstOSVCmwRuELtsYWB3DXeCRmTjzmBMCA3PAMt2XekSTZD21gFhzQuW_IFFKDfF4tNyXdWFR2eIX9U7AdYMrv98HmAuWX6egWpNC5uQB9UtTKU9TwSjVrVztCxdAAZgroiV-sQ==&c=RuTo86jhszWxKK5r4SS4x8QYe_dw-JaLD3_wJ1mTt3gFGNnWiXXb6A==&ch=-tw1nLQCOCsD4keXq4qaqpN0HCzRSGogSs3Uz3rI8Ivxa--3N0pgeA==)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,
Our hearts are heavy today as we remember the thousands of lives lost in the September 11th terrorist attacks on our nation. Twenty-one years ago, New York experienced the most devastating loss seen in its history, rattling us and our neighbors across the country.
In the days following 9/11, our nation came together to remember and grieve the loss of so many loved ones. My heart goes out to the families directly impacted by that fateful day. For many, with each year that passes, it still feels like yesterday. The lives lost will never be forgotten.
Thousands answered the call to never again allow this kind of devastation on American soil by enlisting into the United State Military. I was one of them, and I will be forever proud to have served alongside so many strong men and women overseas. To this day, I am thankful for those that stand ready to defend our nation's borders.
As we feel the weight of loss twenty-one years later, I would ask for us to remember the way we come together as Americans, united in a common cause. The America that came out of 9/11 can accomplish any challenge and overcome any obstacle to achieve our highest dreams and possibilities.
God Bless,
---
|
---
| Senator Rob Ortt
---
|
---
| |
---
Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media:
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rbQ57jvhzPca9mzAFstOSVCmwRuELtsYWB3DXeCRmTjzmBMCA3PAMnajTUzxsa24joowPSrVqCzmBYsFcKMmqpULyv7oCcvcY2UcS1g2UqfR7y9yDgg8-aoG7nTZdfDx01VwkYorPaOozPTURUEiCcgNPj48lAQ2qS_h6gPTXpE=&c=RuTo86jhszWxKK5r4SS4x8QYe_dw-JaLD3_wJ1mTt3gFGNnWiXXb6A==&ch=-tw1nLQCOCsD4keXq4qaqpN0HCzRSGogSs3Uz3rI8Ivxa--3N0pgeA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rbQ57jvhzPca9mzAFstOSVCmwRuELtsYWB3DXeCRmTjzmBMCA3PAMuTYHsMBJdxnQfC9gi1rbR9w2CJRyDDCNB8fPtQc-7NiUVEAqswpVESOuTNYieXOHX0QgpgAE9P4H-mpbHk1nIUD_myEXsry8ST35Ax9LE-c&c=RuTo86jhszWxKK5r4SS4x8QYe_dw-JaLD3_wJ1mTt3gFGNnWiXXb6A==&ch=-tw1nLQCOCsD4keXq4qaqpN0HCzRSGogSs3Uz3rI8Ivxa--3N0pgeA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rbQ57jvhzPca9mzAFstOSVCmwRuELtsYWB3DXeCRmTjzmBMCA3PAMv9Bw6kpmHWpIfZjlgzxse0H_cw_CrAcoXYUCfdZJnU0frscAikW54pdK8ApSxwJJOiNWadQU4-d2C6XvawyOrJJGefXw2c0zY5C8IhFllZCF7EzznFQLyA=&c=RuTo86jhszWxKK5r4SS4x8QYe_dw-JaLD3_wJ1mTt3gFGNnWiXXb6A==&ch=-tw1nLQCOCsD4keXq4qaqpN0HCzRSGogSs3Uz3rI8Ivxa--3N0pgeA==)

body:

---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjc18qmq0r179prfjvboob8hirj7v6ffv4e4mrj8_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72c3h2bs)****[”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmd4brs0ec5ff0ek1tnojtanmdb94adpi91olbdg_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72c3h2bs)[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqqcrojf3kfsjbrvcs1d3fhf82nnuuc2ntptchjo_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72c3h2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z63lsjcvj8o2nmkgtpkcusp6sr80rguiu8c8j92g_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72c3h2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpm0dcg9cjmqapeaameesk83j9n26mui77ov107g_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ieao72c3h2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Math and logic
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj7dtmf174qphe0oijb8fpk6tuh7aho386u5rh8o_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie2o32clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq32d3jethrfc5gm5hrcsr1c9ge1c3i61p36p1j6hjm4c5mcpojfdhh6qqn6t37mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664ob6p30eti6cd30mdi3fc5lclp2bs)
| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zev8p78b4ej6fi08qcba81la4v5nvn86m669pt50_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie2o32clh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqh4j6bche8gf0l81mleu4q6cbob9iklq24cnp10_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie2o32clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z56td35sulh3kaiso1rqk18tt7eqqv7f30dk8ua0_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie2o32clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Mike's been everywhere. Inside the Pentagon. On Wall Street.
He's seen it all.
And 10 years ago, he explained to me how America's favorite investment is robbing our people blind.
I didn't want to believe it at first...
But once he showed me the evidence, I couldn't dispute it.
[I urge every American with retirement savings to watch this video.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmb75kueu0o1acdon8eln93cn9suj54p1r916ido_rp22sh2s8i66or2c3ie0ob1chh2bs)

Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50533897/366239559/-42398318?refcode=em20220911am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzFiZWM0MS1jOTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG9X9ipRoFFO6RKp1DBWHdew6qf1jy1wDodYDkTkitE=)

He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done.
But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs.
Thank you for everything you can do,
Jordan Franken
