Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. He is the most engaging, level-headed, smart, and practical person I’ve ever known. He is a remarkable man with an unbelievable ability to get things done. But at this stage of the campaign, Mike’s candidacy will be measured and scrutinized by how much campaign funds he can raise. Please help Iowa get a Senator the state needs. Thank you for everything you can do, Jordan Franken Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6940%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=nMO4n3xjGalLJPOWkUWC7Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c85857%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DGZUfkAIFO8sAK6rLgXmRw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. name: Kat Cammack
subject: In honor of those we lost…
body:
Twenty-one years ago, thousands of Americans lost their lives in a devastating attack that rocked the very foundations of our country.
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XOlRlH8nMMH4-sDCqo8v5sPfgb63ab6aNrIsWi-p0CSM4UwBY4e9_A6lMcJcktoUyC4U6K1WK83-U5QEp1zt6wLYz4N3FNv8KugmsuOr94Ptx3OgQiV1enuZHmyr2b0z9au3Ftepa_0rV_NUCwYhuZOxSUvz3BL&c=m-jxIKhbYeDK_Oi0LPq54uUJV3lNXHdVORJjz97tjrzqRTULCxfNtA==&ch=sYoonlw8ogct_G1eEpcis_-zbNdlVF-Uwp5Ky_cc7LynAU7GomTl-g==)
---
| Friend
Twenty-one years ago, thousands of Americans lost their lives in a devastating attack that rocked the very foundations of our country.
However, we didn't back down after their attacks, we became stronger as a nation. We picked ourselves up, mourned together, and ensured that this would never happen again. In remembrance of our unity, I want to honor every American who lost their life that day.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XOlRlH8nMMH4-sDCqo8v5sPfgb63ab6aNrIsWi-p0CSM4UwBY4e9_A6lMcJcktoUyC4U6K1WK83-U5QEp1zt6wLYz4N3FNv8KugmsuOr94Ptx3OgQiV1enuZHmyr2b0z9au3Ftepa_0rV_NUCwYhuZOxSUvz3BL&c=m-jxIKhbYeDK_Oi0LPq54uUJV3lNXHdVORJjz97tjrzqRTULCxfNtA==&ch=sYoonlw8ogct_G1eEpcis_-zbNdlVF-Uwp5Ky_cc7LynAU7GomTl-g==)
---
| Friend I hope you will take time and remember the first responders and the victims of terrorism from twenty-one years ago. Despite the grief we feel, we as Americans know that we must never forget the loss that we suffered on September 11th, 2001.
In memory of all those we lost,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016XOlRlH8nMMH4-sDCqo8v5sPfgb63ab6aNrIsWi-p0CSM4UwBY4e9_A6lMcJcktoUyC4U6K1WK83-U5QEp1zt6wLYz4N3FNv8KugmsuOr94Ptx3OgQiV1enuZHmyr2b0z9au3Ftepa_0rV_NUCwYhuZOxSUvz3BL&c=m-jxIKhbYeDK_Oi0LPq54uUJV3lNXHdVORJjz97tjrzqRTULCxfNtA==&ch=sYoonlw8ogct_G1eEpcis_-zbNdlVF-Uwp5Ky_cc7LynAU7GomTl-g==)
---
| Kat Cammack
---
|

name: Bob Casey
subject: Over two decades have passed, and we've never lost hope.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Today, on the September 11 National Day of Service and Remembrance, I hope you will join me in taking the day to honor those we lost by praying for their families and serving your community. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50535049/366243874/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODEwMGZhMC1kMTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtdaSWnBNk5pdjpUfd2MTqhqYniZj0ukpSsOJd6q5ZY=&emci=1e5562bf-be2f-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a8100fa0-d131-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Twenty-one years ago, our Nation faced the most deadly terror attack in its history. We lost our innocence that day, our sense of security, and so many of our family, friends, and neighbors. Yet we never lost hope.

In the aftermath of that terrible day, Americans showed courage in ways big and small. The heroes on Flight 93 likely saved the United States Capitol from destruction. First responders answered the call of duty in New York, Washington, and Shanksville, Pennsylvania. Good Samaritans put themselves in harm's way to help others. Men and women signed up to defend our nation abroad in our Armed Forces. Millions donated blood and helped shattered communities rebuild.

These acts of selflessness and bravery in the midst of unspeakable horror united us as a Nation and reflected the very best of the American spirit. We must continue to draw inspiration from them as we continue to lift up our communities and defend our freedoms, whether on the battlefield or at the ballot box.

Today, on the September 11 National Day of Service and Remembrance, I hope you will join me in taking the day to honor those we lost by praying for their families and serving your community. You can find an opportunity to get involved at **[www.911day.org.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50535050/366243875/308955477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODEwMGZhMC1kMTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtdaSWnBNk5pdjpUfd2MTqhqYniZj0ukpSsOJd6q5ZY=&emci=1e5562bf-be2f-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=a8100fa0-d131-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=8943725)**

Thank you,

Bob Casey

| PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: Today, on the September 11 National Day of Service and Remembrance, I hope you will join me in taking the day to honor those we lost by praying for their families and serving your community. Peter, Twenty-one years ago, our Nation faced the most deadly terror attack in its history. We lost our innocence that day, our sense of security, and so many of our family, friends, and neighbors. Yet we never lost hope. In the aftermath of that terrible day, Americans showed courage in ways big and small. The heroes on Flight 93 likely saved the United States Capitol from destruction. First responders answered the call of duty in New York, Washington, and Shanksville, Pennsylvania. Good Samaritans put themselves in harm's way to help others. Men and women signed up to defend our nation abroad in our Armed Forces. Millions donated blood and helped shattered communities rebuild. These acts of selflessness and bravery in the midst of unspeakable horror united us as a Nation and reflected the very best of the American spirit. We must continue to draw inspiration from them as we continue to lift up our communities and defend our freedoms, whether on the battlefield or at the ballot box. Today, on the September 11 National Day of Service and Remembrance, I hope you will join me in taking the day to honor those we lost by praying for their families and serving your community. You can find an opportunity to get involved at Thank you, Bob Casey | PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Today is a day of remembrance, folks.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Eric Lynn for Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP24/1/93680/images/lynn-email-logo.png]
Hi folks –

Today is a day of somber remembrance. Like many Americans, I remember exactly where I was 21 years ago on this day.

I was working in the U.S. Capitol as a legislative staffer, where we all evacuated as it was the target of the 4th plane. I owe my life and a debt of gratitude to those brave men and women who put the plane down in Pennsylvania. I visited the Pentagon crash site with a Congressional delegation the day after the attacks. I will never forget the destruction, loss of life, and that smell.

Like many Americans, the attacks of 9/11 were a call to action and public service for me. I redoubled my commitment to serve our nation’s National Security and later served the Secretary of Defense in the Pentagon, alongside many of the service men and women who protected our country during one of the darkest days in our history.

I dedicated my life to serving our country and protecting our national security – as a senior advisor on President Obama's campaign and as a senior advisor to three Secretaries of Defense.

I was immensely honored then, as I still am today, to contribute to making our country and our world a safer, more peaceful place.

During the attacks of 9/11, we saw leaders in every community – in the volunteers who stepped up to help their neighbors, in the young men and women who committed their lives to service, and in the unwavering support that we felt from the American people toward protecting this country.

As we remember the lives we lost 21 years ago, we are also reminded of the resilience and perseverance that can be found when we come together to support one another.

In remembrance,

Eric Lynn
Eric Lynn is a former Senior Advisor to President Obama, national security expert, small business owner, community advocate, and St. Petersburg Native who is ready to lead Pinellas County forward. Empathic, passionate, and pragmatic, Eric knows how to get the job done in Washington on day one.
Will you join Eric's team and support him for Congress?

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: The fabric of America cannot be easily torn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Twenty-one years ago, our country watched in horror as an act of terrorism took the lives of thousands of Americans. Today, we remember the victims and the brave service members and volunteers who rushed to save the lives of complete strangers. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50538161/366256774/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzQxZjhjZi1kNTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcKf_treC5BAqOKn_mCZeyev7O3TTKCNxhW7Lpl0tZo=&emci=cc1d1088-4330-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=5c41f8cf-d531-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=15529135) | Twenty-one years ago, our country watched in horror as an act of terrorism took the lives of thousands of Americans. Today, we remember the victims and the brave service members and volunteers who rushed to save the lives of complete strangers. What happened in the aftermath of the attack proved that the fabric of America cannot be easily torn. Americans came together to take care of each other, to provide for and protect each other. We saw our nation’s strength and resilience. We saw innumerable acts of heroism, compassion, and sacrifice on that day and every day in the two decades since. We saw the best of our nation in the darkest of times. That’s the America I’m proud to live in, and that’s the America I work for every day in Congress. Today, I hope you will take a moment to remember those we lost and the families who mourn them, and celebrate the survivors. I know I will. – Jahana
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6t9i97nohnhgqcap1vlhkne74vnase2vne4620o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6hp73dj0edp72sdnm4on7c9imcqjcodj6lpj6t7269qm8tjkeiombdlje9onfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdiefdj3coq61cr0cuobapbi4no)
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcpm43fcbjehi6njqvf7k4fl5e92ga6vhk5osokg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhgp09ntqtf4v2gm394ron2rburf0miqt8e6cocg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd8v9buekhhik5n9hcesm3lntpqm13cqon3ik9b0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The Senate remains a Toss-Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

We're less than 9 weeks away from Election Day, and every major political forecaster is calling the Georgia Senate race a "Toss-Up."

Earlier this week, _Politico_ issued updated rankings of the top Senate races in the nation and concluded much the same that _FiveThirtyEight_ , Crystal Ball, and Cook Political Reports have before them: **Georgia is anyone's race.**

Democrats have now spent more than $37 million on misleading attack ads against me, my family, and my business - yet polls remain a dead heat. **[That means we can win this race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250222:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)**

A victory in Georgia is going to have widespread implications for every single American - not just those of us who live in the Peach State.

So, if you want Kamala Harris to have the tie-breaking vote in the Senate for another two years, then pay no attention to this race. But if you're tired of the political gamesmanship in DC and our country going in the wrong direction, **[then I'm asking you to chip in what you can- $25, $35, $50, or even $100 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250222:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)**

We're on a collision course with Senator Raphael Warnock, and there can only be one winner. Peter, I've never liked losing, and I don't intend to start now.

Please help us move the needle - **[chip in what you can today to move this race from TOSS-UP to LEAN REPUBLICAN...with a huge VICTORY on Election Day!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250222:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250222:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)
With this race consistently rated a TOSS-UP, we've got to make sure we leave no stone left unturned and no vote left unaccounted for. **With more than 7,004,000 active voters in Georgia, the next two months are going to require a lot of resources to identify - and contact - every eligible voter to make our case.**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250222:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)

Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250222:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250223:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250224:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250225:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250226:6sRhR-VQN:m:1:3253819041:93E15E98983BFF0200D5A44CC275BD5F:r)

name: American Briefing
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z96ie1ve9fmholato2lbgrsjofcbt4b14qlm9av0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t33esojctbjcpr3eo5im8or8pj0mdpb4p1jc9o7bdbk6dqrdc5kmlp6at766doefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32c5jcjjrcor66hgb6p1nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6oj4s1j60oj5c8iv0)
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp46ae2c981h2m2h6btmd0r51gp6i6s8uqi5o5eo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmg4r2kb3n62duk947kd485im6ofi53kvvha91h8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm3690d4hg0ojksr2ngkh4qgtnnkipor19jvqm88_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg6co32clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: November collision course
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

We're less than 9 weeks away from Election Day, and every major political forecaster is calling the Georgia Senate race a "Toss-Up."

Earlier this week, _Politico_ issued updated rankings of the top Senate races in the nation and concluded much the same that _FiveThirtyEight_ , Crystal Ball, and Cook Political Reports have before them: **Georgia is anyone's race.**

Democrats have now spent more than $37 million on misleading attack ads against me, my family, and my business - yet polls remain a dead heat. **[That means we can win this race.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250517:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)**

A victory in Georgia is going to have widespread implications for every single American - not just those of us who live in the Peach State.

So, if you want Kamala Harris to have the tie-breaking vote in the Senate for another two years, then pay no attention to this race. But if you're tired of the political gamesmanship in DC and our country going in the wrong direction, **[then I'm asking you to chip in what you can- $25, $35, $50, or even $100 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250517:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)**

We're on a collision course with Senator Raphael Warnock, and there can only be one winner. Peter, I've never liked losing, and I don't intend to start now.

Please help us move the needle - **[chip in what you can today to move this race from TOSS-UP to LEAN REPUBLICAN...with a huge VICTORY on Election Day!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250517:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250517:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)
With this race consistently rated a TOSS-UP, we've got to make sure we leave no stone left unturned and no vote left unaccounted for. **With more than 7,004,000 active voters in Georgia, the next two months are going to require a lot of resources to identify - and contact - every eligible voter to make our case.**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250517:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)

Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250517:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250518:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250519:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250520:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250521:JVKkg-V-N:m:1:3317145305:33BAE01F03E4659502BB74367869D462:r)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4aa56ba6b656415aaa4cb2787b6da9ab&_e=VBoPlcx1U4HSIQ_y6HEtAozMMmH7OLfL3L3ZdK1o_1HLmW0UmwMXXqBwdb0CYahDg1Pve1APxzQrK0nISbRw1byrGhfoKSQiB0RAoCdae8NepuVxTM4sfyLpDh01YssuWAUO1RsQMWX_8bhN22TMMMEcx0-VWYNQ-djuLSEwNvxzmxJGDfk1_DdWzepZkgWY5BAEbrJ2FC1Wuo_49R8p3CXh1Mx98pYb4mhKVRxgBxeAWNVIiZC_c9lVBsR3JyFZCu_8ntPrPvosJTw18hiuIO6Ff-VMWCq7xNqVpSPAw4eSbAHSfbWbP-PKgRkVFmNojEh8c9LsGXABOfQCTj0GhC4IzCFL26hV_3Oy28zw0lKbiglWZoMvZmZKXsjKersqGy1yeUh36-y8rVZss8X8Fg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4aa56ba6b656415aaa4cb2787b6da9ab&_e=VBoPlcx1U4HSIQ_y6HEtAozMMmH7OLfL3L3ZdK1o_1HLmW0UmwMXXqBwdb0CYahDg1Pve1APxzQrK0nISbRw1byrGhfoKSQiB0RAoCdae8NepuVxTM4sfyLpDh01YssuWAUO1RsQMWX_8bhN22TMMMEcx0-VWYNQ-djuLSEwNvxzmxJGDfk1_DdWzepZkgWY5BAEbrJ2FC1Wuo_49R8p3CXh1Mx98pYb4mhKVRxgBxfSd7YYGMW58qgQRoFq78rx1Zw1WS-fPt39kqGfbSWEGzLMj6nrlIe-neR993LyqLjCqMyrZ2kJQM17axMTtb30rO-vOOutUWujk2FDOmyk54VkLoqNju7zWI-Qj94_Finx2u92Dbl5O9Q5LNpXQ_t7BPWgShhZrj6W9Kk4Lk3Fyg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4aa56ba6b656415aaa4cb2787b6da9ab&_e=VBoPlcx1U4HSIQ_y6HEtAozMMmH7OLfL3L3ZdK1o_1HLmW0UmwMXXqBwdb0CYahDg1Pve1APxzQrK0nISbRw1byrGhfoKSQiB0RAoCdae8NepuVxTM4sfyLpDh01YssuWAUO1RsQMWX_8bhN22TMMMEcx0-VWYNQ-djuLSEwNvxzmxJGDfk1_DdWzepZkgWY5BAEbrJ2FC1Wuo_49R8p3CXh1Mx98pYb4mhKVRxgBxfuMwVnxQDGHTiwVpqESShT87781MF5QHb_jKHuqn27xdndNBb5Pl0SZQE0rp8pJZJ4Cbp6lnI_6CLOM6Rd7cgDf023XFJqo8FlGpPzUbm4Qx3NOH5_Xg_vgzfO8ePXX8MCGJMSxy51b4Yii272oV84531Y6JBlVtd-58o3GdbYyw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6197c6d3436b44d3b4aee1ccc0e52e61&_e=91DYdOY1ofK0L09xzXCaQ6UwZutWTrSM6g4tgeUzqmPGD0g3D3XiLa3vqJ3nVhH9bV0Jm5Lb1RuXgWxiwiUMBq2ljA7qGJ1EwKGxZ3ahVJPOrVXW6REa1AXviocTQiNwH9j132VP0WjXZp8JabVmYHD5fTcZkVM4spMIncSFK-nj6ccOYxhY1jNglwjIyqO62eaSXfgRid4FjUR5gYUXTiqskwVZ3HdNFjBuNVtpCVHkLQ6zZg_ahkMPBIsGefM51zRLgjv8AvYahrYPRouybYoCjeUivjACFyYwDgkFbKD3vl6fJMYvOSj46x9UI7mWkWReyKPqX_TgUP12LOIS4QymoP_H-ZZNIgnOj7hlQbz1lWaSMqN0E_2tnXWkTrQIk5ALOEOt0xMuafoplNzbqQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A historic opportunity
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. >From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a86c6c61113f4f4eb1027c1f7b1aebe0&_e=aCjetHA81TJnMeTBOIK-uVPsIwzURDmQBhV_3Moj17VncAHKgXNVjeQt9irIbSuZBu8tth2RpwhoJGaPamuYJR1QNAVMR2HVIURTIz_395GdJlTyY5PIVqtD_3yarvJHvqVGW9uiAZU2cKrERslk4T694rwtuX1xkg59T_24Dj4reDp_u1akTk4dItBYEvyaC0Eo0JD81azO1WifqwsDCTUweSwXpsEPNBxkmZMumW0l2Jot7FZYyBfURvweChJBlnvbEBZPpTxEPVkfUPK9EI9fJHeBIIe8ALypRT9HUZjnalsfsH_RFVwwOIao6CEtZugVX6h9Q7oFG7rgpgAA8ZG3tmiYN1fLLpdDrpoQKb5ZhONCrnhBYauvR67WmBYt)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that's why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That's why we're asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don't wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a86c6c61113f4f4eb1027c1f7b1aebe0&_e=aCjetHA81TJnMeTBOIK-uVPsIwzURDmQBhV_3Moj17VncAHKgXNVjeQt9irIbSuZBu8tth2RpwhoJGaPamuYJR1QNAVMR2HVIURTIz_395GdJlTyY5PIVqtD_3yarvJHvqVGW9uiAZU2cKrERslk4T694rwtuX1xkg59T_24Dj4reDp_u1akTk4dItBYEvyaC0Eo0JD81azO1WifqwsDCTUweSwXpsEPNBxkmZMumW3btG9b7SXfhtG2TICFCFDSjm4hSR7ta1jzgUArM0CMdSl4RyJR32js5sNcDaHrCRqlJAL_VhxnTC83ovwQaJWyeQ8na4RlgJHOL3jZha7gD36cVNaIKNi1d27ak3GND7K5Raxy_Yr4m3GTUOGs-ETb)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Russian Attack On America's Power Grid Imminent
body:

It seems that U.S. utilities have found Ruski malware deep inside our power grid.

What does this mean?

It means we could be facing one of the biggest catastrophes in history.

Something that could push America into the dark ages.

name: Coach
subject: Solemn day of remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Let us honor the memory of those lost & pray for their loved ones.
| | | Peter,

21 years ago, America came under attack here at home on our own soil.

Hate-fueled radical Islamic terrorists inflicted almost unimaginable horror on our nation, determined to break our spirit and tear us down. Instead, they united us behind common purpose in a way we had not been in decades.

I will never forget the heroism we saw on display on that fateful day.

I will never forget the nearly 3,000 lives lost in New York City, at the Pentagon, and in Shanksville, Pennsylvania – including 412 brave and selfless first responders.

And I will never forget those injured, many of whom remain affected until this day.
---
---
Today, as we observe Patriot Day 2022 – a solemn day of remembrance – let us all renew our resolve to NEVER FORGET the tragic events of 9/11.

Let us honor of those lost and pray for solace for their loved ones, and let us stand united and remain vigilant to ensure that such an attack can never happen again.

\- Coach
---
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6ae71727a401501e/271955992f75737cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6ae71727a401501e/d3e2f3df5dc2150ac3d6b838967d376c/33013)| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/6ae71727a401501e/9dc2001b9fa3d5f0c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The Senate remains a Toss-Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

We're less than 9 weeks away from Election Day, and every major political forecaster is calling the Georgia Senate race a "Toss-Up."

Earlier this week, _Politico_ issued updated rankings of the top Senate races in the nation and concluded much the same that _FiveThirtyEight_ , Crystal Ball, and Cook Political Reports have before them: **Georgia is anyone's race.**

Democrats have now spent more than $37 million on misleading attack ads against me, my family, and my business - yet polls remain a dead heat. **[That means we can win this race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250213:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)**

A victory in Georgia is going to have widespread implications for every single American - not just those of us who live in the Peach State.

So, if you want Kamala Harris to have the tie-breaking vote in the Senate for another two years, then pay no attention to this race. But if you're tired of the political gamesmanship in DC and our country going in the wrong direction, **[then I'm asking you to chip in what you can- $25, $35, $50, or even $100 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250213:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)**

We're on a collision course with Senator Raphael Warnock, and there can only be one winner. Peter, I've never liked losing, and I don't intend to start now.

Please help us move the needle - **[chip in what you can today to move this race from TOSS-UP to LEAN REPUBLICAN...with a huge VICTORY on Election Day!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250213:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250213:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)
With this race consistently rated a TOSS-UP, we've got to make sure we leave no stone left unturned and no vote left unaccounted for. **With more than 7,004,000 active voters in Georgia, the next two months are going to require a lot of resources to identify - and contact - every eligible voter to make our case.**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250213:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)

Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250213:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250214:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250215:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250216:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250217:6tL6jKVNF:m:1:3331421248:655E9D26D8C72D8BE134C36E37DF4069:r)

Peter,

It's Jim Jordan with grave news.

In June, Democrats raised $64,000,000 online from over 4 million donors. In contrast, **Republicans only raised $26,000,000 online from just over 1 million donors.**

**Republicans even had 12% fewer donors in the second quarter than the first!**

Donor apathy has reached a crisis level and it's putting everything we've worked towards in peril.

I'm fighting for you every single day in Washington, and **[I need your support if we're going to save this country.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250303:JDSOg-VNB:m:1:3253819041:B7BF0B294C1D3A53E260DA55831DE1DC:r)**

Peter,

It's Jim Jordan with grave news.

In June, Democrats raised $64,000,000 online from over 4 million donors. In contrast, **Republicans only raised $26,000,000 online from just over 1 million donors.**

name: American Defense News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdsf8ivn5083vr3ouqk55khsqm52i45or3to7qmo_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg66or6clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij791lmkp79dhk6eojacpl6er7actl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjc5h66dj7cmq38dtn6arr5cpjelqncdlk6gpbeopimoqb2pdgs1q3acj3mepmeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4sj66arj6or7m9pmccdgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqq2jjc9f87ml2ajjnvbiecgmmvknopc0dicdaq0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg66or6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zik9677eqkhe947crg7gn3k5g8gnbklp44ps8vgg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg66or6clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr0gfid1pn4dc5514ij225p67u44ra9465soalq8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg66or6clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Mark Takano
subject: Peter, I will never forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter, today marks the 21st anniversary of 9/11.

On this day over two decades ago, we lost 2,977 lives to the worst domestic terrorist attack on American soil.

Today, I hope you will join me in remembrance of these civilians, service members, and their families who lost so much on this day, and in the fight for our nation that followed.

I will never forget where I was on that day, and the pain and loss of so many.

Now more than ever, it’s important to look back on this day as we face new challenges — _both internal and external_ — to our sacred democracy.

I remain committed to our country and our democracy. Through it all, I know we will come together and fight back against any adversary and obstacle.

Thank you,

Mark Takano
---

body:

name: Susie Lee
subject: Remembering the lives we lost 21 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Folks --
Our world changed on September 11, 2001. Today, I’m remembering the 2,996 Americans that died on that day 21 years ago.

They were mothers, fathers, friends, family, neighbors, spouses, and so much more to so many people. While 21 years may have passed since that horrific day, we’ve made a collective promise to never forget the souls we lost.

So, folks, take this as an invitation to hold your loved ones close and be grateful for the gift of life as we’re reminded today that neither is promised to us tomorrow. Wishing you a peaceful and observant day of remembrance.

Warmly,

Susie Lee

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: 9/11 Remembrance
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
# Remembering September 11, 2001
---
|
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
In the 21 years since the horrendous terrorist attacks on the World Trade Center, and over two decades of war, it seems we have forgotten that we are one country, united as Americans.

Yet, the opportunity to bring our country together again is not lost. Though we face great challenges, especially unprecedented division, we can overcome them if we remember that at our core, we are all Americans, all human beings with similar needs and desires, but also citizens of a nation of that have exhibited great strength and unity when tested.

The people who lost their lives on that tragic day, and the thousands of the service men and women killed or wounded in action afterwards, remain in our memories and shall not be forgotten.

Although that day exhibited the worst of humanity, it also brought out the best in us. Police, firefighters, paramedics and private citizens banded together, putting their lives at risk to help their fellow citizens.

Millions of Americans answered the call to serve in our Armed Forces, deploying to Iraq, Afghanistan, and other dangerous places, many paying the ultimate sacrifice.

Though the nation seems divided like never before, we can still come together like we did following 9/11, forgetting our differences, and recognizing that there is more that unites us than divides us. We must strive to recapture that lasting bond that lies just below the surface of our superficial differences.
I know we can heal this divisiveness; we have done it before and will do it again.
The enemies of truth, freedom and liberty hate us for our virtues and freedom. As long as we remain free, we will always be a target for those who hate a free people and wish to divide and enslave.
Although there will always be great threats to our Republic, we can come together again like we did in the aftermath of September 11, 2001 and remember the goodness, charity, and compassion that still exists in all of us. At the very core of who we are as Americans, is a spirit of strength, independence and unity that remains a beacon of hope worldwide.
In our solemn remembrance of this day, we must remind ourselves of America's greatness, never forgetting that there is so much good here worth protecting, and work tirelessly to preserve it for our future generations.
Today, let us remember those lost on September 11th and afterwards in the Global War on Terror. Let us pray for their families. And may God continue to bless America.
|

## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---

|

Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.

clean_body: | | | | | Remembering September 11, 2001 | | | | ---|--- | In the 21 years since the horrendous terrorist attacks on the World Trade Center, and over two decades of war, it seems we have forgotten that we are one country, united as Americans. Yet, the opportunity to bring our country together again is not lost. Though we face great challenges, especially unprecedented division, we can overcome them if we remember that at our core, we are all Americans, all human beings with similar needs and desires, but also citizens of a nation of that have exhibited great strength and unity when tested. The people who lost their lives on that tragic day, and the thousands of the service men and women killed or wounded in action afterwards, remain in our memories and shall not be forgotten. Although that day exhibited the worst of humanity, it also brought out the best in us. Police, firefighters, paramedics and private citizens banded together, putting their lives at risk to help their fellow citizens. Millions of Americans answered the call to serve in our Armed Forces, deploying to Iraq, Afghanistan, and other dangerous places, many paying the ultimate sacrifice. Though the nation seems divided like never before, we can still come together like we did following 9/11, forgetting our differences, and recognizing that there is more that unites us than divides us. We must strive to recapture that lasting bond that lies just below the surface of our superficial differences. I know we can heal this divisiveness; we have done it before and will do it again. The enemies of truth, freedom and liberty hate us for our virtues and freedom. As long as we remain free, we will always be a target for those who hate a free people and wish to divide and enslave. Although there will always be great threats to our Republic, we can come together again like we did in the aftermath of September 11, 2001 and remember the goodness, charity, and compassion that still exists in all of us. At the very core of who we are as Americans, is a spirit of strength, independence and unity that remains a beacon of hope worldwide. In our solemn remembrance of this day, we must remind ourselves of America's greatness, never forgetting that there is so much good here worth protecting, and work tirelessly to preserve it for our future generations. Today, let us remember those lost on September 11th and afterwards in the Global War on Terror. Let us pray for their families. And may God continue to bless America. | | | | | | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | About Aadland For Congress | | | Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. | Peter,

**I 'm writing in support of my friend, fellow veteran, and proven Republican leader for New York, ****LEE ZELDIN****, during his rescue mission to restore a great American state to GLORY!**

---
| In case you missed it, the tyrannical Governor who Lee is running to unseat - the corrupt, far-left, pro-criminal Andrew Cuomo 2.0, aka _Kathy Hochul_ - recently declared that Lee was no longer a New Yorker, because he disagrees with her radical policies. **Hochul demanded that Lee get on a bus and move to Florida.**

Lee is a lifelong New Yorker and he's not going anywhere! He's staying and fighting to save his state.

There are millions of other New Yorkers who feel the same way Lee does about stopping crime, defending freedom, growing New York's economy, and other priorities to save the state.

Are they no longer New Yorkers either? Is she calling on all of them to just get on a bus and leave the state as well?

Newsflash for Kathy Hochul:

**_New Yorkers are ALREADY coming here to the Sunshine State in droves - and it's because of terrible leadership like HER'S!_**

Folks are fleeing a place where politicians like Hochul attack the wallets, safety, freedom, and kids' education of the very people she is supposed to represent.

And they're headed to places like my home state of Florida - **the #1 state in the entire nation for economic freedom where we don 't give in to the Radical Left's narratives!**
New Yorkers have had no choice but to look to places where their money goes further, and where they can live life safer and freer.

_But Lee Zeldin is on a mission to change that._

Despite Hochul's demands, **Lee is not going anywhere.** He's standing his ground to fight for New York, FIRE Kathy Hochul, and Save New York before it's gone for good!
[**Will you join me today in supporting Lee 's rescue mission? He's going to need all of us** **to make this historic victory possible! >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61245262:6VPqNKVNY:m:1:3334294963:45E5F055380B2CD028534BF631CA13A9:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: How we solve the drought crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Hi ,
As you know, Gavin Newsom pushed through a historic set of bills just last month, getting California state regulators to agree on banning the sale of any new gasoline-powered cars by 2035.

Why? To reduce carbon emissions - all in the name of climate change.

I’m all for good clean emissions, but did you know that the **biggest tailpipe in California is forest fires?**

That’s right - if we solved the forest fire problem, our air quality would be significantly better and Gavin Newsom would no longer have anything to talk about when it comes to carbon emissions.

I explain this in depth below in our new docuseries episode: Drought and Fire.
---
| [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=2a41345adb&e=f9133ea432)
---
| [Watch it here. ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=9d764fe839&e=f9133ea432)

But instead of focusing on the source of the issue (forest fires), Gavin Newsom continues to rest the blame on us, and our vehicles.

Ultimately, the ban of new gas-powered cars will cause California to be even more expensive, while doing very little to solve the carbon emissions problem.

We have to solve the root issue of the problem.

[Please, take a few minutes if you haven’t yet and watch this video.](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=52afa0d84f&e=f9133ea432)

Thank you

\- Senator Brian Dahle
---
| |

---
|
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office,
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9hjqog32elijs5p1vbk7u2j1ru3ghbbracoscv8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9ob5e6orddr7cspb1c75m1jr9p5gsmpr9ppgepob9ptimlq3cclimlj7aptle1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr4sur60pjlcipm9ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm4p70c3gm8p724no)
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zprh7e2g2f244h2hte0l7vio2kf54mp05o1u36b0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjg61ob4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---

name: Josh Gottheimer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Friend,

Today is the 21st anniversary of the 9/11 terrorist attacks, a horrific day when nearly 3,000 Americans lost their lives, including more than 700 of our friends and family in New Jersey, and scores of our heroic first responders.

Since then, more than 2,000 others who were in and around the World Trade Center, including many first responders, have died from toxic 9/11 exposure.

September 11th brings up memories of tragedy and loss, but it also reminds us of the importance of American unity.

In the wake of 9/11, we came together as a country, determined to honor those who lost their lives and prevent anything like this from ever happening again. Regardless of party or region, we united to stand up for the greatest democracy in the world.

We must continue to honor those we lost by standing up to terror, putting American families and unity ahead of political divides, getting then backs of our veterans, active duty, and first responders, and working every day to protect our democracy — the greatest the world has ever seen.

I hope you will join me in taking a moment to remember the lives lost and commit to honoring their sacrifices and memories. God bless America.

Thank you,

Josh

---
|
---

* * *

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56ec8de442fc4642810004ee1594e117&_e=VJ-7ja8eyglQ5MSXcz-nQVkvdli57CMt-syOLxcr6dG_f95nePveaX85ibwltnfBERFIKjQcLX5CGh_9JbSJN5GDEmxWl8m2KDtuQlwiFePRsT6ALjSX9DzxeFi4Oe2CNocvRxSAkCBu6VQ1eBfsAMWpAqUPDMuYhGk73ntSoGCAcGZGehYMd7aZaHwe-EstCpyLMuPHzfGK1RyhvjjpETq3DKpblqEvE5vF_9hqjd53EnE09iM8GHg-5FDnAH8aAKylOcz5YdSqWQXAiaNZD5f8A8WNqBVGGpYCWLr7RcguNl86MK994BCTAcEXhm0L-nRGj4_GtF-9rwJzJgp64tQuKs1tQE2g9chBZPyDi3kJcwYjMDJgdrX3B3gLkdNU) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56ec8de442fc4642810004ee1594e117&_e=VJ-7ja8eyglQ5MSXcz-nQVkvdli57CMt-syOLxcr6dG_f95nePveaX85ibwltnfBERFIKjQcLX5CGh_9JbSJN5GDEmxWl8m2KDtuQlwiFePRsT6ALjSX9DzxeFi4Oe2CNocvRxSAkCBu6VQ1eBfsAMWpAqUPDMuYhGk73ntSoGCAcGZGehYMd7aZaHwe-EstCpyLMuPHzfGK1RyhvjjpETq3DKpblqEvE5vF_9hqjd7-hTJ3RVGmkeNj-AqznvR8BHKUKGDkgkPzchi6b8iUu97RNcZeBa_m1_ue9IgONyIohTXjK-7MMBuimUqUuqPZEfX573ihOlv71gbOEuFuZKYWDG2XPs88FSe6GVf2rstxli6vghm45WTZB0S5hZMR)** Thank you so much for your time. name: Dudley Brown
subject: Friend, this is HUGE
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
[](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01c59b3ecf04c26991840ac9388097b&_e=T6uGhvYBP-bH4fd08JWq2jw58QWpqaLZTmxIiBKZNvQ2Gaomo39YKNpuajkx2K9EsmoG0AnzCMJMK23SZOSSPuamTFDk_FdKdHKbruoEj-cyTsdJ1wDcVXsqBW9XsYzdmfrdIREZKmx7HeURycqzJg2HwCMaACL0LSSJriBl1g0lxRlRPnaXPfdCmcza70GrmMTqHGB6o0GfztvRhxtYUaS5V6gbBbpqRUJWmhSe7KjjiquYKNSljyNthY3iKx-fu_PBnp5sk8mNFZpGNZyfHu65h69nK43HFdY3Wl5cutQ%3D)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

_It 's time to end gun bans once and for all_!

For far too long the Second Amendment has been treated like a second-class right, with local politicians banning guns in states and cities across the country.

We're announcing that is all coming to an end.

_The National Association for Gun Rights is filing lawsuits in nearly half of the federal court circuits to eliminate unconstitutional gun bans everywhere_!

This nationwide legal blitz aims to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines for good.

But we need your help to pull it off.

**[Will you support our END ALL ASSAULT WEAPONS BANS lawsuit blitz with a generous, TAX-DEDUCTIBLE contribution today](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01c59b3ecf04c26991840ac9388097b&_e=T6uGhvYBP-bH4fd08JWq2jw58QWpqaLZTmxIiBKZNvQ2Gaomo39YKNpuajkx2K9EsmoG0AnzCMJMK23SZOSSPuamTFDk_FdKdHKbruoEj-cyTsdJ1wDcVXsqBW9XsYzdmfrdIREZKmx7HeURycqzJt0cNh0qvpDT_Wp1Sk4rxzV5rqTZbwcmskYizdR8r7v7tB92wss0_dKCFzMtzsAwkYEcNQ67bAV60jw7f1GvJbutuvI5ay3913yEz6jZjL5iF8RyBWRHkE6BQObsi2kiOSs8-My8vO-jSg-kShZgdTA%3D)?**

Fellow Patriot, the Supreme Court just handed us a 4-ton wrecking ball in their recent landmark ruling _New York State Rifle & Pistol Association v. Bruen_.

That ruling said that lower courts can't turn the Second Amendment into a meaningless right -- and that from now on they have to rule based on the text and historical context of the Second Amendment!

I can't overstate how huge of an opportunity this is for us.

Now it is up to gun owners like you and me to enforce this ruling by hauling every single California-style gun control law that's ever been wrongly upheld back to court.

_That 's why we're filing five new lawsuits - in addition to existing lawsuits we have in Colorado_.

Each of these carefully-crafted suits seeks to overturn a so-called "assault weapons" ban and magazine ban.

That's right.

_NAGR is enforcing that pro-gun _Bruen_ ruling nationwide_.

Here are the unconstitutional laws we're filing lawsuits against:
*****Massachusetts 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban**
We're seeking to overturn the same assault weapons ban signed into law in 2006 by then-Governor Mitt Romney, and the magazine ban. A win in the 1st Circuit will protect gun rights across the upper Northeast. *****Connecticut 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban**
In 2013, Connecticut lawmakers took their wrath out on law-abiding gun owners by expanding an already draconian gun ban to include over 100 more commonly owned guns, and magazines of over 10 rounds.

While previous liberal courts upheld the law, there is no way this law can withstand the precedent established in the _Bruen_ decision. Taking it down could restore freedom to the 2nd Circuit, including Vermont and New York. ***** Hawaii 's "assault pistol" ban and mag ban**
This gun ban is so sweeping it bans pistols with common attachments owned by millions of Americans, and bans magazines holding more than 10 rounds.

The California-heavy 9th Circuit doesn't have a gun-friendly history, but recent signals indicate that all could change. Winning here could put a stop to gun bans in California, Oregon, and Washington State too. *****Highland Park, Illinois ' "assault weapons" ban and mag ban**
Illinois municipal bureaucrats have long sought to punish law-abiding gun owners with a patchwork of local gun bans on top of already restrictive state gun control laws. Winning here could put an end to that practice across the entire 7th Circuit (Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana). *****Naperville, Illinois ' just-enacted AR-15 sale ban**
Perhaps the only thing more draconian than the gun ban in Highland Park is how local officials just a few weeks ago in Naperville, IL flipped the bird at over 100 local residents who showed up to protest a new ordinance that would ban the sale of AR-15s and put locally-owned gun shops out of business.

My exact words to our lawyers: _" Let's sue those scumbags too."_ ***** Colorado statewide mag ban and local gun bans**
And, as I mentioned before, we're already in court against Colorado's 2013 magazine ban and four local governments in and around Boulder County. **[Will you support our END ALL ASSAULT WEAPONS BANS lawsuit blitz with a generous, TAX-DEDUCTIBLE contribution today of $100, $75, $50, $25, or even $10 TODAY](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b01c59b3ecf04c26991840ac9388097b&_e=T6uGhvYBP-bH4fd08JWq2jw58QWpqaLZTmxIiBKZNvQ2Gaomo39YKNpuajkx2K9EsmoG0AnzCMJMK23SZOSSPuamTFDk_FdKdHKbruoEj-cyTsdJ1wDcVXsqBW9XsYzdmfrdIREZKmx7HeURycqzJiDp0JQPIeV6slTFsTvOluDWpYIEUWf-fkOKQHY7K5RAYI9mGB7hew5gWtTKuXfVhl1ClRG-QB0m8CbWqK0FYy-lFlOzn6Rw_pwBxrlexJoEYAtUFF1OLWKS5SaKS6idnliDjlBc6Wfh9HQm1QZsF4U%3D)?**

Fellow Patriot, I almost left out the best part... we are already WINNING!

Two separate district court judges - one appointed by Obama and one appointed by Biden - issued temporary restraining orders resulting in all FOUR local Colorado governments unable to enforce their unconstitutional gun bans.

Why?

Because in the words of these Democrat-appointed judges, we have a "substantial" or "strong likelihood of success on the merits."

BAM!

Even the Left is forced to admit that under _Bruen_ , the courts _actually have to follow the Second Amendment._

_We 're winning. This may be the BEST chance gun owners have had in a generation to reverse the damage that the left has done to us in deep-blue states and across the country_.

**That 's why we're taking our pro-gun lawsuits nationwide**

And that's why we're going after as many of these gun bans as we can that aren't already being challenged or re-challenged in court.

Fellow Patriot - these lawsuits have the potential to set precedent in _over half of the country, and even could make it all the way up to the Supreme Court too!_

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, It 's time to end gun bans once and for all! For far too long the Second Amendment has been treated like a second-class right, with local politicians banning guns in states and cities across the country. We're announcing that is all coming to an end. The National Association for Gun Rights is filing lawsuits in nearly half of the federal court circuits to eliminate unconstitutional gun bans everywhere! This nationwide legal blitz aims to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines for good. But we need your help to pull it off. ? Fellow Patriot, the Supreme Court just handed us a 4-ton wrecking ball in their recent landmark ruling New York State Rifle & Pistol Association v. Bruen. That ruling said that lower courts can't turn the Second Amendment into a meaningless right -- and that from now on they have to rule based on the text and historical context of the Second Amendment! I can't overstate how huge of an opportunity this is for us. Now it is up to gun owners like you and me to enforce this ruling by hauling every single California-style gun control law that's ever been wrongly upheld back to court. That 's why we're filing five new lawsuits - in addition to existing lawsuits we have in Colorado. Each of these carefully-crafted suits seeks to overturn a so-called "assault weapons" ban and magazine ban. That's right. NAGR is enforcing that pro-gun Bruen ruling nationwide. Here are the unconstitutional laws we're filing lawsuits against: ***Massachusetts 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban We're seeking to overturn the same assault weapons ban signed into law in 2006 by then-Governor Mitt Romney, and the magazine ban. A win in the 1st Circuit will protect gun rights across the upper Northeast. ***Connecticut 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban In 2013, Connecticut lawmakers took their wrath out on law-abiding gun owners by expanding an already draconian gun ban to include over 100 more commonly owned guns, and magazines of over 10 rounds. While previous liberal courts upheld the law, there is no way this law can withstand the precedent established in the Bruen decision. Taking it down could restore freedom to the 2nd Circuit, including Vermont and New York. *** Hawaii 's "assault pistol" ban and mag ban This gun ban is so sweeping it bans pistols with common attachments owned by millions of Americans, and bans magazines holding more than 10 rounds. The California-heavy 9th Circuit doesn't have a gun-friendly history, but recent signals indicate that all could change. Winning here could put a stop to gun bans in California, Oregon, and Washington State too. ***Highland Park, Illinois ' "assault weapons" ban and mag ban Illinois municipal bureaucrats have long sought to punish law-abiding gun owners with a patchwork of local gun bans on top of already restrictive state gun control laws. Winning here could put an end to that practice across the entire 7th Circuit (Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana). ***Naperville, Illinois ' just-enacted AR-15 sale ban Perhaps the only thing more draconian than the gun ban in Highland Park is how local officials just a few weeks ago in Naperville, IL flipped the bird at over 100 local residents who showed up to protest a new ordinance that would ban the sale of AR-15s and put locally-owned gun shops out of business. My exact words to our lawyers: " Let's sue those scumbags too." *** Colorado statewide mag ban and local gun bans And, as I mentioned before, we're already in court against Colorado's 2013 magazine ban and four local governments in and around Boulder County. ? Fellow Patriot, I almost left out the best part... we are already WINNING! Two separate district court judges - one appointed by Obama and one appointed by Biden - issued temporary restraining orders resulting in all FOUR local Colorado governments unable to enforce their unconstitutional gun bans. Why? Because in the words of these Democrat-appointed judges, we have a "substantial" or "strong likelihood of success on the merits." BAM! Even the Left is forced to admit that under Bruen , the courts actually have to follow the Second Amendment. We 're winning. This may be the BEST chance gun owners have had in a generation to reverse the damage that the left has done to us in deep-blue states and across the country. That 's why we're taking our pro-gun lawsuits nationwide And that's why we're going after as many of these gun bans as we can that aren't already being challenged or re-challenged in court. Fellow Patriot - these lawsuits have the potential to set precedent in over half of the country, and even could make it all the way up to the Supreme Court too! ? I hope you'll stand with us. After all, our enemies are backed by billionaires who have already dispatched some of the worst gun-banning attorneys in the nation on us to stop our suits in their tracks. Literally - the Everytown lawyers are already lining up in Colorado to take us down. But if I can count on your support, I know we can win. Fellow Patriot, we're suing everywhere for Second Amendment freedoms, and with your support we can put the gun grabbers everywhere on notice: If they try to ban guns or magazines, they're next. We'll see 'em in court. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Foundation for Gun Rights P.S. It 's time to end gun bans once and for all! We're on a nationwide blitz to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines. To that end, we just launched lawsuits in nearly half of the federal circuits to eliminate these unconstitutional gun bans! But we need your help to pull it off. ? name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: I will not stand silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-franken?refcode=220911 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-franken?refcode=220911]
Will you split a donation between Admiral Mike Franken's campaign and Seth Moulton today and do your part to flip Iowa from red to blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-franken?refcode=220911]
Friend,
Well, that didn’t take long. Less than an hour after I was declared the Democratic nominee for Senate in Iowa, the attacks from Chuck Grassley began:
*
“The
most
liberal
nominee
in
Iowa
Senate
history”
*
“Radical”
*
“Socialist”
Gotta love it! Chuck Grassley doesn’t know what to say about me. He’s never faced an opponent like me before. I’m his political nightmare, so he’s just throwing cow pies at the wall and hoping something sticks.
Calling me “radical” is laughable when Chuck Grassley supports a complete ban on abortion and letting literally anyone buy an AR-15 without even a background check.
But there’s one attack that I absolutely won’t take lying down, and that’s Chuck Grassley attacking me for serving our country for 36 years in the U.S. Navy.
Grassley is already trying to say that because I enlisted in the military at age 19, because my deployments meant that my family had to move from state-to-state and country-to-country... that I’m not an Iowan anymore.
Chuck Grassley wants to pretend that I wasn’t raised in rural, northwest Iowa. He ignores the enormous sacrifices that my family – my wife and my kids – made to allow me to serve in the Navy.
Grassley’s attacks denigrate every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, spend holidays away from each other, and be absent from life’s big events like weddings and the birth of a child.
And if Chuck Grassley thinks that I will stand silent while he says that every Iowan who puts on our country’s uniform stops being an Iowan... he’s delusional.
These are the kinds of attacks I’m going to be up against. Nasty stuff from Chuck Grassley, Mitch McConnell, and the Fox ‘Entertainment’ News propaganda network.
There’s one reason why: The GOP is scared. They’ve seen the polls, and they know that if we defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, Democrats are guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.
In order to fight back, we need to raise another $100,000 before midnight tomorrow, but the only way we’ll hit our goal and send Grassley packing is if grassroots donors like you give right now:
Please, can I count on you to split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and Seth Moulton – every dollar you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-franken?refcode=220911]
These attacks against me are ridiculous, but we cannot let them go unanswered.
Thank you for being a crucial part of this phase of our campaign,
Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-franken?refcode=220911]
VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c40e63d9ae44cca9dbb4d81478f7360&_e=wv9lFcsPv410KYgzrBQVZ3mGOdgAziuLNxFFlIoupLCcjtBgf45ptov75Gxie2zLsJKbFbFPRzGbTMGXoyTQVDSLydgmUz_rc9GVs7Pa8yGbGhhB3b8YUaugB6fPQXBXzwsWM9yxrqV13Z2u6nfPuDDAOTGl1pvqWspo5PCgBKCcYY4XHZgKR-EDeCXg7s5HOL3BX_9hv5klJW5L5DWsGFs9JefJZ6L0x0iZW7-Lw4SNY2UZMCi0UhBuN9nTKchZaXmMr5ETv4hllKulvM5SPfZOTqa4FpbZ64GQQgKZt9o8HyilINKKso_jq7VIZUnxLOsC2ylMWg3IlJkfHppBrUoHW0MjZA9WFCQt6BG3D4iPnHrru7NhSBwQV1rDDB3W)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That's why I'm sending you this email today. I'd like to hear how the Biden administration's energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c40e63d9ae44cca9dbb4d81478f7360&_e=wv9lFcsPv410KYgzrBQVZ3mGOdgAziuLNxFFlIoupLCcjtBgf45ptov75Gxie2zLsJKbFbFPRzGbTMGXoyTQVDSLydgmUz_rc9GVs7Pa8yGbGhhB3b8YUaugB6fPQXBXzwsWM9yxrqV13Z2u6nfPuDDAOTGl1pvqWspo5PCgBKCcYY4XHZgKR-EDeCXg7s5HOL3BX_9hv5klJW5L5DWsGFs9JefJZ6L0x0iZW7-Lw4SOEuo3LZHTBm6zJiVW-dYCdgSj2YH7e1tTI69jBGT-hLFCB2UYqpQqKE21HHujei06Fr0GR7hKqiDbRD8CXymGajgvRPkim_PuaHHVcV95iFPxErJw5W7cuxmJPHjgn4e5cFInw57iMvNyC1lJLejo)
