name: Mike Franken
subject: what it means to be a Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
Growing up in rural Iowa, I thought we were well-to-do because we had a piano, a well-used sewing machine, a big garden, and a flag pole. Our house was small, one bathroom, for a family of ten. I was surprised to know that not every family struggled with affording the $7 meal ticket each kid needed for school.
_If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/OYoh4K8P2E-So3oCvUK_YQ2?unsubscribedata=UBTZ8C6MF8p%2F%2B%2BtcbJO5mq%2FGH7h6mFFCvhAUTqInkLWpGmkTUgFMreEzq0jXNC7qDKKhq%2B8XTeNColrSJpL7YDyx8%2FuIGi60dKg2zn1oaJuJCyiiBH30XKjaUO%2BcQzNC4TI%2BAP3pAAmwDUIdQmSSSB5swpid1aFlQ9YbBO0TCtPJC0tMI9eO3c6LSs260lQiaR5Fccqf%2Fj2%2FPkEGQlYr4YUPPekBvONAJ31gI%2F9MfU5U1zijB4Z3WefnNetZGQ2US7b7%2B6LaK10zJuqxFsBhChCU4UYPUaS4cKAEg%2FtL6pmwOK8vKqtelDlLLOoqhDXWU0tBmQ2k%2BeBqoQJSzPdaCHd2zyOhGnzhWb5wkUk%2FAxhWh0u786srVDd5hkl2J0lqijnWmJqw7d83%2F4awkOoxj6dSQdwyEd0gfWyDLOanxfc%3D)._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50549694/366296858/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ0MzBjYS1lYTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l-je6fTamfQhi_jMF7MO8jBCrm6UMXD9uSjuTSv_geo=&emci=bc2a32af-8131-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc4430ca-ea31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50549696/366296859/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ0MzBjYS1lYTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l-je6fTamfQhi_jMF7MO8jBCrm6UMXD9uSjuTSv_geo=&emci=bc2a32af-8131-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=cc4430ca-ea31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Growing up in rural Iowa, I thought we were well-to-do because we had a piano, a well-used sewing machine, a big garden, and a flag pole. Our house was small, one bathroom, for a family of ten. I was surprised to know that not every family struggled with affording the $7 meal ticket each kid needed for school.
Lebanon, Iowa, had eight houses, a church, and a small feed store. My life centered on helping my dad, school, and exploring Dry Creek, a wonderland of aquatic life down the hill. The nearest town was Hudson, SD, nine miles west down a gravel road.
We were the prototypical rural Iowa family. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, lunch, then supper kept the house full of aromas. “Read a book,” would be mom’s terse direction if you showed any idleness. It is from this humble beginning, work as a welder, farmhand, then in a slaughterhouse, that brought me into the U.S. Navy.
America must present an opportunity for its citizens to achieve great things. From homemade clothes (I’m the littlest one) to a three-star Admiral is just one such journey. The next step is to use life’s experiences to continue a lifetime of service to this nation and my state of Iowa.
**I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa because I can represent people from all walks of life. My life’s experiences provided an innate understanding for what it means to be a Democrat:_to care as much for those I’ve never met as I do for those I know_. Obviously, Chuck Grassley is not a Democrat; he seems to only care about what Trump and his corporate PAC donors want.**
People like me aren’t supposed to be able to run and win. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising millions from corporate special interests to try to make sure I don’t.
If there’s one thing I’ve learned in life, though, it’s that anything is possible when a group of people work together to make it happen. I’m not taking one dime from corporate PACs; instead, I’m running my campaign entirely with support from over 139,000 grassroots donors like you.
[**So please, if you’re able to, will you consider making a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue? Senate control is on the line in my race, and whatever amount you can spare today would go a long way in protecting our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50549697/366296860/-42398318?refcode=em20220911mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ0MzBjYS1lYTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l-je6fTamfQhi_jMF7MO8jBCrm6UMXD9uSjuTSv_geo=)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: We will always remember their sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
On that awful morning in 2001, every American stopped in their tracks
| | |
---
Peter,

Today, our country commemorates the 21st anniversary of the worst terrorist attack in our nation's history.
On that awful morning in 2001, every American stopped in their tracks, stunned by the horrific news of attacks on the World Trade Center, the Pentagon, and Flight 93. We feared for the safety of our loved ones, our fellow Americans, and our country. It left an indelible scar on all of our hearts.
Every Sept. 11, we solemnly remember the tragedy that took nearly 3,000 lives. We will never forget – and we will continue to honor the brave first responders who paid the ultimate sacrifice to save others.
The memory of the lives we lost in the 9/11 terrorist attacks will never fade. Instead of giving into fear, we aspire to emulate courage and selflessness as demonstrated by the victims of that fateful day. In this way, their legacy lives on in us forever.
Let us stand united in remembrance.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: 21 years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Dear Derek,

Today marks the 21st anniversary of the September 11th terror attacks, one of the most solemn and horrific days in American history.

I think first of the families of the nearly 3,000 people who lost their lives on this day in 2001, all the first responders who demonstrated remarkable courage to rescue as many as they could, and the heroic passengers and crew of the flights–especially those of Flight 93 who selflessly acted to avert even greater tragedy.

I’ll never forget hearing the news about the World Trade Center, the Pentagon, and Flight 93 coming down near Shanksville, PA. We all felt sorrow and a sense of loss–but we also united and had a sense of purpose. A feeling of duty to serve. For my buddies and me, it was our Pearl Harbor and we answered that call. And for many who wore the uniform in the years after 9/11, the costs they and their families would bear were incalculable. Some gave their lives for the wars that would follow, and many who lived still bear the scars and burden of their sacrifices.

I hope that as we look back on the last twenty-one years and this day in particular, we honor the memories of the Americans we lost. That we do justice to their sacrifice by rededicating ourselves to this country and all her promises.

America is worth fighting for.

Very respectfully,

Chris

----------
[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

name: Dudley Brown
subject: Friend, this is HUGE
body:
For far too long the Second Amendment has been treated like a second-class right, with local politicians banning guns in states
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmov4ujv9a1dkrr512an4kjqee3j7jkd8qc6aklg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u8qm6d31c1p3coj4ckprcctm61oj1pljm1om8plnmpj38dtiehh6fcrlm5hr4c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjicopb9cr1cur62phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or3c9ie8oj0chi649fg)
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgr0ts9knlc1s68v1r9eo0hgtcbn8cohal72068g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji64o34chh2bs)

Dear Fellow Patriot,

_It 's time to end gun bans once and for all_!

For far too long the Second Amendment has been treated like a second-class right, with local politicians banning guns in states and cities across the country.

We're announcing that is all coming to an end.

_The National Association for Gun Rights is filing lawsuits in nearly half of the federal court circuits to eliminate unconstitutional gun bans everywhere_!

This nationwide legal blitz aims to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines for good.

But we need your help to pull it off.

**[Will you support our END ALL ASSAULT WEAPONS BANS lawsuit blitz with a generous, TAX-DEDUCTIBLE contribution today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvds5v6cr4t7d9lc0od1esdp8cp1jda9a379e9no_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji64o34chh2bs)?**

Fellow Patriot, the Supreme Court just handed us a 4-ton wrecking ball in their recent landmark ruling _New York State Rifle & Pistol Association v. Bruen_.

That ruling said that lower courts can't turn the Second Amendment into a meaningless right -- and that from now on they have to rule based on the text and historical context of the Second Amendment!

I can't overstate how huge of an opportunity this is for us.

Now it is up to gun owners like you and me to enforce this ruling by hauling every single California-style gun control law that's ever been wrongly upheld back to court.

_That 's why we're filing five new lawsuits - in addition to existing lawsuits we have in Colorado_.

Each of these carefully-crafted suits seeks to overturn a so-called "assault weapons" ban and magazine ban.

That's right.

_NAGR is enforcing that pro-gun _Bruen_ ruling nationwide_.

Here are the unconstitutional laws we're filing lawsuits against:
*****Massachusetts 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban**
We're seeking to overturn the same assault weapons ban signed into law in 2006 by then-Governor Mitt Romney, and the magazine ban. A win in the 1st Circuit will protect gun rights across the upper Northeast. *****Connecticut 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban**
In 2013, Connecticut lawmakers took their wrath out on law-abiding gun owners by expanding an already draconian gun ban to include over 100 more commonly owned guns, and magazines of over 10 rounds.

While previous liberal courts upheld the law, there is no way this law can withstand the precedent established in the _Bruen_ decision. Taking it down could restore freedom to the 2nd Circuit, including Vermont and New York. ***** Hawaii 's "assault pistol" ban and mag ban**
This gun ban is so sweeping it bans pistols with common attachments owned by millions of Americans, and bans magazines holding more than 10 rounds.

The California-heavy 9th Circuit doesn't have a gun-friendly history, but recent signals indicate that all could change. Winning here could put a stop to gun bans in California, Oregon, and Washington State too. *****Highland Park, Illinois ' "assault weapons" ban and mag ban**
Illinois municipal bureaucrats have long sought to punish law-abiding gun owners with a patchwork of local gun bans on top of already restrictive state gun control laws. Winning here could put an end to that practice across the entire 7th Circuit (Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana). *****Naperville, Illinois ' just-enacted AR-15 sale ban**
Perhaps the only thing more draconian than the gun ban in Highland Park is how local officials just a few weeks ago in Naperville, IL flipped the bird at over 100 local residents who showed up to protest a new ordinance that would ban the sale of AR-15s and put locally-owned gun shops out of business.

My exact words to our lawyers: _" Let's sue those scumbags too."_ ***** Colorado statewide mag ban and local gun bans**
And, as I mentioned before, we're already in court against Colorado's 2013 magazine ban and four local governments in and around Boulder County. **[Will you support our END ALL ASSAULT WEAPONS BANS lawsuit blitz with a generous, TAX-DEDUCTIBLE contribution today of $100, $75, $50, $25, or even $10 TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ko13i1vn39ec0lv1g7uv6iti1u15jemncsbq8g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji64o34chh2bs)?**

Fellow Patriot, I almost left out the best part... we are already WINNING!

Two separate district court judges - one appointed by Obama and one appointed by Biden - issued temporary restraining orders resulting in all FOUR local Colorado governments unable to enforce their unconstitutional gun bans.

Why?

Because in the words of these Democrat-appointed judges, we have a "substantial" or "strong likelihood of success on the merits."

BAM!

Even the Left is forced to admit that under _Bruen_ , the courts _actually have to follow the Second Amendment._

_We 're winning. This may be the BEST chance gun owners have had in a generation to reverse the damage that the left has done to us in deep-blue states and across the country_.

**That 's why we're taking our pro-gun lawsuits nationwide**

And that's why we're going after as many of these gun bans as we can that aren't already being challenged or re-challenged in court.

Fellow Patriot - these lawsuits have the potential to set precedent in _over half of the country, and even could make it all the way up to the Supreme Court too!_

**[Can I count on you to stand with us to help END ALL ASSAULT WEAPONS BANS by making your most generous contribution of $100, $75, $50, $25, or even $10 to support our lawsuits TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5d8s4dte6ucmapmpahurs35rrgbu62i13n76cd0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji64o34chh2bs)?**

I hope you'll stand with us.

After all, our enemies are backed by billionaires who have already dispatched some of the worst gun-banning attorneys in the nation on us to stop our suits in their tracks.

Literally - the Everytown lawyers are already lining up in Colorado to take us down.

But if I can count on your support, I know we can win.

Fellow Patriot, we're suing everywhere for Second Amendment freedoms, and with your support we can put the gun grabbers everywhere on notice:

If they try to ban guns or magazines, they're next. We'll see 'em in court.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Foundation for Gun Rights**

P.S. _It 's time to end gun bans once and for all_!

We're on a nationwide blitz to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines.

_To that end, we just launched lawsuits in nearly half of the federal circuits to eliminate these unconstitutional gun bans_!

But we need your help to pull it off.

**[Will you support our END ALL ASSAULT WEAPONS BANS lawsuit blitz with a generous, TAX-DEDUCTIBLE contribution today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvkvpm893e4odh0vn10jc3k1be39cvbajlat4v70_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji64o34chh2bs)?**

clean_body: For far too long the Second Amendment has been treated like a second-class right, with local politicians banning guns in states | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, It 's time to end gun bans once and for all! For far too long the Second Amendment has been treated like a second-class right, with local politicians banning guns in states and cities across the country. We're announcing that is all coming to an end. The National Association for Gun Rights is filing lawsuits in nearly half of the federal court circuits to eliminate unconstitutional gun bans everywhere! This nationwide legal blitz aims to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines for good. But we need your help to pull it off. ? Fellow Patriot, the Supreme Court just handed us a 4-ton wrecking ball in their recent landmark ruling New York State Rifle & Pistol Association v. Bruen. That ruling said that lower courts can't turn the Second Amendment into a meaningless right -- and that from now on they have to rule based on the text and historical context of the Second Amendment! I can't overstate how huge of an opportunity this is for us. Now it is up to gun owners like you and me to enforce this ruling by hauling every single California-style gun control law that's ever been wrongly upheld back to court. That 's why we're filing five new lawsuits - in addition to existing lawsuits we have in Colorado. Each of these carefully-crafted suits seeks to overturn a so-called "assault weapons" ban and magazine ban. That's right. NAGR is enforcing that pro-gun Bruen ruling nationwide. Here are the unconstitutional laws we're filing lawsuits against: ***Massachusetts 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban We're seeking to overturn the same assault weapons ban signed into law in 2006 by then-Governor Mitt Romney, and the magazine ban. A win in the 1st Circuit will protect gun rights across the upper Northeast. ***Connecticut 's "assault weapons" ban and mag ban In 2013, Connecticut lawmakers took their wrath out on law-abiding gun owners by expanding an already draconian gun ban to include over 100 more commonly owned guns, and magazines of over 10 rounds. While previous liberal courts upheld the law, there is no way this law can withstand the precedent established in the Bruen decision. Taking it down could restore freedom to the 2nd Circuit, including Vermont and New York. *** Hawaii 's "assault pistol" ban and mag ban This gun ban is so sweeping it bans pistols with common attachments owned by millions of Americans, and bans magazines holding more than 10 rounds. The California-heavy 9th Circuit doesn't have a gun-friendly history, but recent signals indicate that all could change. Winning here could put a stop to gun bans in California, Oregon, and Washington State too. ***Highland Park, Illinois ' "assault weapons" ban and mag ban Illinois municipal bureaucrats have long sought to punish law-abiding gun owners with a patchwork of local gun bans on top of already restrictive state gun control laws. Winning here could put an end to that practice across the entire 7th Circuit (Illinois, Wisconsin, and Indiana). ***Naperville, Illinois ' just-enacted AR-15 sale ban Perhaps the only thing more draconian than the gun ban in Highland Park is how local officials just a few weeks ago in Naperville, IL flipped the bird at over 100 local residents who showed up to protest a new ordinance that would ban the sale of AR-15s and put locally-owned gun shops out of business. My exact words to our lawyers: " Let's sue those scumbags too." *** Colorado statewide mag ban and local gun bans And, as I mentioned before, we're already in court against Colorado's 2013 magazine ban and four local governments in and around Boulder County. ? Fellow Patriot, I almost left out the best part... we are already WINNING! Two separate district court judges - one appointed by Obama and one appointed by Biden - issued temporary restraining orders resulting in all FOUR local Colorado governments unable to enforce their unconstitutional gun bans. Why? Because in the words of these Democrat-appointed judges, we have a "substantial" or "strong likelihood of success on the merits." BAM! Even the Left is forced to admit that under Bruen , the courts actually have to follow the Second Amendment. We 're winning. This may be the BEST chance gun owners have had in a generation to reverse the damage that the left has done to us in deep-blue states and across the country. That 's why we're taking our pro-gun lawsuits nationwide And that's why we're going after as many of these gun bans as we can that aren't already being challenged or re-challenged in court. Fellow Patriot - these lawsuits have the potential to set precedent in over half of the country, and even could make it all the way up to the Supreme Court too! ? I hope you'll stand with us. After all, our enemies are backed by billionaires who have already dispatched some of the worst gun-banning attorneys in the nation on us to stop our suits in their tracks. Literally - the Everytown lawyers are already lining up in Colorado to take us down. But if I can count on your support, I know we can win. Fellow Patriot, we're suing everywhere for Second Amendment freedoms, and with your support we can put the gun grabbers everywhere on notice: If they try to ban guns or magazines, they're next. We'll see 'em in court. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Foundation for Gun Rights P.S. It 's time to end gun bans once and for all! We're on a nationwide blitz to take out every single ban on semi-automatic weapons and standard capacity magazines. To that end, we just launched lawsuits in nearly half of the federal circuits to eliminate these unconstitutional gun bans! But we need your help to pull it off. ? name: Dr. Kermit Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
For seven months we flew casualty evacuation missions in Al Anbar Province... | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50550696/366302359/471732490?refcode=fl_email_na_20220911September11_dkj_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGJkYmE5MC1lZTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQNYi6-KeE8bK2Jye6t1Wuxu3HYZU_hUPos3ttaFDLM=)
---
Friend, I was at Duke studying medicine and law during the 9/11 attacks. I told myself that the best way to help my country was to finish school and start treating patients. But a year later, I picked up the newspaper and on the front-page was a man in uniform resuscitating an Iraqi child. The paper said it was a Marine doctor. I called my local recruiters office and asked to join. He said the paper had messed up — the Marines didn’t have doctors; that was a Navy doctor deployed with the Marines. I told him I didn’t care what branch I served in, I just needed to help. I finished my final year of medical training and was deployed to a base in Iraq that was a ten-minute flight from Ramadi. Just like the man in the newspaper picture, I was a Navy doctor assigned to a Marine squadron. My team were the famous Purple Foxes. For seven months we flew casualty evacuation missions in Al Anbar Province, picking up civilians and servicemembers in critical condition from combat zones and bringing them back to the safety of base for medical attention. The veterans I served with in Iraq were the most honorable, hard working people I’ve met. When the brass bell on base started ringing (our signal to prepare for a mission), the Purple Foxes took that responsibility seriously. They knew we had Americans and Iraqis anxiously waiting for the sound of our chopper that meant help had arrived. Many of the Purple Foxes signed up to serve, like I did, because of the events of 9/11. Today, and every day, I thank them for answering the call to serve, and for the sacrifices they made for our country and our families. And to those who gave the ultimate sacrifice and their gold star families: we will never forget. — Dr. Kermit Jones
Former LT, USN

---
| Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running to flip California's 3rd Congressional District.

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Many of us recall exactly where we were or exactly what we were doing when the twin towers fell twenty-one years ago today, on September 11, 2001. That feeling of pain, shock, and loss is not something you can ever forget.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50550702/366302510/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGMzNmNiMi1lZTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H5idZQTJs4oG2A-_D73XEACjuc3U4b06NHRnGakjCA4=&emci=1d897ac7-5230-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d4c36cb2-ee31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)
Peter,

Many of us recall exactly where we were or exactly what we were doing when the twin towers fell twenty-one years ago today, on September 11, 2001.

That feeling of pain, shock, and loss is not something you can ever forget.

But, in the face of this unimaginable pain, Americans came together in support of one another.

In New York City, brave firefighters, police officers, EMTs, doctors, and first responders risked their own lives to save the lives of others. Elsewhere across the country, communities united to lean on one another through seemingly insurmountable pain and fear. So, while I’ll always remember the sense of grief, I’ll never forget the patriotism and resilience displayed across America.

Today, as we commemorate the anniversary of these horrific attacks, I hope you’ll honor the bravery and heroism of first responders and men and women in uniform across the country – some of whom made the ultimate sacrifice 21 years ago today. We are forever indebted to their service.

In remembrance,

Emilia

---

| Emilia Sykes is running to represent Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50550703/366302511/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGMzNmNiMi1lZTMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H5idZQTJs4oG2A-_D73XEACjuc3U4b06NHRnGakjCA4=&emci=1d897ac7-5230-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=d4c36cb2-ee31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: 9/11/01: Never Forget.
body:
On this day 21 years ago, our country changed forever.
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zg8Fnpl_gAD5euxoYihkNlmBRKw9XvKLFjTTNcKtWHC-9GzAbLJKPh2WM_kdrk_ssNhexSrAMiHxoZ42tyq6jSYmYIe7LJQSaYa67Hd1ZqNSlyxEFCBEAGbIzACukrRjyUnX5Evj_m0gTR35OmljeeUM-tntD5b&c=HykVuJwRmJPQv4tzOCShvVJ_61MZITZB70saVGulHrSXV5wSQVujSg==&ch=7RhvmgdIe5sWZhvNxXM7kpYyQtRQlKzrsE7Ky8MRUg1w76RXZsIp_A==)

| Peter,
On this day 21 years ago, our country changed forever.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015zg8Fnpl_gAD5euxoYihkNlmBRKw9XvKLFjTTNcKtWHC-9GzAbLJKPh2WM_kdrk_ssNhexSrAMiHxoZ42tyq6jSYmYIe7LJQSaYa67Hd1ZqNSlyxEFCBEAGbIzACukrRjyUnX5Evj_m0gTR35OmljeeUM-tntD5b&c=HykVuJwRmJPQv4tzOCShvVJ_61MZITZB70saVGulHrSXV5wSQVujSg==&ch=7RhvmgdIe5sWZhvNxXM7kpYyQtRQlKzrsE7Ky8MRUg1w76RXZsIp_A==)
---
| Many of us remember exactly where we were the day that senseless act of terror took thousands of innocent American lives.
It sent shockwaves across the country. It left ground zero shrouded in chaos and carnage.
But even in spite of this unspeakable tragedy, the United States of America emerged stronger and more united after the horrific attacks.
Let us never forget what took place on September 11, 2001 - and let us especially remember the sacrifice, bravery, and courage of our first responders on that fateful day.
God Bless America, Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---
|

body:
| **DESPITE** GOP crony Chuck Grassley brutally attacking Democrat Mike Franken in a new MAGA-funded smear campaign...

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Honoring the heroes of 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
On September 11, 2001, our country changed forever. Read more >>
| | | Peter, Those of us who are old enough to remember September 11, 2001, know exactly where we were and what we were doing when we first heard our country was under attack.
---
---
We felt anger and grief as we watched the horrific scenes on television. We remember the courage of the firemen, policemen, and other first responders who rushed in to help, in some cases sacrificing their own lives. We also remember how united we all were as Americans on that day. People were eager to support their neighbors and friends in a way we haven’t seen before or since. And, in the aftermath of the attacks, an entire generation of young men and women volunteered to defend our great nation – and they deserve our undying gratitude. We must never forget September 11, 2001. Please join us in taking a moment to remember the victims and honor the heroes of that fateful day. Sincerely,
Kevin Hern
---
id:2022-09-07-12:31:08:225t
---

body:
21 years ago today, everything stopped.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50551007/366303945/-1502561798?refcode=EM_FR_220911Remembrance_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjE1OWFlYy1mMDMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DSw0RIzm2c5vvp_hliU1ca8tGIGjbAa4FoweqPIdOew=&emci=4ef29239-df31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=62159aec-f031-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=23746811) Peter,

On the anniversary of September 11th, we remember the nearly 3,000 lives lost and the families and friends left behind.

Twenty-one years ago today, it seemed as if the world had come crashing down, and for those who lost their family members and loved ones, it did. But from this horrible tragedy, the United States emerged stronger and more resilient.

The firefighters, paramedics, and police officers who put their lives on the line to rescue people trapped underneath the rubble demonstrated our collective resolve. Those in uniform who made the ultimate sacrifice to protect Americans at home and abroad made it clear that the United States will never stand for such terror.

Two decades later, we still feel pain and grief for our nation and those no longer with us. We also feel the courage and determination that these attacks stirred deep inside, knowing we would never forget those we had lost.

In solemn remembrance,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**
---

Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
Shontel Brown for Congress
PO Box 221232
Beachwood, OH 44122
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/SB_jCLuMXEGKMEGQua2C0A2?unsubscribedata=6ijblP9bJ9sC2%2Fnf6ohcfOKgbygkxB%2FqUCPnFcVNv6gAIjfLcCG4sITj0WQZ994%2Bqtf6LvKoTKBNZnyAqwO7WTjl%2BFyM0VUCw55%2FtTPsGcPrwbep7iB5d3FR1ZHX2kTlsPVl%2BcPO9G9E7cPeDCXkexsJwRjvGgg9xUA9ZP402xbWVqbzoRwmxs%2B6Uy7mCUock9EB0oAVpfH%2Ff0EKUnRvnTwgcezSIIma69TtKsRYqaqMGwcLJ%2BeG%2FwR0SloD3sdGCTvLrGCBSgWyk4MWpeAOg0N7UOffJrOXW7PlHxMd%2BnCu9smEXU9tubXYMYnYeLb2GT%2Bus02gvyEK0VJb8Wvofcno9lBGnkL5UnuI0mA00UhYr9YA0F%2Baq88TVBpqPmjXaXkmRWKexmvRItB5U8%2FTQzoVzeuhrSlzwTnMLHkn8gOcSq4Fd%2Fxwof9fhM2BGlRZ).

name: Hung Cao
subject: 21 years ago...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
Twenty one years ago, America was changed forever.

Peter,

Twenty one years ago, America was changed forever.

The illusion of peace we lived under was shattered.

But with the help of our first responders, service members, and brave
citizens, America came out stronger on the other side.

As a U.S. Navy Veteran, 9/11 reminds me of why I joined the service. It was
my duty to protect our great country from harm - and to defeat the enemy when
harm comes our way.

My heart goes out to every American who lost a loved one 21 years ago today,
as well as the first responders and service members who lost their lives in the
aftermath making sure that an event like this never happens again.

Today especially, I am grateful to be an American. God bless this great
country forever and ever.

In Liberty,

Hung Cao

But with the help of our first responders, service members, and brave citizens, America came out stronger on the other side. As a U.S. Navy Veteran, 9/11 reminds me of why I joined the service. It was my duty to protect our great country from harm - and to defeat the enemy when harm comes our way. My heart goes out to every American who lost a loved one 21 years ago today, as well as the first responders and service members who lost their lives in the aftermath making sure that an event like this never happens again. Today especially, I am grateful to be an American. God bless this great country forever and ever. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Finding strength from tragedy is the essence of the American spirit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Today marks the 21st anniversary of the September 11th attacks.
Peter,

Today marks the 21st anniversary of the September 11th attacks that devastated not only our nation but the world.

The implications of 9/11 have become embedded within the collective consciousness of all Americans and will forever remain a heartbreaking stain on the fabric of our society. When I think back on September 11th, I am reminded of tragedy and the lives that were lost, and the many survivors who still experience the mental and physical repercussions of that fateful day.

**But ****Peter****, I also remember the bravery that followed in the face of such unfathomable and immense loss. The perseverance of the American spirit was on full display. And from this, we should all draw hope.**

While the flames were still burning, nurses, EMTs, firefighters, and countless others ran toward the fire to save their fellow countrymen. Elected officials from both sides of the aisle came together to secure the resources necessary for recovery efforts.

In the wake of the 21st anniversary of 9/11, we must remind ourselves of how our country came together - despite our differences - to rebuild. And as we work toward building a better tomorrow, I hope we can work together again to build a stronger democracy - one that works for all of us.

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

clean_body: You're invited to the RNC Patriot Society | Our Party is nothing without Patriots from around the Country... We're excited to offer this special invitation to you, Friend. Our Party is nothing without Patriots from around the Country that support our efforts year-round. Without supporters like YOU, we wouldn't be able to protect our American FREEDOM and liberty from the far-Left Democrat Party. For Patriots as dedicated as yourself, we want to give you the opportunity to be one of the FIRST to join the Official 2022 RNC Patriot Society. This offer is ONLY for our most committed supporters who we can call upon to help our efforts in securing OUR MAJORITY. Our team is reviewing the roster shortly. If you decline to accept the invitation, you may never get this chance again. Aren't you a true American Patriot? Thank you, GOP Correspondence | Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st Street SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Note from Tom: the morning of September 11th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=62VXXM9HAynvICnEnzkZeulw3cG7KH4i6UrrXUCM8JxvQMxLoeZ85oaqtPbj6oFdyJgcVxGhwIkdCz8aOzzo3L6axDCIm6PHnDFlNS4JNz4RlEchyMb4JfpmB%2FEQQKzfzoBsRK0HvqRIFky9JTj%2Fq6icBoqfTcUg1RMazTZQzQBIA4jTqZF2YbGgpwvIn5%2Bon1jYqWD943ANO6LABFa9v6EuVHcNMfJcXvBCSN1Wxa1NbUbq6KFm8D%2FD1%2F89d3n4A0GNLOgTNV2fx5fGtYKebPVUwgVRizCW0u8nibYZ4ackFbXF5PA9YeGVdUFCpjDJLKYh3CX5C6eMkcfrved6vWUeZKPL4A1IiWoyzR6ocBs8x3BCP5%2BJonDzpDr%2FncDjBAI2AI7eVwhKDNPl%2FChn3gmTBb2nipFJHSkzSqOQuvASYI%2B3%2BFrotsVzYArBCnwj)
---
| | Early on the morning of September 11th, 2001, I was rushing to a routine meeting in the State Department cafeteria, when I noticed a group gathered around a TV mounted on the wall. It seemed there had a been a terrible accident at the World Trade Center, and then we saw the second plane hit, heard from friends at the Pentagon, and understood we had to evacuate. I remember walking for miles through the city streets, picking up my daughter at school, and trying to find the words to explain what had happened and why.

We all remember the days that followed. How they filled us with anxiety. How they revealed our character. Our leaders told us we were at war, but not with a religion, not with a people, but with a particularly evil idea rejected by good people everywhere.
Of the 750 New Jerseyans who died on 9/11, 186 lived in the six counties I represent in Congress. Today, I’m thinking of Sally Cohen-Alameno (pictured above) and her husband Andy, who was one of twelve Westfield residents who never came home from work. In a tribute to him, Sally wrote: “Andy was one of the good guys. The really good guys.”

Today, we should also be thinking about what we owe to the friends we lost on 9/11, and to the heroes who gave everything to save many more.

An obvious answer is that we should take care of the families who still miss their fallen loved ones, and the first responders who still feel the effects of their sacrifice that day.

One of the most important votes I’ve cast as a member of Congress was to permanently renew the 9/11 Victims Compensation fund so it would be there for the firefighters and police officers and emergency workers who need it for the rest of their lives. This year, we also passed the PACT Act, to help our military veterans exposed to toxic substances, including in the wars in Afghanistan and Iraq. In so doing, we paid a debt to 9/11’s second responders — the men and women who went overseas to ensure there would be no more attacks on our homeland.

But I believe we owe something even more fundamental we owe to the memory of 9/11 — to be the country we were in the days after the attack.

It didn’t matter so much then if we were Democrats or Republicans. There was not a FOX News version and an MSNBC version of what had happened. Anyone who spread conspiracy theories was laughed at or ignored.

I wasn’t exactly a fan of President Bush then, but having been a presidential speechwriter, I sent a friend in the White House some lines for the president that I thought might help bring the country together, and was immensely proud to hear him use them in a joint address to Congress. | “Whether we bring our enemies to justice, or bring justice to our enemies, justice will be done.”
---
Our challenge today is to muster the same unselfish solidarity that brought Americans together after 9/11, whether we are standing by friends overseas — like the brave people of Ukraine — who are defending freedom from terrorism — or standing up to hatred and extremism at home.

The best way to honor the good guys we lost 21 years ago is to try to be the good guys again today. To be a country of heroes who run towards danger and of leaders who remind us that we have responsibilities to each other. To honor, and more important, to emulate those who give their lives to service — our troops, our first responders, our doctors, nurses, and teachers — remembering the idea that binds them together and to us: that placing others before ourselves is the worthiest way to live our life.

Thank you for all you do in that spirit.

— Tom

* * *
| Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year.

name: Team Kelly
subject: Will you personally endorse Mark Kelly?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When you step up to say you’re with Mark it makes a big impact.
#

**Mark Kelly Personal Endorsement Tracker**
**Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Your Endorsement: No Signature on Record
Action Requested: Add your name today!**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek_p2p_endorse_sep22/?source=em220911-1-7&akid=3766%2E6688874%2ExzhWG7)**
Friends —
Election Day is quickly approaching, and it’s crucial that we make sure Mark has the support of a big — and growing — team behind him.
Why? Well there are two reasons: First, Mark’s opponent is a “hardcore-MAGA” extremist who has called for cutting taxes for billionaires, privatizing Social Security, and passing a nationwide abortion ban that could criminalize abortion and imprison health care providers who perform them.
And second, because winning a race as important as this takes not only a lot of work but a lot of support. Not just from folks in Arizona, but across the country. And when you step up to say you’re with Mark, it makes a big impact.
So, we need more people to personally endorse our campaign and help Mark fight back. So far, over 75,000 people have signed on to say they have Mark’s back, and we’re hoping to make that number 100,000 by the end of this month.
That’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen on our list of folks who proudly say they stand with Mark.
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign? It’s important for Mark and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side and win this race.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek_p2p_endorse_sep22/?source=em220911-1-7&akid=3766%2E6688874%2ExzhWG7)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek_p2p_endorse_sep22/?source=em220911-1-7&akid=3766%2E6688874%2ExzhWG7)
Personally endorsing Mark is a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: Re-elect Mark and keep his reliance on science, data, and facts in Congress.
So, thank you in advance for adding your name,
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek_p2p_endorse_sep22/?source=em220911-1-7&akid=3766%2E6688874%2ExzhWG7)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=3766%2E6688874%2ExzhWG7).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Debunking 40 popular political and economic myths
body:
There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0785%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hQH6N%2boG3tZnTZciuNtEPw&sysid=1)

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gzcQHiWYuAbrrvdVfORDBw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend, There’s this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It’s a narrative that you’ll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered “correct” by the “right” people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That’s why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3NRm%2fJIQwq6bREuKb0Z%2bNQ&sysid=1)**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K4SJnUCatIo0nkKZt6o4vw&sysid=1)
---
| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you’ll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

**[https://act.libertasutah.org/tt-the-tuttle-rebuttals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9EYOLb%2b3h3lii62BGii6BA&sysid=1)**

I’d also love for you to share this book with at least 5 people you know--especially any children in your family. My hope is that they will enjoy the same benefits you do when you read this book. And then, we can crush these myths once and for all.

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of _**[The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c33895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7sS1NsJXmw5UWnYbUwe%2bMA&sysid=1)**_ today!
Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0785%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hQH6N%2boG3tZnTZciuNtEPw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0785%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hQH6N%2boG3tZnTZciuNtEPw&sysid=1)

subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znhcuk97h17om8aus4jng34futva6thgdaa5nib8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkekpj6cdgs5o71p9lmuo7ed73edobfd1nmqpjfd3gm9ir0shk6di33c9ic2oe1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdie0tj5cooj1cr0cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66or2cji6aor2c1h2bs)

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgjbtude8di38pgdj316amdj70mh1igj9ru7iq9g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji6aor2c1h2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv6lmet0ldi95op9hebjg6lqsh7oqqiq55qupu88_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji6aor2c1h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqc75sblpauc8pt3iqtr0np6m97l16odbffr6ul0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji6aor2c1h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: September 11
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#
Friends -
Today marks 21 years since the attack on our nation on September 11th. It was a dark day for our nation that I will never forget.
I hope you will join me in taking a moment to remember those we lost and hold their loved ones in our hearts. We remember not only those who died in the violence of that day but also the brave first responders and our service members who stepped up to protect our nation.
These courageous people put their lives at risk to defend our freedoms and security, and many of those who survived that day are still struggling to get the support they need and deserve.
We owe it to them to recommit to the work of building a peaceful, safe and prosperous future for every single American, regardless of race and creed.
There is a great deal of pain for so many today, but it’s also a reminder that those who sought to attack and undermine our democracy did not succeed. In the face of incredible tragedy, we witnessed the resilience and strength of the American people.
Thank you for joining us in honoring the lost, the fallen and our heroes today.
\- Cheri Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1698%2E357359%2EmAEo-E). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1698%2E357359%2EmAEo-E). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1698_357359_mAEo-E&akid=1698%2E357359%2EmAEo-E) today to help us make history.

name: Gov. Ron DeSantis
subject: You’re going to want to read this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250513:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)
---
| Peter,
I'm writing to you with some exciting news. The freedom movement we started down here in Florida at the beginning of COVID has a new leader on the verge of saving Pennsylvania from the cult of radical leftism.
My friend, retired Col. Doug Mastriano, is neck-and-neck with his lockdown liberal opponent.
Doug and I both saw COVID lockdowns for what they were: the single greatest overreach of government in modern history.
A man of devout faith, Doug knows that God doesn't make mistakes, especially when it comes to the gender of a child. | | | | [DONATE TO DOUG](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250514:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)
---
Doug will protect our children from the sickening gender radicals who are giving our children puberty blockers, performing mastectomies on little girls, and even castrating little boys.

It baffles me that more leaders in the Republican Party aren't fighting tooth and nail on this issue, but I know for a fact that Doug has the courage to charge directly into battle when it comes to protecting our children.

I could go down the list of issues, but just trust me on this, Doug is the man for the job and you won't be disappointed.

When I was up in Pennsylvania, I saw firsthand the momentum of the movement growing across the state, and it reminded me of my first campaign for Governor.

Right now, the polls have Doug trailing his opponent by 3%... which is exactly how far behind the pollsters said I was at the end of August in 2018. I know he can close the gap and win this critical race.

Now, onto the most important part of this email: what needs to come next.

Doug's campaign needs a massive outpouring of support from grassroots conservatives across the country. **[That's why I'm asking you to join me today in supporting Doug's campaign with a generous gift.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250513:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)**

**[You can click here to make a secure donation to Doug's campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250513:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)**
| | | [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250513:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)

---
| | | [DONATE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250515:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)
---
| | | [CHIP IN WHAT YOU CAN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250516:69w_8KVNj:m:1:3253819041:8642215DA91D756D5D7DE3A80B505BC3:r)
---
This movement to restore freedom across our country is going to happen one state at a time, and I'm confident that if Doug gets the help he needs from Americans like you, he'll save Pennsylvania from the madness consuming the Democrat Party.

I truly appreciate any gift you're able to make to send Doug to victory in November.

In freedom,

Ron DeSantis

The freedom movement we started down here in Florida at the beginning of COVID has a new leader on the verge of saving Pennsylvania from the cult of radical leftism. My friend, retired Col. Doug Mastriano, is neck-and-neck with his lockdown liberal opponent. Doug and I both saw COVID lockdowns for what they were: the single greatest overreach of government in modern history. A man of devout faith, Doug knows that God doesn't make mistakes, especially when it comes to the gender of a child. | | | | Doug will protect our children from the sickening gender radicals who are giving our children puberty blockers, performing mastectomies on little girls, and even castrating little boys. It baffles me that more leaders in the Republican Party aren't fighting tooth and nail on this issue, but I know for a fact that Doug has the courage to charge directly into battle when it comes to protecting our children. I could go down the list of issues, but just trust me on this, Doug is the man for the job and you won't be disappointed. When I was up in Pennsylvania, I saw firsthand the momentum of the movement growing across the state, and it reminded me of my first campaign for Governor. Right now, the polls have Doug trailing his opponent by 3%... which is exactly how far behind the pollsters said I was at the end of August in 2018. I know he can close the gap and win this critical race. Now, onto the most important part of this email: what needs to come next. Doug's campaign needs a massive outpouring of support from grassroots conservatives across the country. | | | | | | | | | | | | This movement to restore freedom across our country is going to happen one state at a time, and I'm confident that if Doug gets the help he needs from Americans like you, he'll save Pennsylvania from the madness consuming the Democrat Party. I truly appreciate any gift you're able to make to send Doug to victory in November. In freedom, Ron DeSantis Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano. name: Kristina Karamo
subject: News from the Trail, Labor Day Weekend
body:
What a week it's been!

There was much happening around our great state, and the Karamo Team was there participating. In Royal Oak, we joined Arts, Eats and Beats; in Detroit, the Annual Jazz Festival. The State Fair was running in Novi, and in Van Buren County there was the Lawrence Ox Roast Parade.

In Detroit

Last Saturday, Kristina held a fun day for the kids. She handed out backpacks with much-needed school supplies while a grill master roasted hot dogs, volunteers painted faces, and children played on a bounce house and rode a train!

The big events was the annual Mackinac Bridge Walk!

Over 150 Team Karamo volunteers showed up wearing Kristina T-shirts to walk the bridge and greet other Michiganders. Afterwards there was pizza and beer at the Biere De Mac Brew Works. What a terrific day!

Our next popular Statewide Patriot Party is this Monday the 12th. There is still time to invite a few friends and family over for fellowship and engage with Kristina, who will "zoom" in to speak to you and answer any questions you may have! This is a great way to introduce Kristina to your circle of influence. [Sign up here and we'll send you all the information you need](https://rightstrategies.us/email/l/0Qky4uvr892tttSpAxJb8920tw/e8F8FdMkkkk3owuSJ9ZoTQ/Q9AEck41FdJ4ATqCbkKMUA).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Today we remember
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Those who gave so much | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/9112022?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

On this day, we remember the lives that were lost and forever changed on September 11th, 2001. On behalf of Matt Birk and our entire campaign, we cannot express enough gratitude for the brave men and women who gave it all to save lives that fateful day.

Today, we are still so incredibly grateful for the first responders and our veterans who continue to put it on the line, so that we may be "The Land of the Free and Home of the Brave."

We remember those who gave the ultimate sacrifice. We also remember the unity our country felt after being so viciously attacked. We pray for that same unifying spirit again in America and Minnesota - that we remember who we are, the importance of our freedom, and the necessity to be "indivisible" as a country.

Today, let us remember. God bless.
---
|
In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - MN

| Peter,
"$5 million dollars to stop you. WOW! You must be saying the right things."
That's what Tucker Carlson said to me...
...when I went on his show to **call out Kevin McCarthy** , RINO Impeachment defenders, and the GOP Establishment for their **smear campaign against me.** | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61242974:6S5bkKVwN:m:1:3348985513:8411B3FBFDAF41E58202444FB04B0473:r)
---
| They've spent **$5 million attacking me and my family with TV ads.** They know I won't take orders from them because I answer to the people...and that _terrifies_ them.
I'm Karoline Leavitt, the 25-year-old conservative firebrand from New Hampshire who doesn't cower in the face of dirty politics.
Despite McCarthy and the Establishment's best efforts, **I 'm tied in the polls with the Establishment's hand-picked puppet** ahead of my primary on Tuesday.
They've called me a racist because I believe in a secure border and law and order. They've called me transphobic because I want to save girls' sports from radical gender extremists.
But I don't care...because I'm running to represent the people, not the Establishment.
**[But if I'm going to win Tuesday's primary, we need to raise the resources to counter their massive $5 million smear campaign...and do it fast.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61242974:6S5bkKVwN:m:1:3348985513:8411B3FBFDAF41E58202444FB04B0473:r)**
That's why I'm reaching out to you right now.
I'm calling on ALL grassroots conservatives to join Jim Jordan and Ted Cruz in supporting my campaign to **[send a _true_ fighter to Congress.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61242974:6S5bkKVwN:m:1:3348985513:8411B3FBFDAF41E58202444FB04B0473:r)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: The time is now
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed t
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrojgs36usdm2obcb1cg5s0je1sl429ruv98rgh8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji6eob4c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6oo62tbmceq6cojimdpr8crkccrr6db7cjh62pjhehpm6pb365q32ddmmmq70puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9gmdie0tj7coqm9cr4cuobapbi4no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I've been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I'm guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that's why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zddk36bcim7qeejoj97k8iq75eiorjgaattb2tro_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji6eob4c3h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that's why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That's why we're asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don't wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsosvvpn0dclr28q860nss1qfmp78lme3np3sdk0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji6eob4c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: We pause in remembrance today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
We will never forget
| | | Friend,

Today we pause to remember the act of senseless violence that forever changed America. We mourn the nearly 3,000 lives we lost – parents, coworkers and friends who may be gone but will never be forgotten.
---
Twenty-one years ago today, I was at Orlando International Airport commanding the Orlando Police Department’s airport division when I heard the shocking news of the attacks. I will never forget the devastation and heartbreak of that day, and how it changed how we looked at the world.
As we've continued our work to keep America safe, I have often thought of the first responders who stood in the face of danger to rescue others – the law enforcement officers, firefighters, EMTs and more. Their courage and selflessness is a lesson for us all – and we are forever grateful for their sacrifice.
I hope that every person will join me today in taking a moment of silence and saying a prayer for the families of the victims, for peace and for the safety and security of all Americans.

In solemn reflection,

Congresswoman Val Demings

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: The time is now
body:
In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6941%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=vNRhn74AMN9GbWgHNhkpFQ&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, In 1973, the U.S. Supreme Court decided the case Roe v. Wade. And since that day, more than 63 million babies have been killed through abortion in our country. It was the most destructive ruling in the history of our nation. And it led to an anti-life ideology that still infects America to this day. From what I’ve been told, you are someone who values and respects life in all its stages, and I’m guessing this makes you sick to your stomach just like it does to me. But the tide is changing, and that’s why I asked if I could send you this email today. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c85899%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nTOzKj7mpwo0tytXmg9yig&sysid=1)[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c85890%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zSdIATTs%2f0FrCuHNoHrPhg&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ The U.S. Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe gives us a historic opportunity to rebuild a culture of life. The battle for life has returned to the states. And we have a lot of work to do. Because the laws and needs of each state vary, it will take a supercharged effort to fight for the protection of the unborn. But the American Cornerstone Institute is committed to providing resources to support pro-life efforts in each state. And that’s why we need YOU! **Will you help rebuild a culture of life in states across America by making a tax-deductible gift today?** We have seen that the opposition is more hostile than ever now that the official decision has come down. We got a glimpse at those who are anti-life have reacted since the leak was made public. That’s why we’re asking you to give right now to help us fight back to protect life for the unborn with every tool at our disposal. So, please don’t wait. You can make your tax-deductible gift to protect life in states across America using this secure link: **[https://secure.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-states-confirmation](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c85891%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=np2Oy7fpSsPQL4c5SocxVg&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for any support you can offer. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4aae604fd56844398c2386ab9812aeed&_e=z7aAzNSCPPD7gVuW3jzvsPZpM7X6X2PawZJqDxQRG5h5QN6X3pYkwEI5GqL-8I3kRk_rb-Qq_zpa6ru8_eXa9q48Vd7QDP0hQhQuitqa7K59J2em0QdAGVIfb-KnLI5uFAkn4ObVjW_ZzPqFueSqTgHiFtv6XDJeOS0KGiMhzK8OCLJ-5zDd8ARtnpNm0REgLDxrzb6oWDA-u6NlXddrLLylRElxnTO0KbJrANUCbywiqikCes7zO77UsAh_yEmxSR3TbSWvmtjJK1JzUp1xSF18ZuAbryrh_fJUb7HcsTwAVuTgrom2kGOiz11F158gaH8iCu67fYnY-pq9QPYBBkP30WJZWKDidaRnMIP4_QcWcjRaUNtuxKrZRnufwD8Nng5eOzvEzXt0XVjFSIZHCQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4aae604fd56844398c2386ab9812aeed&_e=z7aAzNSCPPD7gVuW3jzvsPZpM7X6X2PawZJqDxQRG5h5QN6X3pYkwEI5GqL-8I3kRk_rb-Qq_zpa6ru8_eXa9q48Vd7QDP0hQhQuitqa7K59J2em0QdAGVIfb-KnLI5uFAkn4ObVjW_ZzPqFueSqTgHiFtv6XDJeOS0KGiMhzK8OCLJ-5zDd8ARtnpNm0REgLDxrzb6oWDA-u6NlXddrLLylRElxnTO0KbJrANUCbyztvIXWvFAAmjYfQTzNSw-fB9FGZryewl5TaIMewOz3VSurJpz3FSrR_pNDksU_4DWm-16uYc1koRzPY83ZpL7Nx-z1_iKNn7U_MQKSszSqFTnIBTIOpA8AQFJCEzTTCBe1D2aZRYkiXb6ZCoEZdzDUwQTZdiDwZDZXZRhjj2Kp-Q%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4aae604fd56844398c2386ab9812aeed&_e=z7aAzNSCPPD7gVuW3jzvsPZpM7X6X2PawZJqDxQRG5h5QN6X3pYkwEI5GqL-8I3kRk_rb-Qq_zpa6ru8_eXa9q48Vd7QDP0hQhQuitqa7K59J2em0QdAGVIfb-KnLI5uFAkn4ObVjW_ZzPqFueSqTgHiFtv6XDJeOS0KGiMhzK8OCLJ-5zDd8ARtnpNm0REgLDxrzb6oWDA-u6NlXddrLLylRElxnTO0KbJrANUCbyxmtTXg330wagnRIHB2EU8JCB6cGdTuK8eEiOLh1fMxrsSgYorjgNDsdqKrDm31WUaoU28CK8TN9JpUa3a1MH0uilvkGgbuIGv1SFy9uqXINXZuip8ArjkvTpcbNjzJpR1z9NiChiXDdqY6bj86ZONvpP9F47uGdCHqrpQ4MV9KxQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

* Craft is a **billionaire and self-funded – meaning she's ready to spend millions of her own money to defeat Andy.**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9450ks4ujt8r7tk863jfelend1c9i852ppa7hl0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji69oj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3mmpo66tb1cho75d3jekprac30s8qn2cpnm5j74cr0sor69crmm2o78cj1chgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32c5jcjg7cob6ejhb6ob7m2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdr686khc97rvi4pqo9v2egaomkk0uairgtfmms0_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji69oj6c9h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z31kat6j19r99hgdrr4aesro6c82dgbf5ohfuq60_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji69oj6c9h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zem3he0lan115tq7l1a8l80alef5s2rdc6to163g_rp22sh2s8i66or2cji69oj6c9h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Save the Senate
subject: Mandela Barnes needs your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Mandela Barnes will be Wisconsin’s next Senator. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMPyXwArFUhhEylhu27HuuFZPbUWWTdGH4838vBzdyazPkgGfSEI9dOrau8XGHCENJ6Je06YUb2AtP8-YN1Byq9GBTg8785gsbQ_ffAWduYcqzV7pjEnkpIsZGmd65KYI6_Yfq5IW3Qckt0gyuRwxJEqiyEBfPmPRsla6gYGUUrvKy4EmgLwvF5IOZu2P88z-0Syq4LxiUY9G4puo3peWUjFmLGT3bKpdZuU28zqaqIyBJZYrU6jtOXV7o0pbGiIvf1hC0aa2bWanZ3Z2CQz-xxu23bp8tVu0uT0jTGb9rJ8RqIH1uCU66CnHknfrz7ZVF/3pd/v5Oc7cRjRI2s9BnI8hzaZQ/h0/Rp4TeWVqlZqlopMsbdnfJ7AMm-uetVKuL4p757hcdAw)
Peter, Save the Senate is all about electing REAL Democrats so we can override Kyrsten Sinema, Joe Manchin, and Mitch McConnell to get sh*t done for Americans. One of our endorsed candidates, Mandela Barnes, is fighting to unseat Republican Senator Ron Johnson in Wisconsin, and CNN rates their race as one of Democrats’ best chances to pick up a Senate seat. Running against Barnes is Ron Johnson, whose ideas are so extreme he’s alienated even his Republican counterparts. He endorsed a proposal that would make seniors come out of retirement to work _and_ threatened to cut Social Security and Medicare. [**Ron Johnson has no business being in the Senate. Rush a donation to help Mandela Barnes beat him>>** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uM_enpCQ_ER_-Dpjz9tqzwoAzuEAx0DKGde8Myg9XKSYWPIlXv-NEPWeq3QHJ6vhl7adi1xZXhBn0AIFwRA_934_r-iQjD5Yl1Ygy5_X4ESfldCf0GFynDmxC2LOvhNp8cGYtkXLMT07t17zT-jJFyzwi8TVaVr5bQyDMtylgTeBQs9HBkmcEKrcMT_iFCR5tX_mYlXZ7YVfrS7mc54YOBzJA5bJzDP6Jv5VVMWIHyqmdQI3kYLfq4wUwe4f4t5LyndsGLLbzMAuf5S4jJE9FXDaFnbRUJemuAjR5tZMN9Okw/3pd/v5Oc7cRjRI2s9BnI8hzaZQ/h1/fRwH4xpzx-1VxvX8X62fWTNUf2aJSU6A30yWfhz6vTw) Now is the time to flip Wisconsin blue: Johnson is vulnerable and President Biden and Vice President Harris won Wisconsin in 2020. This is a race we can win. But Mitch McConnell’s “leadership fund” recently announced nearly $2.4 million in opposition ads against Barnes. clean_body: Mandela Barnes will be Wisconsin’s next Senator. | | | Peter, Save the Senate is all about electing REAL Democrats so we can override Kyrsten Sinema, Joe Manchin, and Mitch McConnell to get sht done for Americans. One of our endorsed candidates, Mandela Barnes, is fighting to unseat Republican Senator Ron Johnson in Wisconsin, and CNN rates their race as one of Democrats’ best chances to pick up a Senate seat. Running against Barnes is Ron Johnson, whose ideas are so extreme he’s alienated even his Republican counterparts. He endorsed a proposal that would make seniors come out of retirement to work and threatened to cut Social Security and Medicare. Now is the time to flip Wisconsin blue: Johnson is vulnerable and President Biden and Vice President Harris won Wisconsin in 2020. This is a race we can win. But Mitch McConnell’s “leadership fund” recently announced nearly $2.4 million in opposition ads against Barnes. The GOP knows we need just two more seats in the Senate to keep a Democratic majority and cancel out the votes of obstructionist Dems like Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin. Thanks for your crucial support, Save the Senate & Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you.
