name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Peter, this is what I saw in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250586:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)
---
| Peter,
Last week, I went to Pennsylvania to **campaign for my good friend, Doug Mastriano** , the Republican nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania.
Doug's a **principled defender of conservative values, liberty, and the American Dream**...and I know that he'll govern by putting freedom first, just like I do down here in Florida.
Doug's **down by just 3 points** in the polls, but his opponent has a _ton_ of money to dump into this race, as well as the unified support of Big Tech and the Leftist Media.
**Doug needs our immediate help if he 's going to pull off a big victory on November 8.**
I told Doug my top supporters could always be trusted to come through for a true conservative fighter...
**[As a special favor to me, will you rush your support to Doug's campaign...and make sure he has the resources to fight back and win?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250586:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)** | | | | [DONATE TO DOUG](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250587:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)
---
Back in 2018, **polls said I would lose by 7%** and the Leftist media had **all but written me off.**

Support from _conservatives like you_ helped prove them wrong...and I'm sure you'd agree: **Florida would be a MUCH worse place today if we had come up short.**
* When the rest of the nation locked down for COVID-19, **Florida empowered our people** and stayed open.

* When the rest of the nation capitulated to the Far-Left on Critical Race Theory and transgender orthodoxy, **Floridians stood with our values and fought back.**

Right now, Pennsylvania voters face the same choices Floridians faced in 2018:

Will we elect a principled conservative leader who will **stand and FIGHT for the values we cherish**...or will we give up and **let the Far-Left finish their takeover** of this great nation?

Floridians decided to take a stand...and America's a better place because we did.

Now, **Doug Mastriano needs your help to make sure Pennsylvanians join us in the nationwide fight for freedom too.**

Doug WILL win this race and be the kind of **fearless conservative ally we need to beat Far-Left radicalism _for good_**...but first, **he needs to have you in his corner.**

**[So I'm asking you, please help Doug's campaign surge in the final 2 months of this race.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250586:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)**
| | | [DONATE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250586:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250587:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)
---
| | | [DONATE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250588:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)
---
| | | [CHIP IN WHAT YOU CAN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61250589:6Aya6KVNy:m:1:3317145305:4D3E2F69EB81E5A15C6A9A9A6A7DF2C3:r)
---
Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano.

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Reflecting on the Anniversary of 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Let Us Stand United| | |
---
[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=bc229d0de2b14e439a53983065c6a3ea&_e=CyiYl-4ZOgREqwfoCx4hl9SiZ_NwxuMVUwkE8oahjRikXpqVuDKQc3PBsXtC43BBrNHTjcYQa02xcVUkBUqYZ693w5OodrFNO3yl3WTmTVw6CawZ85MCjCmGVwjFDXitAU5Qpr9eBkUZMimNFt-wSmgEBHli4PsC85K1luEK4TcwSXI2-EYNcuft2olcN5pZoIIW1UqYzDwo92WXlfUe6aLh5i1NdjGnH-2UVl3xhSH-VzU78UhPIVe4qimToXSuQ4ftv5q0GCHt-xNFILwKPEnyr3MSteouWlX0fb0yf4ykVfeOGjf_TAJ3UBbtwzRUe8ECynZwDR06QTJc3s2vLw%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, On this day, we remember and honor the nearly 3,000 lives lost when al-Qaeda
terrorists attacked our nation 21 years ago. We also pay tribute to the selfless first
responders who have suffered in the years since, and the brave servicemembers who put themselves in harm’s way on the other side of the world to keep us safe here at home. The anniversary of September 11 reminds us that there is good and evil in this world. That there are those who seek to do us harm – not because of who we are, but because of the values and freedoms that make us American. As the grandson of Holocaust survivors and as a counter-terrorism prosecutor, I have always known that America stands firmly on the side of good, and that we must always remain vigilant. One way to honor the memory of those who perished on September 11 (and in the years afterward) is to acknowledge that the bonds that unite us as Americans are much stronger and more important than the disagreements that often divide us. So today, I encourage everyone not to focus on our differences. Instead, let’s unite behind our shared pride in America, our love of peace, and our commitment to the freedoms that this great country has always stood for. God bless the United States of America.

Matt Jacobs
---
| | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=bc229d0de2b14e439a53983065c6a3ea&_e=CyiYl-4ZOgREqwfoCx4hl6dtHusK0PT8Ez2JR5EuILRmek92BoC_bSaE1iMbVzyYl4OacViyhTLxFhjAHyrWfNVbud8oCczI8MvqRxg466WiNWnY4_x5ms-nF6HeCTcREj6QTBbwql-NFFM3pB9IRbhRWUQJ3qtXpmFte1ab4uGTcysOsCdVrqNLrDuBiAt-6BQAl1uvVYZCDR-WmJf4Rw%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=bc229d0de2b14e439a53983065c6a3ea&_e=CyiYl-4ZOgREqwfoCx4hlyc4XNwLYPfyI4bgbKllzoOXKUhJufCJ3TIsqVSJ-QW6tLmhHBtr2080rTW4ae0YCbW3BO4xB8VUz-m3pyXQSiSu2ppVQ1-sKst517ELOlubQXkGUdS2sErqBbKkt7qdGrA5QfUrBQK1U6Rtb9baS3f8ycMQNeunBnKE48VDI3kWJrgSdkvAeRlaDiwYzPhDAQ%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=bc229d0de2b14e439a53983065c6a3ea&_e=CyiYl-4ZOgREqwfoCx4hl4DVBmTxMSrI0X-b0WL-0fu0yW99RRrci8VEJ_8clWbX3xIC3sP--vD0VlBFYNRpony9KrtvQDPl1vSYKYJSouBzFkUnu1P7vhCJ06zi7aT7911S6my-5PqZGZDPY8JyynkNbOoIr_nrHZVb6QYdVIt24OoSawcMt7us34R-tLFHCRgv-jZWE1lnhqOblV2yhaZ2KuL_e69Orx5YVeQUlGY%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=bc229d0de2b14e439a53983065c6a3ea&_e=CyiYl-4ZOgREqwfoCx4hl-K0a-5CcxBR6Un7ofi3lo4OQaeNaOA-9xh-mLg6VNpKhReidMM6yNxhHMCMNrVGbxNoHAgJzW2jM4pqBcwQcdTQib6QDpNrN4tWmO-EuMig3W2-bJiuldpt72eUcGi18IVEynnAphUdHcB9QWNiYpPGjX4fsbGOWyLw9in7OGOUKpNdgLqUGXK9dUKfiTuieA%3D%3D)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: #neverforget
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Today we remember September 11th, 2001- both the tragic terrorist attacks and the heroic actions of the brave first responders who saved their fellow Americans. We will #neverforget the innocent lives lost on that fateful day. Today, let us recommit ourselves to the safety and security of our nation for today and generations to come.

In the divisive world of today’s politics, it’s important we remain unified together as the United States of America - one nation, one people, all in this fight together for freedom. When we stand united, nothing can break us.

Together, #WeRepresent

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

About Gwen: the first African American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on Jan. 4, 2005. She served in the WI State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the WI State Assembly from 1989-1992.

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z11a7q817hubmd86h0catcqqjm8p95vov2g90lm8_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjh68o32cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4p5gelqr8t7362r36cdl61hjccdkm4rb2ppk6mq36t3ke9j68slhe4r69d5jeurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj1cr4supb2phkc2pmcdtgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1qnjr88n9d3dlb34dgkabc06c8a6lfmomc9lh3o_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjh68o32cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi7172rdgi5hsmi6v8u1hm53v6h0helpjsi40ekg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjh68o32cph2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr3rm4gefkbganbjtd8unklok5q2nieptg25qihg_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjh68o32cph2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziuf1rv3afqmn1uodlfkvelk7m8430rv4ee0i888_rp22sh2s8i66or2cjh68o32cph2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. | | By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Sharing our official plan to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're placing all our faith in the hands of supporters like you.
#
In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to read our finalized plan to elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott. Most campaigns would never share their campaign strategy beyond their most senior staff. Our campaign is different. We're placing all of our faith in the hands of supporters like you.
It'll take you about 15 minutes to read the whole briefing, but we want you to read it all the way to the bottom. Executing a statewide voter mobilization program of this scale has never been done before (not even in 2018!), and it will only be possible if we all know the basics of the plan by heart.
The last Democratic governor elected in Texas was Ann Richards in 1990. The skeptics will say Texas is too red. But this isn't a normal year. Beto's not a typical candidate. And while Texas' demographics shift, Greg Abbott continues to fail us.
We have the right candidate, the greatest enthusiasm, and the strategic plan to win. But we can only do it if you know the exact role you'll play.
[Read our campaign's "Plan to Win" now and be part of the team that makes history by electing Beto to be the next governor of Texas.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57250?t=1&akid=207097%2E444211%2E-Jnw4V)
After you've finished reading our plan, we need you to share it with all the Beto supporters you know. [Then, please chip in $3 or more to fund the work it'll take to execute this plan and win on November 8.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220911-1.2mGcXi&refcode=ema20220911-207097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=207097%2E444211%2E-Jnw4V)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220911-1.2mGcXi&refcode=ema20220911-207097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=207097%2E444211%2E-Jnw4V)**
Some of you have been working for months, or even since our November launch to elect Beto. Now, it all comes down to the final plan and the final weeks of this election — including our plan to launch more than 4,000 block walks across the state in the last month of the election.
There is no team I'd rather finish this contest with — from our dedicated volunteers to our incredible staff on the ground.
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for making this campaign possible.
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220911-207097-footer&t=22&refcode2=207097_444211_-Jnw4V&akid=207097%2E444211%2E-Jnw4V)**

| | Today, we remember the lives tragically lost in the horrific attacks on September 11, 2001.

The pain of this day is as fresh as it was twenty-one years ago.

This is a difficult day for our country.

Yet, we must never forget the courageous heroes all across our country who immediately rose to the occasion.

Those who rushed into the Pentagon and World Trade Center to save lives, staying days and weeks afterward to continue to help.

And those who answered the call to protect freedom at all costs here at home and abroad.

We will never take the heroic sacrifices of our first responders and our dedicated military men and women for granted.

May God bless the United States of America.
---

name: Elaine Luria
subject: 21 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50544475/366282386/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI2MjM2My1lMjMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbQKHqWj9LRa38nb35Z66rwfxF6zSNSCHK_SpwrszGM=)

| | 21 years ago, our lives as Americans changed forever. September 11th stands as one of the darkest days in living memory. Some experienced the painful loss of their beloved friends, family members, and coworkers – all of those whom we mourn, and whose memory we honor today. That day stands as a testament to the courage and sacrifice of the passengers aboard Flight 93, the first responders, the servicemembers, and of every American who, in their own ways, helped our nation pick up the broken pieces and rebuild. I first heard the news of the attacks as I stood watch on the reactor plant aboard the USS Harry S Truman. It changed something in me and so many others for good. We felt compelled to protect our fellow Americans, to serve our country, and to fiercely defend its principles. I’ve carried that sense of duty for the last 21 years, during my time in the Navy and beyond. I’m honored to serve on the Armed Services, Veterans Affairs, and Homeland Security committees in Congress, to ensure the well-being and care of our servicemembers and that our nation never faces such an attack again. And I will continue to defend our nation’s democracy from those who seek to destroy it, whether foreign or domestic. We will never forget those whose lives were lost 21 years ago today, and my heart is with their families and loved ones. May their memories be a blessing. Sincerely,
Elaine Luria
---

name: Matt Castelli
subject: In remembrance of September 11, 2001
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801
body:
|
---
Today is the 21st anniversary of 9/11/2001 — the worst terrorist attack on American soil to date. Although over two decades have passed, the memories of that day still stir fresh emotions in me and so many others.

We lost 2,977 people that day — brave helpers, heroes, and civilians. Those events led me to dedicate my life’s work to protecting our country through counterterrorism and national security.

I became a CIA officer, working in the same unit that found Osama bin Laden and other dangerous terrorists involved in 9/11. Later, I worked with both the Obama and Trump administrations as a Director for Counterterrorism in the National Security Council.

Importantly, the next day became “the day America fought back”. 9/12/2001 defined my generation of public servants who came together in unity and common purpose as so many Americans felt fear and pain.

Millions of Americans dropped everything to serve their country — from serving as first responders, to serving in the armed forces, to driving intelligence on the ground.

So today, I hope you will join me in remembering the events of 21 years ago, and the patriotism that followed. As we look to the future and face a new set of challenges — both at home and abroad — I honor the lives lost on this day and remain committed to our country and our democracy.

Thank you,

Matt Castelli
| | Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.castelliforcongress.com/p/J5pKoZraDkypT34AT5Q8_w2?unsubscribedata=eDZ%2BMdaawPnKYdEYFwJSGb2IJ6ibuQmGtGihTDzDbbos%2Ffx6YjTthA4ERsIrM2punNffReJGRH7iseBrG2Ut0VQEke4vmHY4JRgn6nIku5CYlILlSaX%2FpDBGuucO8BFxqaJ2OnACbRdR%2FnaNpIUzPLCUFze8k4hy3SWPx6ZHxgHNB2E32%2F%2B6EicB6dXqYjp8TmAWGGFkzA4vkcXdZLftycmzTJXOr6LQSMD%2Fe3r5tNfrdJe25hS8gKg7n3VpmLNSNVwXPcXt1O7HAJpDAzAUsGAxAt8Snsd5B%2FfentYQS23dPosSVdl4YTMMrVBsBKcjteqeHAwlsI5uImq4nLREWRHF3Ersv45EY1T3X%2Btsj5N7N67EYSvOp3TmY7QaIk7iR7cpX9kmSL0KQm4kPpJO%2F4yKwshXGzDhSSX3rnGx%2Bz5cbxGLfnUw7aq2lHpsH5B9).

clean_body: | Today is the 21st anniversary of 9/11/2001 — the worst terrorist attack on American soil to date. Although over two decades have passed, the memories of that day still stir fresh emotions in me and so many others. We lost 2,977 people that day — brave helpers, heroes, and civilians. Those events led me to dedicate my life’s work to protecting our country through counterterrorism and national security. I became a CIA officer, working in the same unit that found Osama bin Laden and other dangerous terrorists involved in 9/11. Later, I worked with both the Obama and Trump administrations as a Director for Counterterrorism in the National Security Council. Importantly, the next day became “the day America fought back”. 9/12/2001 defined my generation of public servants who came together in unity and common purpose as so many Americans felt fear and pain. Millions of Americans dropped everything to serve their country — from serving as first responders, to serving in the armed forces, to driving intelligence on the ground. So today, I hope you will join me in remembering the events of 21 years ago, and the patriotism that followed. As we look to the future and face a new set of challenges — both at home and abroad — I honor the lives lost on this day and remain committed to our country and our democracy. Thank you, Matt Castelli | | Paid for by Castelli for Congress PO Box 2451, Glens Falls, NY 12801 Click here to .

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office | | | [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd4fcfb3c59e4e74b24a9e8b4c91b948&_e=u40dtXN1YZsshSH7nKQeyNi5z4IgsqxAjJVF38dSt5WEx86W3sbvfiWcL6dVM46r3K0QW8nutD-zGdDT1twgHRd53qYSQZZYOw2h1aX4FI5ycvwEE70OmChQWSUW5E4q0lt2wo1QQ-B0VgjMPpOLBkZLEL6i95lpSJtpve7TkbFJUI0lOneBeXPL5u-QWRlxCGzpxhpeSEL2Z-aEgQFTsavr80Yen5xOiUy6u0LRz5mNfD6PGj0uwSS1ovb5KHGQ7TrMlc7DRzBi5IRodYMWZg2L1phm7KKdR_LtbIOmzODyki5nPonjF6hROC5jxNe2LXSHH8cc4uhnCEQm5oLD26lZF3B0yUydKVxUgOaij5a0aNisTmqMwlBqMqA_P8Sx)

Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I'm sure you've felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There's no doubt in my mind that our nation's citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation's vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That's why I'm sending you this email today. I'd like to hear how the Biden administration's energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd4fcfb3c59e4e74b24a9e8b4c91b948&_e=u40dtXN1YZsshSH7nKQeyNi5z4IgsqxAjJVF38dSt5WEx86W3sbvfiWcL6dVM46r3K0QW8nutD-zGdDT1twgHRd53qYSQZZYOw2h1aX4FI5ycvwEE70OmChQWSUW5E4q0lt2wo1QQ-B0VgjMPpOLBkZLEL6i95lpSJtpve7TkbFJUI0lOneBeXPL5u-QWRlxCGzpxhpeSEL2Z-aEgQFTsavr80Yen5xOiUy6u0LRz5krn1rE_hCKg21nhrhMjMugrrRYQT4VTb0hBl3J7qMZr2hAU1Dh77y-9zFH3jcaT6OlDbiNlH2kif6LT6c-njb4cQzSv2sELXb1ZRz4JywTfNW0VtptE4GubKm2ybf0VvOOAyixkNrecOCNq6tbP7am) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration's radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fd4fcfb3c59e4e74b24a9e8b4c91b948&_e=u40dtXN1YZsshSH7nKQeyNi5z4IgsqxAjJVF38dSt5WEx86W3sbvfiWcL6dVM46r3K0QW8nutD-zGdDT1twgHRd53qYSQZZYOw2h1aX4FI5ycvwEE70OmChQWSUW5E4q0lt2wo1QQ-B0VgjMPpOLBkZLEL6i95lpSJtpve7TkbFJUI0lOneBeXPL5u-QWRlxCGzpxhpeSEL2Z-aEgQFTsavr80Yen5xOiUy6u0LRz5m7ReGDsTMZJIBTB7H3qAbDa6HkXExIo0dyL0kJp0XZpRZNJblgDjgVIxy4ZQJ_MJwq6YsxDwJSaO1j6fvzSZvrr-0YRcFVXXeNWvoHaSBd0S4_PQW2dc7pbNaJWKnbB4Fpr6zO5h6CcUNzRiaeHuLH)** Thank you so much for your time. | | Dear Friend, There's this notion nowadays that just because an idea is popular, it must be true.

It's a narrative that you'll often see pushed by a dysfunctional media or toxic culture. And as long as the idea is considered "correct" by the "right" people like TV talking heads, celebrities, or the masses on social media, the general public believes it.

That's why the Libertas Institute published this eBook in our Tuttle Twins series: **[_The Tuttle Rebuttals: 40 Responses to Popular Political and Economic Myths._](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f177779d6c9a455da4b807087d116a41&_e=mfyFi7Pctz21R0kUODIoL1sjuv5vT6ooMBbvw_e2hYzqaGwQSPkB0VMaOk3MsSBzu11rC_GNKyUL6EmoaAOEwF1SMeR8igLAN-mi1gs6rrc0lZzoQKkWGDEG7PQg2ijSAT-B2lmRo6xJHL8COBTR06cvtmPeyC4TGPAn3uCxulXUo0gPsR862vMWGKXsx87aYKpvCyMkxPjyL1IbY7AHdR6I1OuPp8_qjFs2_VutUSAHC8lddZQoFl9yp4lO-vn7-O9xLKgvH7ktWTZJnpWNM_la5xWG8gWfFWbtg3DNQzaKATog0LNGx1Y_vcYD0H5Qaf0C3sE_bEYifcjHrl9ZW2IBksnMkWLWYyoS56644Lg7f_d7W1yj-tOGWH6Yy7T-)**

| [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f177779d6c9a455da4b807087d116a41&_e=mfyFi7Pctz21R0kUODIoL1sjuv5vT6ooMBbvw_e2hYzqaGwQSPkB0VMaOk3MsSBzu11rC_GNKyUL6EmoaAOEwF1SMeR8igLAN-mi1gs6rrc0lZzoQKkWGDEG7PQg2ijSAT-B2lmRo6xJHL8COBTR06cvtmPeyC4TGPAn3uCxulXUo0gPsR862vMWGKXsx87aYKpvCyMkxPjyL1IbY7AHdaUUxImFo9VrUNy7L57h0Bba05KrkC9932ossVeQtnxeGmDZO6Pu3FiOLM0CDrdOwWKdftH0yZcHrUHM4_nDd2oKcKlESyb9ghz8SjYrcVVEb3aQyKToGOKbSH81Shh_vv2Ftbc2t8j-tBvE9Wr4nncb62a1FMctrUrYjrpZ6iL8)

| | And today, we want to send a copy to your inbox for FREE.

Inside this important eBook, you'll get a clear analysis of some of the biggest political and economic myths infecting our world today like:
* Overpopulation is destroying the world
* Global climate change can be reversed by law
* Capitalism creates winners and losers
* Socialism helps the poor

You can get your free copy using this secure link:

body:
The countdown begins.
#
I literally can’t believe I’m saying this...
But we’re officially **less than 60 days** out from Election Day.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-1?refcode=em20220911-7202&refcode2=7202_434096_Rm0sjP&akid=7202%2E434096%2ERm0sjP)
From today onward, every action we take to reach voters — every door knock, GOTV rally, phone call, TV ad, text message, and yes, Tik Tok — will help us beat Dr. Oz on November 8th.
I’ve said it before + I’ll say it again. This grassroots team ROCKS. Like, so hard.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-1?refcode=em20220911-7202&refcode2=7202_434096_Rm0sjP&akid=7202%2E434096%2ERm0sjP)
But sadly, we can’t sit back just yet. We still need to raise *a lot* more resources to compete with Dr. Oz, Donald Trump, and the many GOP super PACs who would do anything to crush our movement + take back control of the Senate.
**[The 60-day Election Day countdown is ticking, so I’m asking you to make a donation of $6, $60, or honestly anything you can spare right now. It would be AMAZING if we could make today one of our biggest fundraising days in September.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-1?refcode=em20220911-7202&refcode2=7202_434096_Rm0sjP&akid=7202%2E434096%2ERm0sjP)** 🙏🙏🙏

Believe me when I say this: your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. In a tough race like this, every single dollar makes a huge difference, and I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
John ❤️

Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

name: Annette Taddeo
subject: Remembering American heroes on 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taddeo for Congress
body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50545322/366285074/-209266544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI2ZWQxNS1lMzMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G95W-peuFv5G1RyN7CAZHjhpIsmoeAWZhfV-tBX5mSw=&emci=caa61e2b-5e30-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=2c26ed15-e331-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=23151511)**
Friend,

The attacks on September 11, 2001 left an indelible mark on our country. Even after twenty-one years, many of us can still feel the pain and grief we experienced all those years ago. No matter how many years pass, September 11th will always be a day characterized by American loss and national grief.

But at the same time, 9/11 will forever be a day symbolizing American bravery, resilience, and unity.

Bravery of the men and women who ran _towards_ the rubble to help their fellow Americans. Resilience of first responders who worked endless days and nights to keep New Yorkers safe and keep survivors alive. And unity of all Americans who joined together, as one nation, to support one another through unthinkable tragedy.

Today, I urge us all to come together again to mourn the lives of those lost in 9/11 and honor their legacies of the brave men and women who gave the ultimate sacrifice for the lives of others. May we never forget them.

In solidarity with our brave American first responders and men and women in uniform,

_Annette_
---

| Annette Taddeo is running to represent Florida's 27th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [AnnetteTaddeo.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50545324/366285075/-2056577868?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI2ZWQxNS1lMzMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G95W-peuFv5G1RyN7CAZHjhpIsmoeAWZhfV-tBX5mSw=&emci=caa61e2b-5e30-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=2c26ed15-e331-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=23151511)

body:
Dear Peter,

Joe Biden raised a shadow army.

The regime will enlist 87,000 new IRS agents.

**Thousands of which Joe Biden armed with automatic weapons and _$5,000,000_ worth of ammunition.**

All are targeting you.

Joe Biden's secret police raiding Mar-a-Lago was just the first step.

_The Biden regime weaponized the entire government against us_.

An America First majority in Congress must defund and disarm the IRS.

And I'm leading the fight to elect Speaker Donald J. Trump so the MAGA movement can pull the plug on the regime weaponizing the government against you and me.

body:
My new book, Breaking History: A White House Memoir
| | | [ ](http://email.email.callingallpatriots.com/c/eJw9kMFupDAMhp8GbqAkZGA4cKA70-mlUrV7qNoLMkkYshMSlIStZp--BkaVIkf-7d-yP9XQsmQ1qYuaprJhnPGhSHXDCGOkppQeKOc0J4KXNfSVACkOnA8JJ2oCbXIBxmh7xThD9NrFkAs3pWNTklqCRHPJh54Wh6oiNenR36tKyeOQmmaMcQ5J0SbsGV9QYvEq_9LWK7kOQc36IPCbSHHM_t6WMFrls6CvVsmsd-6WBZiS4nmJUzcpqRdMTtteCStXMbjFC4Xin_a1W4d1l_btURMwzYCjsLofS-rOQqeMElE7e1fgZ2dM9o-upt2977PbnY3KRnRLZyEqlGFyy6ZYwMyv93hkg0L0y9rQWaMlpuNbfGr5S_v7somjlojhdHk_z_pevqe-kfOXRq6hrBD0dQeNVHFjo4d7k1RPCWObjbENIOvlEYAf4ZB9fPo5--_tea2xXxjjfVY_jY8Z-QMTS6rTN8mZpZw)

Friend Historic. That’s what President Trump’s America First Presidency was. To give a behind-the-scenes look into the groundbreaking, historic success of President Trump and his Administration, I wrote a book, Breaking History: A White House Memoir, and [I want you to have a copy of it.](http://email.email.callingallpatriots.com/c/eJw9kEGPmzAQhX8N3EB4MAYfOKTN7p5aVaqqbXtBE9tJ3DU2MmY36a_vAFEly9a88Xua-UzPhABZyVqyXPfAgZ_r3PZQAVSSMdYwzllZKS4knlqFWjWcnzNemRGtKxU6Z_2F7glTtCHNpQpjfu1l0wglOlYpWbMzKKmg4y3l1yBODFnu-mtK05zVhwye6cxGLdGUH9ZHo9cQ0nycFT1jVXfFn7dlvnoTi9levNHFKYS3YsYxq5-XNA6j0Xah4rjNlYFYxTksURkSvx--DGvY8HL49ugpHCekKOruy1Zy8DgYZ1Sywd8Nxik4V7yz1bS793l2e_DJ-ERuHTwmQzKOYdkUj1TFdZ9IbEhIcVk_DN5ZTWX88fPr--2m8baJV6sJw_Hl9Wmyd_Gax15PH5a4zqIl0JcdNFGliZ093_us_ZQBbDaADSCcdIfIO2yKX7_jVPyN_mntwWe6030y_z8-MsoHJsja4z9AWaVU)

**The mainstream media, led by the far-Left New York Times** , are already attacking my book because they don’t want the American people to hear the truth. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: How do we best honor the memory of those killed on 9-11?
body:
| | |
---
Today marks twenty-one years since September 11th, 2001. Those of us who were alive and old enough to understand what was happening will never forget what we saw that day, and in the following days and weeks. We will never forget the displays of heroism and sacrifice we witnessed with our own eyes, and for some of you, you witnessed it firsthand, because you were in NYC. Many of these instances of valor were performed by brave firefighters and police officers, and some were performed by random people inside the towers, or on the streets. As a nation, we vowed we would Never Forget. That should not be an empty slogan, but what does it mean? I’ll tell you what it means to me. It means we honor the memory of those who died and those who gave their lives to save others. We do that by working every day to uphold the values and ideas that made our country great, and for which our fellow Americans were murdered. It also means we live courageously and we fight for a culture where people rush towards danger to help one another, like our September 11th heroes did that day. The 9-11 culture stands in stark contrast to the videos we see too often now, where someone is attacked in public, the crowd hangs back, they pull out their phones to film and nobody steps in to help. Politics and policy are obviously very important, but so is our culture. American culture must also be saved, and that fight begins with every individual and the way we choose to live our lives every day. This is how we honor the Americans who were killed twenty-one years ago. We pray and we sacrifice for a future where American liberty and American culture reflects the spirit of the people who ran into burning, crumbling buildings to save their fellow Americans. Please join me in prayer today for those who were murdered, their families, and for our country. May God Bless America, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-6XN0jLVTniw)
---

name: David and Ian, Co-Founders of Never Again PAC
subject: September 11, 2001
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
A message for 9/11 [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/50546878/366290766/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZjliODRkLWU2MzEtZWQxMS1hZTgzLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eu4l7Zs2-1BGDyk3EjRWihaNzkCWJOIXUDTqt01pFnA=&emci=3e754c7d-6f30-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=6bf9b84d-e631-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Friend,

On a sunny morning in September, 21 years ago, our lives would forever be changed by what would become known as the worst terrorist attack in the history of the United States. Three thousand lives were lost that day, with many more suffering in the following years from illnesses related to the disaster.

That morning also showed the world the fortitude of the American people, where hundreds of first responders went to Ground Zero at their own risk to save lives, and private citizens came together to support their community in whatever way they could.

It has now been 21 years since that day, and the legacy of 9/11 lives on, in more ways than one. Today is traditionally remembered as a day of unity in our country, but it is also the day when corrupt politicians took a tragedy and used it to spread hate and divide our nation with islamophobia.

Today we mourn all those who were lost to the attacks, we honor the brave people who sacrificed their lives for their fellow humans, and we remember the soldiers who gave everything in defense of our country in the aftermath.

We must also recommit ourselves to love for our brothers and sisters, and in remembrance of 9/11, fight for a country where we are truly united.

Thank you,

David and Ian,
Co-Founders of Never Again PAC

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
---
Never Again PAC
PO Box 2153
Purcellville, VA 20134
United States
---

**I 'm writing in support of my friend, fellow veteran, and proven Republican leader for New York, ****LEE ZELDIN****, during his rescue mission to restore a great American state to GLORY!**

| In case you missed it, the tyrannical Governor who Lee is running to unseat - the corrupt, far-left, pro-criminal Andrew Cuomo 2.0, aka _Kathy Hochul_ - recently declared that Lee was no longer a New Yorker, because he disagrees with her radical policies. **Hochul demanded that Lee get on a bus and move to Florida.**

Lee is a lifelong New Yorker and he's not going anywhere! He's staying and fighting to save his state.

There are millions of other New Yorkers who feel the same way Lee does about stopping crime, defending freedom, growing New York's economy, and other priorities to save the state.

Are they no longer New Yorkers either? Is she calling on all of them to just get on a bus and leave the state as well?

Newsflash for Kathy Hochul:

**_New Yorkers are ALREADY coming here to the Sunshine State in droves - and it's because of terrible leadership like HER'S!_**

Folks are fleeing a place where politicians like Hochul attack the wallets, safety, freedom, and kids' education of the very people she is supposed to represent.

And they're headed to places like my home state of Florida - **the #1 state in the entire nation for economic freedom where we don 't give in to the Radical Left's narratives!**
New Yorkers have had no choice but to look to places where their money goes further, and where they can live life safer and freer.

_But Lee Zeldin is on a mission to change that._

Despite Hochul's demands, **Lee is not going anywhere.** He's standing his ground to fight for New York, FIRE Kathy Hochul, and Save New York before it's gone for good!
[**Will you join me today in supporting Lee 's rescue mission? He's going to need all of us** **to make this historic victory possible! >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61249722:6GeHLKVbN:m:1:3331421248:4ABAC7241E3800D63299F5462613FC2C:r)

name: Laura Gillen
subject: A personal note on 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for Congress
body:
It’s an understatement to say that the cataclysmic events of September 11, 2001 irreversibly changed our lives as Americans – and, especially, our lives as New Yorkers.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50547728/366292373/281630052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWNiYmQ0NC1lODMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WDiZahBnFonqi3ODzXCQBZw5MQQp1UGyejfqHAKrhnM=&emci=a8e97990-df31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=f5cbbd44-e831-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=7377580)
Peter,

It’s an understatement to say that the cataclysmic events of September 11, 2001 irreversibly changed our lives as Americans – _and, especially, our lives as New Yorkers._

As a New Yorker, I know first-hand that no one was untouched by this unspeakable tragedy. Thousands of us were forced to enter a dimmer world – a world without a beloved friend, neighbor, or family member.

**And even twenty-one years later, we all still carry the weight of the collective grief from the September 11th attacks.**

Yet, even in this moment of unimaginable tragedy, it was the strength and resiliency of our New York community, coming together to support one another, that carried us through.

Today, may we all come together _once again_ to remember the thousands of lives taken too soon. We will never forget you.

_Laura_
---

| Laura Gillen is running to represent New York's 4th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [LauraGillenForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50547730/366292374/281630052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWNiYmQ0NC1lODMxLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WDiZahBnFonqi3ODzXCQBZw5MQQp1UGyejfqHAKrhnM=&emci=a8e97990-df31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=f5cbbd44-e831-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=7377580)

clean_body: It’s an understatement to say that the cataclysmic events of September 11, 2001 irreversibly changed our lives as Americans – and, especially, our lives as New Yorkers. Peter, It’s an understatement to say that the cataclysmic events of September 11, 2001 irreversibly changed our lives as Americans – and, especially, our lives as New Yorkers. As a New Yorker, I know first-hand that no one was untouched by this unspeakable tragedy. Thousands of us were forced to enter a dimmer world – a world without a beloved friend, neighbor, or family member. And even twenty-one years later, we all still carry the weight of the collective grief from the September 11th attacks. Yet, even in this moment of unimaginable tragedy, it was the strength and resiliency of our New York community, coming together to support one another, that carried us through. Today, may we all come together once again to remember the thousands of lives taken too soon. We will never forget you. Laura | Laura Gillen is running to represent New York's 4th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit | Paid for and authorized by Gillen for Congress. name: Haley Stevens
subject: In remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Congress
body:
---
| | Friends, Today marks a somber occasion: 21 years ago, we faced the worst terrorist attack in our nation’s history. My thoughts are with all who lost their lives on that day, and the families who still mourn their absence. Everyone who is old enough has a story about where they were on that day. I would like to take a minute to tell you my story: On September 11, 2001, I was three weeks into my freshman year of college at American University in Washington, DC and was just making my way in the world as a young adult who had left home for the first time. From my love of history, I went to college to study political science and less than a month after my mom moved me into the dorms, the world changed before my eyes. I received a phone call from my roommate’s mother and I turned on the television to see the second plane hit the World Trade Center. My roommate was already in a class and I didn’t know what to do next, so I went to class myself. The teacher excused us and looked at us and said “I’m so sorry you have to go through this at such a young age.” Back in my dorm room the phone lines were down and I didn’t know that my mother was at work in downtown Detroit panicking and trying to reach me. She had everyone in her office trying to call me. You see, one of the last conversations we had before 9/11 was about my political science class that was going to take us all throughout Washington — I told my mom we were getting to go to the Pentagon and the Capitol. She didn’t realize that this class did outside of classroom visits on Wednesdays and 9/11 was on a Tuesday. We never got the phone lines to work that day, but AOL instant messenger on my big desktop computer was working and I was able to type her a message and let her know I was okay and alive. Unfortunately for too many families that day — they were not as fortunate. The rest of that Tuesday was a blur. I spent the evening trying to help the campus. Our food service workers couldn’t commute, so I helped in the cafeteria cleaning and serving. I was trying to do whatever it took to make things feel normal for my peers. I don’t remember how I fell asleep that night but I managed to. There were plenty of friends and classmates at American University who were connected to the World Trade Center or the Pentagon. Some dropped out or transferred due to stress and wanting to be back with family. My best friend who was attending Michigan State was slated to visit me for fall break. She ended up taking one of the first flights that started running again to Washington, DC for that trip. Also in October, a Seaholm classmate and I had plans to see our favorite musician at Radio City Hall in New York City. We still made the trip in later October for the show. I remember the city had a certain camaraderie even though it was very vacant following the attack. As I grappled with the aftermath of the 9/11 attack, the answer became more clear: I knew I wanted to walk the path of public service. Two decades later, I’m proud to represent my community in Congress. I will always fight for Michigan, for working families, and for our essential workers, first responders, and veterans. Our country is resilient, and I’ve never been more sure: we are stronger together and there is still so much more that unites us as Americans than will ever divide us. Sincerely, Haley Stevens

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c839bdb484324c96822f1c9f345deed2&_e=dl7NuuYyFUIJayhNgtfQPl2eKQYrz77JqiEq8rDVsMH8SNJPFULQ1dgG3dkK-nILwxOh7XxKymD6Yw6BdDaDLhmnT30pF4BGj_1OIBnAuGipBk4OzKIbnB845MS0Apo0mR2uvP9R9Nf1x-gWHSwiCU4-V0qaDHRp4k-1aOATBukYGJ-qcgwaoN4SCjkkwghulN_n1bMU6tqfVsk_x8PvawW7ds2fIYJF3ytjjlFzfnfeHcgp489TknGozf26LxVdSmxXsVRfnFbcqpIM7Ich4liCqaMeUY5NXwtNkQ-TGm82t5Z3XOpNflnK1dXbpDmGI0ovFFHe99PhUPRwWn8J2saRrkZtqtVv-TkYYhARmJY_7R5ZtdIyrrN7gJ-CW2N_OH7pxim3Gv83rDEhkT2t_w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c839bdb484324c96822f1c9f345deed2&_e=dl7NuuYyFUIJayhNgtfQPl2eKQYrz77JqiEq8rDVsMH8SNJPFULQ1dgG3dkK-nILwxOh7XxKymD6Yw6BdDaDLhmnT30pF4BGj_1OIBnAuGipBk4OzKIbnB845MS0Apo0mR2uvP9R9Nf1x-gWHSwiCU4-V0qaDHRp4k-1aOATBukYGJ-qcgwaoN4SCjkkwghulN_n1bMU6tqfVsk_x8PvawW7ds2fIYJF3ytjjlFzfnfeHcgp489TknGozf26LxVdIMYpOSROfwwASoipbppY0GvzNHUQ3ImsW3ivoBHLLqqf2ZFgJxz3LmWxAWZMYo7FvEF3e-yTvCREje2uJYYaDkD_5II8dUG8yCZ350O84naCANP916UH8sKPK4e0qe47KvW0EbJC-loFUhC7V-JU8w%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c839bdb484324c96822f1c9f345deed2&_e=dl7NuuYyFUIJayhNgtfQPl2eKQYrz77JqiEq8rDVsMH8SNJPFULQ1dgG3dkK-nILwxOh7XxKymD6Yw6BdDaDLhmnT30pF4BGj_1OIBnAuGipBk4OzKIbnB845MS0Apo0mR2uvP9R9Nf1x-gWHSwiCU4-V0qaDHRp4k-1aOATBukYGJ-qcgwaoN4SCjkkwghulN_n1bMU6tqfVsk_x8PvawW7ds2fIYJF3ytjjlFzfnfeHcgp489TknGozf26LxVdj3UMvp4P6_4ZqYZnkF1SIl4rsasmN8zi0A1a0eg4CCTmP6JzI2Pbre25n4P-7dBperO65I8gbm1_cfczg6r3VR-eWW4QeaC_DN3FC87k2HlRmUyvF_0378ibh0L-hdoHkZEG0-whGAzM1R0QaoocDA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
We’re getting to the bottom of the Mar-a-Lago raid, and we need your help
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | Fellow Patriot, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](http://trk.readactnews._9jTT0WQtbp7PUlNew) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you...** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](http://trk.readactnews.-HO2gh23WnLkSaBeTMiAQ)**[ ](http://trk.readactnews.) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country-ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you'll consider sending in a donation of $15, $25, or $50 today. ** ](http://trk.readactnews.) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](http://trk.readactnews.-1IsrgERN6mj4bPWHHGEg)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](http://trk.readactnews.-n37Y2bi_R46MI2rEg)
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.-6Lkn6Tzg)
---
America First Policy Institute is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, Tax ID # 85-4202763.

---

name: Chuck Morse
subject: We will never forget 9/11/01.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MDQ2MDE3NjcyNjE2NTA5JmM9bjd4OCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NDkwNDU3JmQ9YzhiNXUzZw==.E24rLi-95Hr7o81tR6lL4RuGJ6ff3EgW7O5zvgRpzyg)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MDQ2MDE3NjcyNjE2NTA5JmM9bjd4OCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NDkwNDY0JmQ9aDNnOWc1YQ==.29qxtgsUs1v4A8XG4YfflTinOxdpwQ02Y94uaT_qUmg)
---
| | | **
**Derek,**
** Our election may be right around the corner, but it’s important to take time for somber reflection today. 21 years ago, the September 11th terrorist attacks changed our country forever. We will Never Forget the lives that were lost, the sacrifice of our first responders, or the resilience that our country showed in the aftermath. Thank you for joining me in paying respects to the fallen and their families.**_
_**
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MDQ2MDE3NjcyNjE2NTA5JmM9bjd4OCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NDkwNDcxJmQ9cjJnNHQxdg==.35WqvEbVLH7s6TtRpGaLTZNnLxsEUQmofnGe-kBNaOQ)
---
| | |
Today, we mourn the thousands of innocent American lives that were lost in senseless acts of terror. We thank our first responders for their tremendous bravery that saved countless lives that day, as well as our heroic military members who were called into action in response to these attacks. And lastly, we remember that while this day broke the hearts of many, it could not break the spirit of the United States of America – the greatest nation on Earth. **We will never forget September 11, 2001.** God Bless America, _Chuck Morse_ __

---

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWkm6JDhmN

We've done something new. We've created a free online teaching
series that combines the learning of an online course with the
features of a ....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWkm6JDhmN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Does
America need a "Great Reset?"

In 2020,
members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and
launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world
economy.

As Klaus
Schwab-the founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "we
need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would
have the effect of canceling our American way of life.

A recent
Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset,
its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.

This
seminar-titled "The Great Reset?"-is now available as a free
online video series.

Filmed on
the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight
into:

The
origins and leaders of the Great Reset
How
the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large
corporations
The
connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
What
"environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
The
Great Reset from China's perspective

Alternatives to the Great Reset

You can
receive instant access to this free video series right now using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60739608:Wkm6JDhmN:m:3:2532013465:958DC1287C715209C41F7289D3D271FD:r

You will
learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and
pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with
your family, friends, and more.

As
America's economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of
disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to
the defense of the free market and American liberty.

Use the
link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Alexander Vindman
subject: our duty to defend democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1014&amount=25&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Alexander Vindman

Hello there,

I’m Lieutenant Colonel (Retired) Alexander Vindman, and I served more than
20 years in the U.S. Army and as the Director for European Affairs for the
United States National Security Council until 2020.

I’m writing to you because our country is at a crossroads, and two paths
lie before us: One leads towards a better, more equitable future for all
Americans—the other jeopardizes the very foundations upon which our
democracy is built.

I’m supporting Tim Ryan for Senate in Ohio because he recognizes that his
duty as an elected official is to fight on behalf of those he represents.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1015&amount=25&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Will you show your support for Tim by making a $25 contribution to his
campaign?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1016&amount=25&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1017&amount=50&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1018&amount=100&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1019&amount=200&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1020&amount=250&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1021&amount=30&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Other Amount

What happened on January 6th was nothing short of an existential crisis
for the United States, and if we fail to recognize and remedy how we got
there, we’re surely doomed to repeat it.

But there are people in Washington, and others running for office, who
seek to further undermine our democracy by casting a shadow over the
legitimacy of our elections, stripping Americans of their fundamental
rights.

JD Vance is one of those people—he didn’t create the MAGA movement, but
his shameless attempts to curry favor with Donald Trump and the Trump base
is part of the hyperpolarization tearing this country and our communities
apart.

Tim Ryan is the opposite: He puts the people he represents first, and he’s
a fierce fighter for hardworking Americans.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1007&amount=25&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Washington could use more people like Tim, and I’m hoping you’ll join
me in supporting him. Can I count on you to make a donation to his
campaign for Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1008&amount=25&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1009&amount=50&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1010&amount=100&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1011&amount=200&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1012&amount=250&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21384?t=1013&amount=30&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Other Amount

Thank you for taking the time to read this, friend.

Alexander Vindman

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=5446%2E3611125%2EOwOZ6X ]Donate Monthly

Niles, Ohio 44446

| | From the Indivisible national organization:Each election, local Indivisible groups issue endorsements of candidates in their area who will best fight for us, and some of those groups nominate candidates for a national endorsement. Before we make a national endorsement, we poll Indivisibles across the district about who we should endorse. If a supermajority vote in favor, we offer groups extra resources and support to work to elect the endorsed candidate. This is where we need your support!Indivisible Northeast Mississippi has nominated Dianne Dodson Black for Indivisible's national endorsement in MS-01. The deadline is TODAY by 11:59 p.m.!
[Cast your vote to encourage Indivisible to endorse Dianne Dodson Black!](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/00OCfBJYf/c?w=ebdWbu-RfdKS6jmywdltZ-nnuXMTAKEZAIs1zYH08Fw.) Thank you for your support,Dianne Black

name: Michele Rayner
subject: 21 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida, Inc
body:
|
---
Peter — Today marks 21 years since 9/11/2001, the deadliest terrorist attack in our country’s history with nearly 3,000 Americans killed.

We honor and remember the lives that were cut short by an act of hatred, the brave first-responders who risked their lives trying to save others, and friends and families who lost someone they loved.

Now, 21 years later, there is reason to be hopeful: Americans, despite immense pain and destruction, all came together, and put their differences aside.

Today, as we’re facing new challenges and troubles, I am reminded that we can forge ahead together to become a more progressive and united country.

Never forget.

_Michele Rayner_
| | Paid for by Michele For Florida, Inc. P.O. Box 35218, St. Petersburg, FL 33705
www.micheleforflorida.com

body:
[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=1) |
# **THIS WEEK IN BETSY BRIGADE NEWS**
### _Putting the People Back in Charge_
* * *
### **Betsy Visits Lake and Klamath Counties**
Is there any better way to spend Labor Day than at the Lake County parade and Round-Up or visiting with farmers in Klamath Falls? Thanks to all of our supporters in Lake and Klamath Counties who welcomed Betsy and shared with her some of the top issues facing rural Oregonians. [click to READ about it](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=37Ffqoo3vUtPlPFDz9OjW3jd_LPoKgjMNywkFR25dMS2VVLpPAwB51wWAb2EVW5MgDgqWREMA_xrr0L4LfYEcFb2pA7HpaEJv8myOkidfl0LekofzTqaF9iNqGS0MzppjwCqufVEA4-Eji_O0oscf4BVjMXdbdv1XjaqsIsf77CRi88pv-HBOxR-4MSpaDhe&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=2)
* * *
### **New Ad Alert: Margaret Carter Endorses Betsy**
Did you see Betsy’s latest ad featuring former State Senator Margaret Carter? Margaret is a trailblazing pioneer – the first African American woman elected to the Oregon legislature and the first to serve as the chair of the Democratic Party of Oregon. Like the other Republicans and Democrats who have united to join Betsy’s campaign, Margaret loves Oregon more than any political party. [](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/new_ad_first?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=3)
* * *
### **Betsy Johnson: The Advocate**
Did you catch Betsy’s profile in the Willamette Week? Read and share the full article with your friends and family and show them that Betsy is the _only_ candidate in this race who will go to bat for _all_ Oregonians. [Click to read the article](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=BLaSQKzHzkAgsGVeHFj0_hJ0_SHTWdcoihNJkaGdeD2ZF61i6h6Aw1u8rkmHonrI5D8dVEBzSNJ59mqtzumIjj0-Ul03D-9uQrmUOv703_5NR-hGqjBgOmV-05NgDxRqsPfUUe5IihF_Swi4BAPqdxaZdTrwsyjUxmNsMYdCFHU&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=4) [](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=BLaSQKzHzkAgsGVeHFj0_hJ0_SHTWdcoihNJkaGdeD2ZF61i6h6Aw1u8rkmHonrI5D8dVEBzSNJ59mqtzumIjj0-Ul03D-9uQrmUOv703_5NR-hGqjBgOmV-05NgDxRqsPfUUe5IihF_Swi4BAPqdxaZdTrwsyjUxmNsMYdCFHU&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=5)
* * *
### **A Governor for All Oregonians**
Betsy is committed to being a governor who knows there is Oregon south of Eugene and east of Bend. She recently talked with Capital Press about how she is committed to representing and advocating for rural Oregonians and farming and ranching communities. [click to READ the article](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=k86734wDIksP5lP1Iwzmc-h1FuL9BzJcQ1Pw_YYsj5kk9GHwt5g154OcPAw6XdKZV5hKHK9AqHcT255mDKJZxFoua_kh9Oc3JSi33xeB5jH9Uy0iLfN-SdeiD5FOYRB9TIlIoe-UdmYFqEFJQ1AU23PoRrm7sTAAEi6tGAP01N9SS1-6rTecQ55qtZ2MtaM5exql5LIq7rGqSWfVIAQkig&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=6)
* * *
### **Betsy on Wildfires**
Oregon is burning. As Betsy has said, the feds are bad neighbors who let their trees burn. When Betsy is governor, the state will put out fires. Listen to her recent message on wildfires in the link below. [Click to watch the video](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRarfXM-utbx8kQf9gI7UFbG&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=7) [](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRarfXM-utbx8kQf9gI7UFbG&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_week_in_brigade_news_3&n=8)
* * *

name: Brad Pfaff
subject: Remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress
body:
Hello,

Wanted to send you a quick note to commemorate today’s anniversary.

I’m sure all of you remember where you were twenty-one years ago when our country was attacked, taking thousands of innocent lives. Today, I’m sitting in remembrance of that day and especially of the brave first responders and their families, many of whom still feel the effects of this terrible day.

In the aftermath of 9/11, our country came together, and it gives me hope that we’re still able to come together to fight for what we believe in. We can come together and reject hate and reject anti-democratic extremism. We can come together to make a better future for ALL of us.

Today, I’m spending time with my family reflecting on this tragedy and I hope you’ll join me in taking a moment to remember the victims of the September 11 attacks and the families who mourn them, and to celebrate the survivors.

Have a great rest of your Sunday.

– Brad

Paid for by Pfaff for Congress

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: 21 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Today, we reflect on one of the most solemn days our country endured.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50562794/366328488/1483338674?refcode=EM_C_220911Cultivation_C_6_ALL_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzdlNDQxYy0xMTMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-8Bln-TvRjeydYVy2U3MC-XECqj0k40nvJHn5pxvU0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50562795/366328489/1483338674?refcode=EM_C_220911Cultivation_C_6_ALL_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzdlNDQxYy0xMTMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_-8Bln-TvRjeydYVy2U3MC-XECqj0k40nvJHn5pxvU0=) Friend,

Today, I join each of you in a time of mourning and reflection over the events of September 11, 2001.

Twenty-one years ago, terrorists wreaked havoc on our nation, killing almost 3,000 Americans in New York, Virginia, and Pennsylvania. Their actions catapulted a conflict in the Middle East that lasted more than two decades, finally coming to a close under the direction of President Biden.

As we look back on that solemn day, we are reminded of not only the beautiful souls our country lost to an act of such tragic violence but the courage and bravery each and every one of them exhibited down to their final moments. We also honor the first responders – from firefighters to police officers, to volunteers, and ultimately, to our men and women in the military – who sprung to action to save American lives at the sacrifice of their own.

This day will forever live in history as a time when our country stood strong, hand in hand, in the face of evil and vowed never to let it overcome our nation again.

Today, I remember the heroism, bravery, and selflessness shown so many years ago and in the years since, and I mourn the deaths of those we lost.

In remembrance,

Lisa Blunt Rochester ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=FDUQBeCnWayUINbD6h5dEwyrehk9d%2F2gy3ub0NEc45D7p0v4gicfBpaB%2B83IOE8ryCM9bTe3MM25ReOGSkE9%2B0rQFroE9%2BJKcZBpwx9l82Ac%2BN2aC9iwnmw6%2BMrQAKe0%2FTVVW4ODgTG%2BniKnqPDkFJM%2F75zC3dtO8mVjpk7AqpeyRDAklLDkw1cXly37t%2BYv%2Fml5yzmgarXVeveDHarWY8B3dYq6uDgAu29iHNj9tkMzyEHg9wMl0ZLWTWoM%2FbgWWd%2Bf9my2bZ1KeEBTxUVPjzNCM04hRHBgO0QztvM206sIXnpn9nolCVu7gG%2FcxbNN5gJokX3j9RqJvP9QT9eo%2BXqOyo3cOO7mw3cZ5SXhTsnp9ykjRtRv1l8d2cGQ6rnJyU1HEXSpH4T31VuXWGFG8PDHdjF9tm7qCAjl3XDMqxScqWPh2iltWAW6kw761QNB). ** **

Folks,
This is going to be an historic election. National political experts consider Florida a “key battleground” this year — and the outcome will impact fundamental rights like reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ equality.
This election will also determine the direction our state is heading — it will impact generations to come.
That’s **why we’re building a movement to WIN.** Our grassroots strategy has made this a closely contested election, and all the momentum is on our side. But we’re going up against millionaires and billionaires — they’re not just going to roll over and give up.

subject: What would you do with $48 million?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
Team, let's walk this back:

**Rick Caruso spent $41 million during the primary. $39 million was his own money.** Most people can’t fathom having that amount of money in their lifetime. Rick Caruso spends it like pocket change on things like yachts, malls, and anti-abortion candidates.

_And he just keeps on spending!_ Last week, Caruso's campaign indicated it intends to spend more than _$48 million_. We can't match that kind of outrageous spending dollar-for-dollar, and we don't have to. Instead, we need to build a grassroots campaign strong enough to defeat Caruso in November.
[**Any amount you contribute will help us strengthen Karen’s campaign and reach out to voters in the upcoming weeks. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e6405edbfe22406180802f50a4be5153&_e=QvN0H0W6VYRLddxnl-jzw4sonvV9ghp_CxpRHev2XGSRoSHmOTfnLF-Q5LuhWORGS4t6-SQkYx8XMFG0FSSjrS-tZvMV4La1PdZEwDKeN2rYGTAzPnaPDJRoXvfIxDFYYAtq_A8weaTBWwgnjn7Wc6CbhuQShhG_IJrybmlSGHAYaMgsGRB-E2-tndO-ztiHrLc2LPvHL_qDZBwuNAPbVkMKFwQxoKTOVYfXGjXYcH19inaciH79oY5VayAhD2a2bIQacYUn6F-ISNYm9LQ7TIP5GMjoM6V7-11h7fSSSTWOHpdRxIDivbLV79P-TZaQX3jgdseDv71cY1egCnEkC_I1ixtmVwL_qRUd4lFVc7qSSHnnPb5f0S1OajCzZr7RZ4CoVkBbXnLcLV9escSPXg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: Brenda Siegel
subject: Remembering those we lost
body:
| |
---
21 years ago today, we lost 2977 great Americans and likely many more. There are STILL hundreds of 1st responders dying from cancer and respiratory illness from the work they did at ground zero. For their work, their sacrifice, they have had to beg to be respected, covered and supported by elected leaders. **** It should be an easy yes to care for those who cared for us and yet it is not. Each hero that sacrificed their life, their health and their livelihood to try to support and save others should be a priority. Full Stop. **** I want to thank Bellows Falls, Grafton, Charleston & Proctorsville Fire Departments for hosting 'A Walk To Remember' this morning. We walked 3.43 miles for the fallen 1st responders. We must remember what they sacrificed to serve. Workers deserve to be protected & remembered.
---
|
---
On September 11, 2001, I was 5 months pregnant with my son. I was about to drive to Maryland from Vermont to work and was on the phone with my boss at the time, looking at the TV for weather and traffic. I turned it on as the planes were about to hit and watched them hit the twin towers. I watched in real time as people leapt out of the windows to their death. For days I lay awake asking myself what world we were bringing our children into, I could not fathom the horror of these events. I still have images of that moment. It was the start of a shift to persistent really hard times. **** That day many lost loved ones. Many gave their lives. Many leapt to their death. Many held their partners and their children. Many like me wondered what our children, the class of 2020, what their lives would be like. **** And still today, many suffer and are still dying. We can never forget, we must always remember and we MUST continue to care for those who were harmed on this tragic day 21 years ago. Thank you 1st responders across our state and country for all you do for our country and our communities.
---
Thank you, Brenda Siegel
---
|
---

subject: ICYMI - Vikram's Debate Performance Continues to Impress
body:
| | | | |
---
|
> ICYMI
> WMUR Analyst Praises Vikram's Debate Performance!
---
In-Case-You-Missed-It: On Close-Up this morning, WMUR political analyst Scott Spradling praised Vikram's debate performance last Thursday night, saying, "Vikram Mansharamani did a very, very good job offering ideas, offering solutions and answers to the questions...he's an impressive guy who gives really good, solid answers."
Since the debate, praise has been coming in from all corners, with people declaring that Vikram clearly won the debate. When rating the performances of the candidates, former GOP U.S. Senate nominee Corky Messner rated Vikram as number one.
And a poll taken after the debate has Vikram surging, with his support doubling!
With 48 hours until election day, Vikram is clearly on the move.

name: Katie Britt
subject: 21 Years Ago…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Peter,

Today is a day of somber and resolute remembrance across America.

On this day 21 years ago, our Nation was forever changed in an instant. These
heinous acts of terrorism took the lives of 2,977 Americans and fundamentally
shook our Country to its core.

The cowards that attacked America on that day attempted to strike at the heart
of freedom. But, we never let their fear control us: Americans from all walks
of life came together in the face of adversity to confront evil.

Since that day, our Country has changed forever - moms & dads missing from the
dinner table, aunts & uncles missing from family parties, sons & daughters gone
too soon.

The men and women who died on this day will never be forgotten and their
memories will live on forever. And it’s up to all of us to preserve and steward
their legacy.

Since that fateful day 21 years ago, we have come together as a Country and
have fought to defend freedom from those that wish to destroy it. Whether it be
on foreign soil or here at home, Americans always stand together when our
Country is threatened.

Today we remember and pray for the American lives lost on 9/11, and we pray
for their families and loved ones. Our Country mourns with them, not just
today, but everyday.

God bless,

Katie Britt

Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.
Don't want to receive these emails anymore?Unsubscribe
<http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_s=003b5e50f19e4d0aaf4aa3793724a41f&_t=1eYBTs1RMGYMZAs7e_22HiAI60CbC3Pa5HvYnxROSftthAbSoYI9gutr5e8PPq2FzO8q51_xYTdx49T5HW5RhSp-v6kV3TzVCokZ0eypAb0%3D>
Britt for Alabama, Inc., PO Box 3759, Montgomery, AL 36109

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: Remembering 9/11
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know that this anniversary hits close to home for many of us. To all who are struggling, please know that I am thinking of you and sending my wishes for peace and light.

|
---
| | Dear friends, On this day 21 years ago, our nation experienced a tragedy that we must never forget. Thousands of innocent people were killed in attacks on the World Trade Center, the Pentagon, and in Stonycreek Township, Pennsylvania. Today, we grieve for each and every one of them. We hold moments of solemn reflection for the families who lost loved ones, for the members of our community who still suffer health consequences, and to the countless lives changed forever by terrorism and war. We also express our profound gratitude for the first responders who defined bravery and sacrifice, and for the essential workers who stepped up to help New York, Pennsylvania, and Washington return to life after devastation. I know this anniversary hits close to home for many of us. If you’re struggling today, please know that I am thinking of you and sending my wishes for peace and light. Together in unity, tolerance, and strength, Patty Pansing Brooks
---
