**_VIRGINIA TO RECEIVE $16.61M_** Attorney General Miyares is happy to share that Virginia is expected to receive $16.61 million over 6 to 10 years in a nationwide bipartisan settlement with leading e-cigarette manufacturer JUUL Labs. **JUUL targeted young people, including minors, with deceptive campaigns and misled the public.** Read AG Miyares’ statement _[**HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=1d708172c9bf4af191e5a98b11949071&_e=dubuNEoxtLXjuWnVSiTQRmFgP2qedBJEuu1xvD6v5J_g2Z6DHUF_WbJOaJrYeQGpFkni9s2i6094xZH-0fZmQqHLEmxpmPvV1xM9uXWQb9A1RpnrF-ZJyXsMHWxqDDtgM6F0RaYlOEPTwSF6CkI5RkknV_IqhYfoiuq2gesYEWxn1o9iPrUYt-GTWleJKGqY83XUlo6h2JgIMGwREeTVGKTuClghdzqTriJqGRdEcJiz7D5mUdq3f5hOL-BJsOUBBIyZrMgDNXmrHc1MGtrtHSfw3mGIIm7r2iUVGOPEeKahPmhDb7ysgj2bS0FYzicSpwf4YaEk8JfwFBQUCDSRJB6b1zQ2YGyl6JOo_Aquhcc%3D)_. **Attorney General Miyares Announces New Election Integrity Unit ** This unit will provide legal advice to the Department of Elections, investigate and prosecute violations of Virginia election law, work with the election community throughout the year to ensure uniformity and legality in application of election laws, and work with law enforcement to ensure legality and purity in elections. The purpose of the unit is to provide advice, support, and resources to ensure that Virginia election law continues to be applied in a uniform manner, and increase confidence in our state elections. _“I pledged during the 2021 campaign to work to increase transparency and strengthen confidence in our state elections. It should be easy to vote, and hard to cheat. The Election Integrity Unit will work to help to restore confidence in our democratic process in the Commonwealth,”_**said Attorney General Miyares.** Click _[**HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=1d708172c9bf4af191e5a98b11949071&_e=dubuNEoxtLXjuWnVSiTQRmFgP2qedBJEuu1xvD6v5J_g2Z6DHUF_WbJOaJrYeQGpFkni9s2i6094xZH-0fZmQlbJip_LNTgQ3ZETzQPveFIfPuCEEoNouESte3uxvYX1Z9QqsHWup2xamuZbUrbtmOK66V7xxGUtdKa2BEmWVy-RBNIzDZRYIMfMfyC40ypvs45EObsG71hRHZl_3OnGyGuJNNHjSz8DFU9p2AvYlkqhDlHBMnfXQ15GgElwv-plN05Xp-50JM9I0AA4Bss1eAhGIz6LcyaXajWsZwCukyDgTxUYRjOWku7qlogRIiHytO-Jq_XE82imWeOGYK_4qwA115E7NzRytH57AZH2CD8%3D)_ to read more of the announcement.

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians. VIRGINIA TO RECEIVE $16.61M Attorney General Miyares is happy to share that Virginia is expected to receive $16.61 million over 6 to 10 years in a nationwide bipartisan settlement with leading e-cigarette manufacturer JUUL Labs. JUUL targeted young people, including minors, with deceptive campaigns and misled the public. Read AG Miyares’ statement . Attorney General Miyares Announces New Election Integrity Unit This unit will provide legal advice to the Department of Elections, investigate and prosecute violations of Virginia election law, work with the election community throughout the year to ensure uniformity and legality in application of election laws, and work with law enforcement to ensure legality and purity in elections. The purpose of the unit is to provide advice, support, and resources to ensure that Virginia election law continues to be applied in a uniform manner, and increase confidence in our state elections. “I pledged during the 2021 campaign to work to increase transparency and strengthen confidence in our state elections. It should be easy to vote, and hard to cheat. The Election Integrity Unit will work to help to restore confidence in our democratic process in the Commonwealth,”said Attorney General Miyares. Click to read more of the announcement. | | | | A Fairfax County family is living in fear after their house was violently broken into while they were home. | | | | | “The horrific nightmare that this family is enduring is one that no Virginian should ever experience,” . “Sadly, putting criminals before victims has become commonplace in Fairfax County. In order to keep our communities and our families safe, we must prosecute repeat, violent offenders and keep them behind bars. That is not happening in Fairfax County, and law-abiding Virginians are paying the price.” Attorney General Miyares Read this family’s entire story. The Investigation Continues. | | on the image above to watch Attorney General Miyares speaking earlier this week about the Virginia Supreme Court’s Loudoun County investigation ruling. In Case You Missed It... | | This week, the General Assembly of Virginia convened for a special session, and EVs were a prevalent topic when discussing the upcoming 2023 general session. Attorney General Miyares reinforced his opposition to Virginia being tied to the regulatory laws of California when speaking with WJLA. Click see what AG Miyares had to say when asked about EVs this week. | | Until next time,Team Miyares | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23451 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| Friend, As I'm writing this we have**just two days** until Granite Staters cast their votes across our state, and I ask for your vote! I'm proud of my record of accomplishments in New Hampshire. As Senate President, I worked with Governor Chris Sununu to pass the most conservative and fiscally responsible budget in our state’s history. **_Our history of getting the job done for New Hampshire is exactly why I earned his endorsement in this campaign._** Here's some things I need you to do over the next two days: **1\. VOTE** \- Find your polling locations and times here: [https://morse2022.com/election-day](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTM1Nzg4NzYzNzgxOTI4JmM9ejJtOCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTMzODYyJmQ9azZnNWQ5cA==.0KPgLUEM8MfaFFy3fEgkOoFY4O_Pk-vunTvU5mqNThs) **2\. HOLD SIGNS AT POLLS** \- Our team needs your help in filling as many polling shifts as possible! Sign up here: [https://morse2022.com/sign-holding](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTM1Nzg4NzYzNzgxOTI4JmM9ejJtOCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTMzODY1JmQ9aTdwMm82dw==.pyW_n0baZWhJM_O3JUjVvXUVyTgOqVS8zRwIUToNcvk) **3\. RETWEET THE CAMPAIGN AND REPOST THE CAMPAIGN** \- I am going everywhere, so follow me on [Facebook](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTM1Nzg4NzYzNzgxOTI4JmM9ejJtOCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTMzODY4JmQ9bDJuNHIxdw==.k2ENQNvLnghqOwpJhNtHfJnKkv-ueNEa2nBvzgzFIjM) and on [Twitter](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTM1Nzg4NzYzNzgxOTI4JmM9ejJtOCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTMzODcyJmQ9bTFtNXY3bg==.L89IlE16STyo3VNtJehTB9u-SSM67zGtktcv7WGVTtU) and share the posts and retweet me so I can get our message out there. **4\. ATTEND MY PRIMARY NIGHT VICTORY PARTY** \- Join us Tuesday night at Tuscan Kitchen in Salem for our victory party! RSVP here: [https://morse2022.com/primary-night](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTM1Nzg4NzYzNzgxOTI4JmM9ejJtOCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTMzODc2JmQ9eDVyMm04cg==.1j-hBAEiuR2y8-_uf06cDnvx1kqH0J4i8btSCX60Rzc) **5\. STOCK UP ON SIGNS AND TOTEMS -** Come to the Campaign Headquarters at 284 North Broadway, Salem, NH 03079 to grab signs and totem materials for Tuesday! On Election Day, if you encounter difficulty voting or have any concerns, please utilize the Republican Party's Election Integrity Alert system: Email: [help@nh.protectthevote.com](mailto:help@nh.protectthevote.com)
Web form: [https://newhampshire.protectthevote.com/hc/en-us](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTM1Nzg4NzYzNzgxOTI4JmM9ejJtOCZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTMzODgyJmQ9eDh5NmIybQ==.9VxyMn-ICZfh4gGJY-sKknrMdrJkxgz_cpLCEA5L5pk) Thank you for all that you're doing for this campaign. To Victory, **_
_****_Chuck Morse_** Candidate for U.S. Senate

subject: A few takeaways from our meeting >>
body:
We just wrapped up a team meeting and we wanted to show you what the DLCC has in store wit | | |
---
| | **We just wrapped up a team meeting and I wanted to show you my notes. Here’s what the DLCC has in store with midterms just around the corner:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xT87Do081Peey8mbiuSK7m_snEUWh5MQYEeF41v3nhyJu8ci78NrmnkxNVMOgf2xrn0mR_81OUiAeWqcLCzkXDPlPMzKOhnvFANXBrFgh-0-uvTRpN_LuIDh90cjUgkH49icnTY3fpMgdxK23rrQhobOPU6BllP0JIJZF4GkkOpAshDeMJSPrOxCsDAfaiRV_QfY7q99zVy4Ar-n2uYrC_Gbn6GA1ityC3m9SNOemdtpuwUq1yoZK8qeSm5XQ-smeQoSbUk2nBiZp1SO-yudLTpUTgQrFYIVFgiufj2Kf8bTmnJeO1aXf25glNPdadZ_QGVisknSQyLyV6T15K0n3BA3fa_8ZQ7VhiFRicjeDEnIyBCVJG8LxTB7OPvvgjgSAiDTlOKKLibCXmePwEw7qW/3pd/OQUHDlIAQkqkU1NZ2f9TRA/h0/pE_QttyEemxPq-ga_uyBxeU25DARzn62ufAUt62goeo) Thanks to strong grassroots supporters (like you!), we’ve already been able to provide digital support to key caucuses and knock on a million doors and counting. But with November 8th quickly approaching, we’ve developed a foolproof plan to elect more Democrats at the state level. **The bad news is that without the full strength of our supporters behind us, our plan won’t work.** **[_The stakes are high, but our team is ready to take on the challenges that lie ahead. name: Josh Hawley
subject: Never Forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
---
21 years ago today, life as we knew it changed forever. On September 11, 2001, America experienced unprecedented terrorist attacks that left nearly 3,000 dead.

On the anniversary of this tragedy, we all remember where we were when we heard the news, and for many of us, we watched the television coverage in shock and sadness. Throughout that day, we worried about our loved ones and prayed for those that lost family and friends in the horrific incident.

Today- we remember those who lost their lives on 9/11 and the heroism of every first responder. Time marches on, but our memory of that day remains the same. The legacy of those lost will live on forever in their story of sacrifice. May God bless America and watch over the families affected by 9/11.
---
\- Josh Hawley
---
| |
---

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Never Forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Today, we remember the victims of September 11, 2001, and honor the bravery of the ordinary citizens and first responders who went above and beyond to save lives.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50561817/366321577/-876189841?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODY1NzIxYi0wODMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvMVsMXTk3I4B7WXYapd_w_EAlmGGCe7l9TEnC2mkz4=&emci=21f21144-6130-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=7865721b-0832-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=32654120)
---
Friend,

Today, we reflect upon twenty-one years since the deadliest terror attack ever carried out on U.S. soil. We memorialize the victims of September 11, 2001, and commemorate those ordinary citizens and first responders who showed the utmost bravery under pressure and saved countless lives.

To all in my district who lost someone that day or were affected by the aftermath, my heart goes out to you. I will continue to advocate for policies that will properly honor the victims and aid the survivors — including the proper funding and application of the September 11 Victim Compensation Fund, which pays out claims for those impacted by deaths, injuries, and other lasting impacts from this horrible attack.

I often think back to the unity of purpose that Americans felt so many years ago following this tragic day. Today, as our country once again faces monumental and existential challenges, it is my hope that we are able to recognize once again the value of loving and helping one another, for it is this very spirit that helps make America strong.

Sincerely,

Jennifer

PO Box 650550
Sterling, VA 20165
United States

name: Jen Jordan
subject: A solemn anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc
body:
Today, we honor those who lost their lives in the horrific events of September 11th, 2001, and commemorate the heroism of the first responders and ordinary citizens who rose to the occasion and saved countless lives.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50561930/366321962/-1867392001?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY1YWRjYS0wOTMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7HD4U7iBe9bPLDVbeZPQoCSj1KVHrPgsaHrBMMH6H9k=&emci=60c60662-4d31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=44f5adca-0932-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168)
---
Friend,

In the fall of 2001, I was clerking for the Honorable Tony Alaimo in the Southern District of Georgia. On the morning of September 11th, we were called to the judge’s chambers to watch the news after the first plane hit the World Trade Center. We could do nothing but watch in horror as the second plane hit.

The U.S. Marshal wanted to lock down the Courthouse and get the judge to safety, but Judge Alaimo refused. In the face of this heinous act, he knew the importance of showing that our nation’s institutions and the rule of law were still intact.

Judge Alaimo spent most of World War II in a Nazi POW camp after his plane was shot down by the Germans. He deeply understood the importance of holding true to one’s values under the greatest pressure, when we are tested beyond what we believe is possible. When I reflect upon September 11, 2001, the moral resolve shown by Judge Alaimo and so many others is what sticks with me the most.

What happened on this day has forever changed us as a country. But we must not let it break us. As we honor those who lost their lives, we hold true that America is its strongest when we stand united in love of country and for all people.

Today, I’m taking time to honor those who lost their lives in the horrific events of September 11th, and to commemorate the heroism of the first responders and ordinary citizens who rose to the occasion and saved countless lives.

We must continue the work of making our country safer and stronger, and we must never compromise our principles in doing so.

Sincerely,

Jen Jordan | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50561931/366321963/-737921463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY1YWRjYS0wOTMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7HD4U7iBe9bPLDVbeZPQoCSj1KVHrPgsaHrBMMH6H9k=&emci=60c60662-4d31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=44f5adca-0932-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50561932/366321964/1663983557?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY1YWRjYS0wOTMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7HD4U7iBe9bPLDVbeZPQoCSj1KVHrPgsaHrBMMH6H9k=&emci=60c60662-4d31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=44f5adca-0932-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50561933/366321965/1489251599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY1YWRjYS0wOTMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7HD4U7iBe9bPLDVbeZPQoCSj1KVHrPgsaHrBMMH6H9k=&emci=60c60662-4d31-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&emdi=44f5adca-0932-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&ceid=32707168)

body:
# [#]
Team,

I’m proud to be on the frontlines to elect more California Democrats to Congress and House. My team and I are working around the clock to win in November to protect our diverse communities, protect access to healthcare, protect the environment and to give everyone an equal opportunity.

With uncertainty of which party will control the Congress, Hispanic Dems are heavily investing in the race to make sure the Democrats hold onto the House.

Will you be able to join us today in the fight against a GOP toss-up this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lofgren-victory-fund-1?&contactdata=u4ZTGx5ggHzp24Cr/c/bn3jhd2njrg/bVGbCJ6dJVtXBHOvd+o8psgfvdrppGFeJrvYe7TfHBkVIV++fu8aU3aKzvMgoKGt7cXMV8RwQfT3gY5ibse2jYAi76tbWJB7UQDbV1/gmz9Kol5/Q1TqM3A==&refcode2=f218ce4b-0c32-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&amount=10]

Republican Rep. David Valadao’s seat will most likely decide which party controls Congress and the GOP are stacking their funds in the fall to help Valado. We can’t risk anything at this point – which is why we need your help.

Please consider donating to help us fight back against Republicans’ super PAC and their attempts to buy this election → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lofgren-victory-fund-1?&contactdata=u4ZTGx5ggHzp24Cr/c/bn3jhd2njrg/bVGbCJ6dJVtXBHOvd+o8psgfvdrppGFeJrvYe7TfHBkVIV++fu8aU3aKzvMgoKGt7cXMV8RwQfT3gY5ibse2jYAi76tbWJB7UQDbV1/gmz9Kol5/Q1TqM3A==&refcode2=f218ce4b-0c32-ed11-ae83-281878b83d8a&amount=10]

Thank you,

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS

| Hi there,

Last week our team sent an email asking if you were registered to vote.

**_But I just checked and we’re still missing your response!_**

name: John Legend
subject: there’s no telling the damage they’ll do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1009&amount=25&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]A personal message from John Legend

Friend,

Democrat Tim Ryan is in a dead heat race for Ohio’s open Senate seat and
he needs our help.

You might not know this, but I was born into a blue-collar family in
Springfield, Ohio. My dad was a factory worker. My mom was a tailor. And I
got my start in music singing in the church choir.

I’ve never forgotten where I come from—I know the challenges Ohio families
are facing, because my family faced them too. That’s how I know Ohio needs
Tim Ryan in the Senate.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1010&amount=25&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Republicans are spending millions and working overtime to defeat Tim.
Will you join me in supporting his campaign by making a contribution of
whatever you can to win this crucial race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1011&amount=25&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Donate

There’s a real struggle happening in our country between love and
fear—between advancing civil rights for everyone or stripping them away,
between treating refugees with compassion or as criminals, between lifting
up working families or continuing to punish poverty.

Republicans are actively working to take us in the wrong direction, down
the path of fear. If they take back the Senate, there’s no telling the
damage they’ll do.

Right now, Tim Ryan is neck-and-neck with his Republican opponent JD Vance
in a race that will decide control of the Senate, and ultimately, the kind
of country we live in.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1012&amount=25&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Tim needs your help to pull ahead. I’m personally asking you to make a
donation to his campaign to help him win this important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1013&amount=25&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1014&amount=50&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1015&amount=100&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1016&amount=200&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1007&amount=250&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/21388?t=1008&amount=30&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]Other Amount

Together, we can make sure that love wins in Ohio.

Thanks,

John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=5454%2E3611125%2EDKHzTo ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

[ ]Tim needs your help to pull ahead. I’m personally asking you to make a donation to his campaign to help him win this important race. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Together, we can make sure that love wins in Ohio. Thanks, John Legend [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. name: Chuck Morse
subject: We will never forget 9/11/01.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTY1ODcwMTQ0Mjk3Mjg2JmM9djliNSZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTQ3NzAwJmQ9ZjN3MnA5Zg==.AmgsK4V4ydAnUAtN1lLfhhzlaX-CnJPUv5dbk-gFE_E)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTY1ODcwMTQ0Mjk3Mjg2JmM9djliNSZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTQ3NzA4JmQ9dDZxNGQ1aA==.a1_wxIJIBi332v3E_r0v0GHtpm0zXY4Xcj2sPTHCU8o)
---
| | | **
**Derek,**
** Our election may be right around the corner, but it’s important to take time for somber reflection today. 21 years ago, the September 11th terrorist attacks changed our country forever. We will Never Forget the lives that were lost, the sacrifice of our first responders, or the resilience that our country showed in the aftermath. Thank you for joining me in paying respects to the fallen and their families.**_
_**
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDM3MTY1ODcwMTQ0Mjk3Mjg2JmM9djliNSZlPTAmYj0xMDE1NTQ3NzE1JmQ9cDVhN2IxcA==.0QNm9eGSy3IUkXSMHf9hY1bNk-jcYFIGR3cWI7-SvAA)
---
| | |
Today, we mourn the thousands of innocent American lives that were lost in senseless acts of terror. We thank our first responders for their tremendous bravery that saved countless lives that day, as well as our heroic military members who were called into action in response to these attacks. And lastly, we remember that while this day broke the hearts of many, it could not break the spirit of the United States of America – the greatest nation on Earth. **We will never forget September 11, 2001.** God Bless America, _Chuck Morse_ __

---
---

---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Sorry to be so direct but we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We need a big fundraising day today!
#

[**Friends — can you please make your first $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept22.nZ-xom&refcode=em220911-2-7&t=1&akid=3769%2E6688874%2ErQLoSD)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept22.nZ-xom&refcode=em220911-2-7&t=2&akid=3769%2E6688874%2ErQLoSD)**
Sorry to be so direct, but our last FEC fundraising deadline before the election is coming up quickly.
This is the most important deadline of the campaign, because at the end of this month we’re legally required to report how much we’ve raised. Everyone — the media, our allies, our opponents — will be watching.
And what we report will influence their spending in the final weeks of the election. We can’t show any weakness and risk a barrage of attack ads so close to the start of voting.
So, we need a big fundraising day today to stay on track to hit our contribution goals and make sure Mark has the resources to win.
As of this morning, we have a long way to go, but we’re confident that with your support we can get where we need to be before the end of the month.
So, as we approach our fundraising deadline, we have to ask:
[**If you are able, can you please make your first $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take A LOT of people chipping in to reach our goal.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept22.nZ-xom&refcode=em220911-2-7&t=3&akid=3769%2E6688874%2ErQLoSD)

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Far-right billionaires ❤️ Ted Budd 💰¯\_(ツ)_/¯💰
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
If you want to hear from Ted Budd, you better buy a ticket to one of his max-out fundraisers.
#
If you want to hear from Ted Budd, you better buy a ticket to one of his max-out fundraisers. Those are the only folks he is available to, and that’s exactly what all of his corporate special interest allies and far-right billionaires are doing, as they rake in massive sums to try to buy this seat.
First, Ted got his buddies here to help him host a fundraiser with the wealthy and well-connected in Nantucket:
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220911-2-MA&t=1&akid=1699%2E357359%2E91JENA)
Then Mitch McConnell joined the party and held ANOTHER max-out fundraiser for Ted Budd:
[](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220911-2-MA&t=2&akid=1699%2E357359%2E91JENA)
If we don't do everything we can to organize and reach every North Carolina voter, then corporate interests and wealthy far-right insiders will be able to buy this seat for a corrupt politician who will do their bidding.
[**Please make a contribution to Cheri Beasley's campaign for U.S. Senate today. While Ted Budd hides behind closed doors with the Republican elite, grassroots support is the heart of our campaign and our best chance to flip this seat.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-sep22.KSPoKB&refcode=em220911-2-MA&t=3&akid=1699%2E357359%2E91JENA)

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: CNN: “The key governor’s races to watch this fall”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Our movement has always been driven by the dedication of individual, small-dollar donors like you.
#
We want to talk about why this month is so important for our campaign.
At the end of this month, our campaign will submit our next public report to the Texas Ethics Commission detailing how much we’ve raised in the last three months.
As one of CNN’s “key governor’s races to watch this fall,” Beto’s report will draw huge attention from pundits, powerful special interests, and our own opponent who are all hoping to see our grassroots movement lose momentum.
Beto has spent this past month unifying voters all across Texas: From holding Greg Abbott fully accountable for his extreme abortion ban, to exposing what’s at stake if we don’t enact commonsense gun laws, to laying out our plans to expand Medicaid, pay teachers a living wage, and finally fix the power grid.
We know that whenever Beto uses his voice to call out cruelty and fight for the people, those special interests will look for ways to put a stop to our movement.
That’s why it’s critical that September is our best fundraising month yet. The number of contributions we receive — no matter the amount — will help show that Beto and our unapologetic fight for the future of Texas has strong support — from Cresco and across the country.
[**Can you make a $3 contribution right now to show your support for Beto on this report and help our campaign hit this critical fundraising goal before the end of the month?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220911-2.CDoxPp&refcode=ema20220911-207399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=207399%2E444211%2EfuJwZM)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220911-2.CDoxPp&refcode=ema20220911-207399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=207399%2E444211%2EfuJwZM)**
Our movement has always been driven by the dedication of individual, small-dollar donors like you giving what they can afford. Because when hundreds of thousands of people chip in $5, $10, and $20 at a time, it all adds up to compete against the special interests and corporations who use their money to rig the political system in their favor.
But, candidly, our fundraising has slowed down since the beginning of the month, and we’re relying on your support today to get back on track, hit this goal, and send Beto to Austin fighting for real solutions for Texas families.
[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help post the strongest TEC report possible and power Beto to victory this November?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220911-2.CDoxPp&refcode=ema20220911-207399&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=207399%2E444211%2EfuJwZM)
This campaign wouldn’t be possible without you.
Thank you for everything,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220911-207399-footer&t=22&refcode2=207399_444211_fuJwZM&akid=207399%2E444211%2EfuJwZM)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=207399%2E444211%2EfuJwZM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=207399%2E444211%2EfuJwZM)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Never Forget
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50562661/366328239/-2123748265?refcode=fl_email_na_20220911neverforget_wm_odpf90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjJkNDY5Zi0xMDMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UcJUR3ct-WV09ApGsWDqivGu9cV7ld6Of2VIsEtC_yI=)
---
Friend, Today is September 11, the 21st anniversary of the 9/11 terrorist attacks on our country — a devastating moment in history we must never forget. Every year, I pray for the families that lost loved ones — including 69 Marylanders — on this tragic day, the heroes who ran toward the chaos, and the countless lives that have been forever changed since. “Leave no one behind” — the mission of my military service and the core tenet of this campaign — embodies the heroism and sacrifice of every brave first responder that day. In 2001, I had been a first lieutenant in the Army for just three months when the world changed forever on 9/11. So many lives changed. The world changed. We can never forget the service and sacrifice of so many on that day, and in the 21 years since. We must continue to remember 9/11 by honoring the victims and their families, and by serving others. Elevate, Wes | | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading nonprofit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---

he’s doing the dishes now
| | |
---
Hi friend – [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50565444/366354916/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1990-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWEwN2I2ZS0zMzMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG6Y_PW_LXEpKT_U0Q4IynWKf7s731BmRR8Jtn8pH6s=)

This is Catherine writing to you. My husband, Paul, and I just finished up dinner. We had a nice chat about memories over these last 23 years together – including standing on stage together the night I became America’s first Latina senator. He’s doing the dishes now, so I thought I’d get a quick note out to you ahead of tonight's midnight fundraising deadline.😊

I remembered something important in talking about memories with my husband tonight: First, I’ve been fortunate to have Paul by my side during two challenging battleground races for U.S. Senate. But I’ve been doubly fortunate, friend, because I also have you and this amazing grassroots team fighting hard alongside me.
So, I trust I can be upfront with you: I’m in the political fight of my life, and our country’s future is at stake. After the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Republicans are scheming to pass a national ban on abortion. They only need to flip one seat to take back Senate control and impose their radical agenda on our country – and CNN just named me the most vulnerable Democratic senator in America. With polling that shows me 1 point behind my GOP opponent, I simply cannot afford to fall short of critical goals like this.
**That’s why I have to ask: Will you help me retake the lead and defend our Democratic Senate majority by rushing a grassroots donation, split between me and Jacky Rosen? Please use this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_ccm](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50565445/366354917/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1990-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWEwN2I2ZS0zMzMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG6Y_PW_LXEpKT_U0Q4IynWKf7s731BmRR8Jtn8pH6s=)**
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine

subject: we’re standing up for democratic values
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50565448/366356031/-472610390?amount=25&refcode=20220911_f_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM4YTMxZC0zNDMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYK9mN5vTqflrgHoiH3pamT8PQpdtWptnjNYNWDHcYk=)
---
Earlier this month, President Joe Biden gave a speech addressing the “Continued Battle for the Soul of the Nation” in which he made it clear just how high the stakes are for this year’s election.
President Biden's speech was a timely reminder that defending our democracy is an ongoing struggle. **More than ever, it's important that we elect leaders who stand for democratic values and oppose wannabe dictators everywhere.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/50565449/366356032/-472610390?amount=25&refcode=20220911_f_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM4YTMxZC0zNDMyLWVkMTEtYWU4My0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYK9mN5vTqflrgHoiH3pamT8PQpdtWptnjNYNWDHcYk=)
---
Charlie has always been led by his values. When he was governor of Florida, he stood up to big corporations and he restored voting rights to more than 150,000 deserving Floridians — not because it benefited him, but because it was the right thing to do. **We need principled leaders like Charlie who will fight for our shared democratic values.**
We’re so grateful that Joe Biden is our president, but now we need to secure our freedoms at the state level.

name: Abrams for Georgia
subject: need you to see this before you start the week, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Derek, some key
facts we need you to see as we start the week:

ONE: Polls show Stacey Abrams is currently neck and neck with Kemp.

TWO: Kemp is spending over $1,000,000 in new negative attack ads across
the state to slow down her momentum.

THREE: We’ve learned that Kemp recently released a new ad that tries to
distort Stacey’s record on abortion and reproductive rights.

We cannot allow these latest ads to go unanswered. We need to be clear:
Stacey will work to overturn Kemp’s extreme, dangerous and unpopular
abortion ban, defend reproductive rights and pursue reproductive justice.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220911_B2_KempAds_S1_T1_AFG_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=6754%2E1862389%2EIf4unm ]Please help us counter Kemp’s attacks by making your
first donation today.
Every dollar you contribute goes directly to electing Stacey Abrams the
next governor of Georgia — and we’re counting on your support before
Kemp’s latest lies sink in with voters.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220911_B2_KempAds_S1_T1_AFG_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=6754%2E1862389%2EIf4unm ]DONATE

Derek, with
Brian Kemp’s new ad, he is signaling that he will do or say whatever it
takes to hold on to power this November.

If we’re going to fire a dangerous and extreme incumbent governor, we have
to be able to rely on this grassroots team to power our work and defend
against everything he throws our way. We cannot afford to slow down now.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220911_B2_KempAds_S1_T1_AFG_30open_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=6754%2E1862389%2EIf4unm ]Can you pitch in $5 or any amount right now to support
Stacey Abrams? With your help, we can defeat Brian Kemp, win this race and
get to work for the people of Georgia.

Thank you for all you do,

Abrams for Georgia

931 Monroe Dr NE

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The world in the days after 9/11/01
disclaimer_text: Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://elissaforcongress.com/ [https://elissaforcongress.com/]
Friend,
Those of us who are old enough remember exactly where we were 21 years ago on September 11th, 2001. It was an event that defined an entire generation, and changed our country forever.
It was my second day of graduate school in New York City. It would ultimately begin my career in national security. Within a year, I was recruited by the CIA and within my first year at Langley I was sent on my first of three tours in Iraq alongside the military. Every year, as we remember those we’ve lost and the bravery of our first responders who ran *toward* the danger as the rest of us ran away, I think about what most stayed with me after being in the city that day: the way we came together.
For the weeks and months after the attack, strangers helped strangers — people of all backgrounds. In the face of such shock and tragedy, we were all on the same team, even in the traditionally gruff city of New York. For all the insanity of being attacked, I am so glad I got to experience life in our country in the months after. We embodied the idea that while we are very different, and we have lots of difficulties, as Americans we love this country and we want it to be a better place.
Today, after the ceremonies finished, my niece interviewed me about my experience on this day, 21 years ago, for a school project. As a child of a polarized time, I did my best to convey to her that it doesn’t have to be this way. That there have been and will again be moments when we come together, despite our differences.
Elissa

[https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/-/spacer.gif]

name: January 6th Committee Update (via DLCC)
subject: Do you think Ginni Thomas should be subpoenaed by the January 6th Committee?
body:
Rep. Liz Cheney just announced that the January 6th Committee may subpoena Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas. | | |
---
| | **BIG JANUARY 6TH UPDATE: Rep. Liz Cheney announced that the January 6th Committee may subpoena Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas.** Remember: **We already know that Ginni Thomas attempted to influence Arizona Republican lawmakers to overturn the results of the 2020 election.** We also know that Thomas sent messages to Trump’s Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, urging him to continue efforts to contest the 2020 election. And despite this, her husband has not recused himself from cases regarding the 2020 election! It’s unacceptable. **The January 6th Committee has asked Ginni Thomas to testify voluntarily, but she has yet to do so. What do you think?** [Should the Jan 6th committee subpoena Ginni Thomas? Liz Cheney announced that the January 6th Committee may subpoena Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Schwab?=
subject: Weekly Campaign Round-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwab for SOS, Matthew Goddard, Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

Today, we join together as a nation to remember the September 11, 2011 tragedy and honor the Americans who served their neighbors and our nation with bravery and strength. We must never forget the lives stolen from us 21 years ago and the power of our country.
---
|
---
| The Kansas Chamber has been a great partner as my administration works to reduce regulations and streamline the business formation process. I was honored to join the Chamber for a discussion on how we will continue serving entrepreneurs and business owners in a second term.
---
|
---
|
---
It was great to return to my roots in Barton County and spend the holiday weekend with friends in the 126th Annual Labor Day Parade! The Hoisington Parade has a great history of bringing Kansans together and celebrating the long weekend!
---
One of my favorite parts of traveling our state is running into friends! While in Hays, I stopped for lunch with Dr. Bill Clifford and Barb Wasinger - hard-working representatives from the Big First. It was an honor to spend time with them as we near the general election.
| Now, as we approach the general election, I encourage you to engage with the campaigns across the state. We must support the Republicans on the ballot and participate with our time and efforts. If you would like information on how you can join Team Schwab, please visit us [HERE](https://scottschwab.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=637dedc6f5c04616f44b83bbf&id=ec772fa1c1&e=e4cd931cf2).

Respectfully,
---
|
---
| Scott Schwab
Secretary of State

name: Liza Conrad
subject: Help Georgians get access to the ballot!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Hello Derek,

Our democracy is strongest when every voice can be heard. This year, under
Brian Kemp’s leadership, Georgia voters could once again face hurdles that
threaten their ability to simply exercise their constitutional right to
vote:

New barriers to voting by mail.

Thousands of bad-faith voter challenges.

Hours-long lines (just like 2018, the 2020 primary, the 2020 general, and
the 2021 runoffs).

And more.

But – make no mistake. Georgia is the cradle of the Civil Rights Movement,
and Georgians are resilient. We have never let voter suppression stop us,
and we have no plans to let up.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/2947?t=1002&akid=6753%2E1862389%2Exnf153 ]Our Voter Protection Team is working night and day to mitigate the
impact of Republicans’ 2021 anti-voting bill so that Georgians aren’t
forced to suffer through these unacceptable burdens, and we need your
help.

Will you join us as a Voter Protection Volunteer?

One Georgia is working with the Democratic Party of Georgia’s Coordinated
Campaign, Georgia Votes, to build the largest, most sophisticated Voter
Protection Program nationwide to ensure every eligible voter is able to
cast their ballot and have it count.

→ Have a few hours? Join our remote call squad to help build our voter
protection power, get critical information about elections, and more

Whether you can give a few hours or a few days, your time and energy are
necessary to protect the vote this fall. Once you sign up, a member of the
Georgia Votes team will follow up to schedule you for training. You do not
need to be a lawyer to sign up, and people who speak languages other than
English are highly encouraged.

No matter where you live, you can also power the Voter Protection Program
and all our critical efforts [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220911_B1_VoterProtectionVolunteer_S1_T1_TA_National&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1003&akid=6753%2E1862389%2Exnf153 ]by making a grassroots donation to our
campaign today.

In solidarity,

Liza Conrad

Senior Advisor for Voter Protection

One Georgia

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1992?refcode=sa_em_220911_B1_VoterProtectionVolunteer_S1_T1_TA_National&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1004&akid=6753%2E1862389%2Exnf153 ]Before you go, could you chip in $5 to ensure we have
the resources to spread her economic vision for Georgia’s future, where we
all can thrive? Donate today >>

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

+---------------------------------+
| PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
+---------------------------------+

Abrams for Governor
931 Monroe Dr NE
Ste A102 #363
Atlanta, GA 30308
United States

Contributions to Abrams for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical
tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let
us know if you would like to [ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1468?t=1001&akid=6753%2E1862389%2Exnf153 ]receive fewer emails or

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.staceyabrams.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6753%2E1862389%2Exnf153

name: Charles Booker
subject: We will never forget.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter:

Our world changed on September 11th, 2001. Many of us have specific
memories of the day.

Our nation vowed we will never forget the violence committed on that day,
the sacrifices made by thousands of people, civilians and first responders
alike, the grief of those who suffered.

America’s motto is E pluribus unum: out of many, one. It’s supposed to
represent the strength we can only have when we come together. But today,
in the wake of what Rand Paul has done to 9/11 first responders, it has a
different meaning for me.

Rand Paul stands alone in our country and in our Congress as the fiercest
opponent of critical funding for 9/11 first responders and victims.

In 2019, he did what most of us agree is unthinkable. He torpedoed an
unanimous motion to permanently invest in a fund for 9/11 first
responders. He was the sole objector.

When every other Senator was ready to provide for first responders, what
did Rand do? He stood up, and he talked about money.

His first words were: “It has long been my feeling that we need to address
our massive debt in this country.”

Peter, it is
absolutely shameful. There are no words for this kind of behavior, this
level of gross negligence and misfeasance. At this very moment, Rand is
blasting stations and screens across Kentucky with his declarations that
he’s fighting for freedom.

Freedom for who? Not for first responders. Not for veterans. Not for
seniors. This is who Rand always has been and always will be. Because what
did he do just last month? He tried to block the PACT Act.

Rand Paul hasn’t changed an ounce since he objected to the unanimous
motion in 2019. It was clear then, and it is clear now: Rand Paul is not
fit to be a Senator.

It’s our duty to look out for one another, to protect each other. That’s
what I was raised to do here in Kentucky. It’s what our senator should be
doing.

Never forget.

Together,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220911-2466-footer&t=1001&refcode2=2466_346206_wgca8o&akid=2466%2E346206%2Ewgca8o

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2466%2E346206%2Ewgca8o

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: John Fetterman
subject: Montgomery County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I *just* got off the stage at our BIG campaign rally.
#
Hey Derek, it’s John Fetterman.
I *just* got off the stage at our BIG campaign rally in Montgomery County.
**[Before I ask you to chip in $5 to support my campaign to defeat Dr. Oz + flip PA, just take a look at this CROWD!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-2?refcode=em20220911-7211&refcode2=7211_434096_3r0DDk&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-2?refcode=em20220911-7211&refcode2=7211_434096_3r0DDk&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)
On the day of the Eagles season opener, no less! 🤯
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-2?refcode=em20220911-7211&refcode2=7211_434096_3r0DDk&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)
In all seriousness, it was great to be back in Montgomery County, Derek. 🥰
The people I met with today know that the future of reproductive freedom is on the line this year. And together, we rallied with leaders from across PA + the nation to take on Republicans like Dr. Oz working to strip away abortion rights.
**I’m serious when I say it has never been more important to expand our Senate majority.** We need to abolish the filibuster and codify Roe into law... we can’t afford to elect a quack celebrity doctor like Oz who wants to take away abortion rights + *literally* called all abortions “murder.”
**Send me to the U.S. Senate in November, and I’ll *proudly* be that 51st vote to protect abortion rights nationwide.**
**[If you’re with me, please add a donation of any amount to my campaign today. Dr. Oz + national Republicans are spending million$ to buy this Senate seat, but we’re building the grassroots team that’s going to flip PA 🔵 this November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-2?refcode=em20220911-7211&refcode2=7211_434096_3r0DDk&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)**
**[Contribute Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220911-2?amount=5&refcode=em20220911-7211&refcode2=7211_434096_3r0DDk&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)**
My message to Dr. Oz + the Republicans is simple: **Don’t f*ck with anyone’s reproductive freedom.** And after today’s rally, I know PA has my back.
There are only 58 days standing between us + Election Day.
Let’s make them count,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Democratic Nominee for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220911-7211-footer&t=1&refcode2=7211_434096_3r0DDk&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=7211%2E434096%2E3r0DDk)

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Never Forget the horrors that 9/11 unleashed
body:
From torture and indefinite detention to wars of aggression and random drone strikes, humanity continues to pay the price of American belligerence.
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in browser](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=72906024&utm_source=email)
---
# [Never Forget the horrors that 9/11 unleashed](https://substack..mnJyyJ-oBFET6cKpCeEyXfZZ9bsDQuDL0DBfkFuiprg?)
### From torture and indefinite detention to wars of aggression and random drone strikes, humanity continues to pay the price of American belligerence.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7faeddcb-db02-4776-96e5-d5b8357592a4?r=1hvr60)| [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/7faeddcb-db02-4776-96e5-d5b8357592a4?r=1hvr60)| | Sep 11
---|---
For 21 years, America's global empire has used a set of attacks on U.S. soil as the pretext for wars of aggression and human rights abuses including torture, indefinite detention without charge of trial, and mass surveillance.
**What do you recall on 9/11?**
Many today recall the tragedies of September 11, 2001. I am more driven to recall the vastly greater horrors unleashed by the bipartisan response that continues to drive international conflict today, a generation later.
I've done so much writing, [speaking](https://substack.com/redirect/b7757232-0bcb-4c25-bf97-8fc92756bdf6?r=1hvr60), and [organizing](https://substack.com/redirect/65f5bbda-d996-4124-b408-07c1f12eb427?r=1hvr60) challenging the constitutional crises resulting from so-called "national security" efforts that my concerns are frankly difficult to summarize. From [wars](https://substack.com/redirect/dcd0f467-8113-4b4b-98da-5e90629b8653?r=1hvr60) for profit to [threats](https://substack.com/redirect/b2415a71-db57-4a56-8af1-aab648cde5fe?r=1hvr60) to freedom of conscience and [evasions](https://substack.com/redirect/5b3fdc0a-cc57-4ee8-8751-0bf2454d8a34?r=1hvr60) of congressional oversight--and from institutional [corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/67db0fe8-f589-46fb-887b-7685d8e75f65?r=1hvr60) to the [pattern](https://substack.com/redirect/6364f542-82f0-40f7-bbf2-92ba6e69d7a6?r=1hvr60) of civil liberties abuses insulating programs like corporate fossil fuel extraction from grassroots critique, resistance, and accountability--these issues are frankly much more serious than mere life or death.
What hangs in the balance is the legacy of our civilization. Will the words that we have committed to paper (and even stone) have any meaning? Or will they instead remain rhetorical flourishes providing a veneer of legitimacy to a system that has grown sadly rotten to its core?
My critiques of the national security racket are vast, spanning dozens of [articles](https://substack.com/redirect/12c2b8e8-2ef5-4568-aa19-d6337ae5d716?r=1hvr60) and [interviews](https://substack.com/redirect/dcd0f467-8113-4b4b-98da-5e90629b8653?r=1hvr60), as well as a [chapter](https://substack.com/redirect/250476f7-bee2-4d1d-994e-93754cc69d32?r=1hvr60) in a book published by Project Censored, dozens of [songs](https://substack.com/redirect/0e30c9ed-1a29-474d-ac17-6251704ad6db?r=1hvr60) and poems, a [music video](https://substack.com/redirect/54d67792-98ba-4c29-85c7-e4460f156b2c?r=1hvr60), and countless [speeches](https://substack.com/redirect/e58cbc4f-2732-4619-b4c1-7494a082491b?r=1hvr60) and public performances.
In 2015, I shared a poem at a Witness Against Torture event in Washington, DC decrying the anniversary of indefinite detention & torture at Guantanamo Bay. My poem recalled how "the presidents change, but the abuses go on" from impunity for torture to arbitrary drone strikes.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9efd904d-b2cb-48bc-9dc8-7fc894703ddd?r=1hvr60)
My latest song is a tech-house diss track for the Criminal Intelligence Agency. I'd hoped to post it today, but still need a few more days before it's ready for public consumption. Stay tuned....
**Why all this matters**
Democrats in Washington have spent no end of time and energy decrying the authoritarian aspirations of the GOP. Looking beyond their partisan theater, however, reveals that the authoritarianism they fear has already taken far deeper root than most realize.
A 2012 article conveying my comments at a law symposium in Chicago explained how, a full decade ago, the dystopian whole was sadly worse than the sum of its sordid parts. I addressed a then-recent speech by President Obama's Attorney General attempting to justify the use of drone strikes to kill even American citizens without charge or trial. I also explained forgotten histories stretching from Vietnam to the south side of Chicago, and from Nicaragua to Los Angeles and Miami, that too many Americans overlook when commemorating anniversaries like today's.
Much of why I write is to empower others to better advocate for the principles that we share. Any of the articles to which I link above offer insights, but this particular article presents my widest-ranging published analysis of the civil liberties crisis that threatens democracy in America and reinforces the mounting global climate catastrophe...
